properties.description: DQ Check comparing DVB to DVB systems. Gathers list of screens loops through executing Transactional pipeline.

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT dq_screen.screen_key,
       dq_screen.screen_script,
       dq_threshold.score_low_value,
       dq_threshold.score_high_value,
       dq_screen.compare_to_script,
       dq_threshold.threshold_type
FROM dqf.dq_screen dq_screen
    JOIN dqf.dq_threshold dq_threshold
        ON dq_threshold.screen_key = dq_screen.screen_key
    JOIN dqf.dq_system dq_system
        ON dq_system.system_id = dq_screen.screen_system_id
    JOIN dqf.dq_system dq_system_compare
        ON dq_system.system_id = dq_screen.screen_system_id
WHERE dq_screen.is_active = 1
      AND dq_system.system_name = 'ldw_synapse_dsqlpool_dvb'
      AND dq_system_compare.system_name = 'ldw_synapse_dsqlpool_dvb';

text.value:
@concat('select Batch_key from dqf.dq_Batch_Run where pipeline_run_id=','''',pipeline().RunId,''''
)

properties.description: DQ Check comparing ODS to ODS systems. Gathers list of screens loops through executing Transactional pipeline.

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT dq_screen.screen_key,
       dq_screen.screen_script,
       dq_threshold.score_low_value,
       dq_threshold.score_high_value,
       dq_screen.compare_to_script,
       dq_threshold.threshold_type
FROM dqf.dq_screen dq_screen
    JOIN dqf.dq_threshold dq_threshold
        ON dq_threshold.screen_key = dq_screen.screen_key
    JOIN dqf.dq_system dq_system
        ON dq_system.system_id = dq_screen.screen_system_id
    JOIN dqf.dq_system dq_system_compare
        ON dq_system.system_id = dq_screen.screen_system_id
WHERE dq_screen.is_active = 1
      AND dq_system.system_name = 'BannerInternal'
      AND dq_system_compare.system_name = 'BannerInternal';

properties.description: Executes each DVB to DVB screen event and stores records within event tables.

text.value: @pipeline().parameters.Screen_script

@concat('UPDATE dqf.dq_event SET event_end = CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATETIMEOFFSET, (SYSDATETIME() at time zone ''UTC'') AT TIME ZONE ''Pacific Standard Time'')), event_status = ''Complete'', event_score = ',variables('dq_score'),', event_table_count = ',activity('GetTableCount').output.resultsets[0].rows[0].Tablecount,', event_DQ_count = ',activity('GetDQCount').output.resultsets[0].rows[0].DQcount,', alert_mesg = ''',variables('Alert_msg'),''' WHERE event_key = ',activity('GetEventKey').output.resultsets[0].rows[0].event_key,'')
@pipeline().parameters.compare_to_script

@concat('select 
case when screen_type = ''Total Row Count'' then COALESCE(screen_value,0)
else COALESCE(sum(CAST(screen_value AS int)),0) end as DQCount 
from dqf.dq_event AS event_run 
INNER JOIN dqf.dq_screen
ON dq_screen.screen_key = event_run.screen_key
LEFT JOIN dqf.dq_event_detail AS screenevent
	ON screenevent.batch_key = event_run.batch_key
    AND screenevent.screen_key = event_run.screen_key
    AND universal_rec_key <> ''0'' --Eliminate ghost record for array existence
WHERE event_run.event_key = ',activity('GetEventKey').output.resultsets[0].rows[0].event_key,
'group by screen_type,screen_value')
select CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATETIMEOFFSET, (SYSDATETIME() at time zone 'UTC') AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')) as [current_time]

@concat('insert into dqf.dq_event_detail select CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATETIMEOFFSET, (SYSDATETIME() at time zone ''UTC'') AT TIME ZONE ''Pacific Standard Time'')), ',pipeline().parameters.Screen_key,', ',pipeline().parameters.Batch_key,',',activity('GetEventKey').output.resultsets[0].rows[0].event_key,', ','''',item().universal_rec_key,'''',', ','''',item().dq_result,'''',', ',
'''',replace(coalesce(item().dq_value,''),'''',''),'''','')

@concat('insert into dqf.dq_event select ',pipeline().parameters.Batch_key,', ',pipeline().parameters.Screen_key,', CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATETIMEOFFSET, (SYSDATETIME() at time zone ''UTC'') AT TIME ZONE ''Pacific Standard Time'')), NULL, ''Executing'', NULL, ''',pipeline().RunId,''', NULL, NULL, NULL')

activities.name: Lookup Delta Systems that did not fail

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat('SELECT 
	ISNULL(STRING_AGG(CAST(systems.system_id AS varchar), '','') , '''') AS ConcatenatedValues
FROM
	dvb_core.systems
		INNER JOIN dvb_core.staging_tables
			ON staging_tables.system_id = systems.system_id
WHERE systems.system_id LIKE ''dljh%''
AND UPPER(staging_tables.staging_table_name) IN (', '''', join(variables('DeltaSuccess'),''','''), '''', ')')

dependsOn.activity: Load data from Raw to Combined

value.value: @if(equals(json(activity('Load data from Raw to Combined').output.status.output.result.exitValue).TableSuccess, null), json('[]'), json(activity('Load data from Raw to Combined').output.status.output.result.exitValue).TableSuccess)

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
	DeltaLakeSilverConfig.ID
	,DeltaLakeSilverConfig.source_system
	,DeltaLakeSilverConfig.source_table
	,DeltaLakeSilverConfig.source_table_cols
	,DeltaLakeSilverConfig.date_conversion_cols
	,DeltaLakeSilverConfig.business_key_cols
	,DeltaLakeSilverConfig.hard_business_rules
	,DeltaLakeSilverConfig.active_flag
	,DeltaLakeSilverConfig.Create_date
	,DeltaLakeSilverConfig.Update_date
	,CASE
		WHEN DeltaLakeRawConfig.Pull_Portion = 'Incremental'
			THEN ''''+DeltaLakeSilverConfig.source_table+''''+':[''' + DeltaLakeRawConfig.Incremental_Field + ''']'
		ELSE ''
	END AS Incremental_Field
FROM
	Metadata.DeltaLakeSilverConfig
	LEFT JOIN Metadata.DeltaLakeRawConfig
		ON	DeltaLakeRawConfig.source_system = DeltaLakeSilverConfig.source_system
			AND DeltaLakeRawConfig.source_schema = DeltaLakeSilverConfig.source_schema
			AND DeltaLakeRawConfig.source_table = DeltaLakeSilverConfig.source_table
			AND DeltaLakeRawConfig.Active_Flag = DeltaLakeSilverConfig.active_flag
WHERE
	DeltaLakeSilverConfig.active_flag = 1
	AND DeltaLakeSilverConfig.source_schema = 'IFM'

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
	*
FROM
	Metadata.DeltaLakeRawConfig
WHERE
	Active_Flag = 1
	AND source_system = '[silverlake.jha]'

SELECT
	*
FROM
	(
		SELECT TOP 1
			YEAR(CAST(ImportPortion AS date)) * 1000 + DATEPART(DAYOFYEAR, CAST(ImportPortion AS date)) AS ImportPortion
			,ImportStarted
			,ImportFinished
			,ImportId
		FROM
			Metadata.DeltaLakeRawImportTracking
		WHERE
			SourceName = '[SilverLake.jha]'
		ORDER BY
			ImportId DESC
	) AS ImportTracking
UNION ALL
SELECT TOP 1
	2024001
	,'2024-01-01'
	,'2024-01-01'
	,0
ORDER BY
	ImportId DESC

sqlReaderQuery.value: @concat('SELECT Incremental_Field FROM Metadata.DeltaLakeRawConfig WHERE source_schema = ''IFM'' AND source_table = ''',split(item().name, '-')[2],'''')
@concat('SELECT Pull_Portion FROM Metadata.DeltaLakeRawConfig WHERE source_schema = ''IFM'' AND source_table = ''',split(item().name, '-')[2],'''')

@concat('SELECT case when count(*) = 0 then 0 else sum(active_flag) end as active_flag FROM Metadata.DeltaLakeRawConfig WHERE source_schema = ''IFM'' AND source_table = ''',split(item().name, '-')[2],'''')

SELECT FORMAT(DATEADD(hh,-12,getdate() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time'),'dd MMM yyyy HH:mm:ss')
AS modifiedDateTime

@Concat('WITH cte_DataDates
AS
(
    SELECT DISTINCT '
        ,pipeline().parameters.DateDelimiter, ' AS DateDelimiter 
    FROM '
        ,pipeline().parameters.DeltaLake_table_id, ' 
    WHERE '
        ,pipeline().parameters.DateDelimiter, ' IN (',pipeline().parameters.DataDate,')
)
SELECT 
	CAST(CONCAT(YEAR(DateDelimiter), MONTH(DateDelimiter)) AS varchar(6)) AS YearMonth
	,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY
							YEAR(DateDelimiter) DESC
							,MONTH(DateDelimiter) DESC
					) AS RowNumber
	,STRING_AGG(CAST(QUOTENAME(DateDelimiter, '''''''') AS nvarchar(MAX)), '','') AS DateDelimiter
FROM
	cte_DataDates
GROUP BY
	YEAR(DateDelimiter)
	,MONTH(DateDelimiter)
ORDER BY
	RowNumber ASC
    ')
@concat('SELECT SQL_Stmt FROM testing.HistoryLoad_Lookup WHERE staging_table_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.Staging_Table_id, '''')

/***************************************************************************************************
	NAME
		Client Journey - Officer.sql

	AUTHOR
		Mike.Hubbard@bannerbank.com, Banner Bank

	CREATE DATE
		2024-07-01

	BUSINESS OWNER(S)
		Lee Edwards

	INTENDED USE
		Script purpose
		
	INTENDED AUDIENCE
		digitl marketing

	RELATED PROJECTS / TICKETS
		#3800

	CHANGE LOG
		2024-07-01 MH -	First implementation (or change description)
						More change description

***************************************************************************************************/
/***************************************************************************************************
	DECLARE VARIABLES
***************************************************************************************************/
DECLARE @DataDate AS date =
			(
				SELECT
					DimTime.ActualDate
				FROM
					consume.DimTime
				WHERE
					DimTime.CurrDay = 'Y'
			)
;

/***************************************************************************************************
	HOUSEKEEPING
***************************************************************************************************/


/***************************************************************************************************
	BEGIN SCRIPT
***************************************************************************************************/
SELECT
		Officer.Officer_BK AS Officer_BK
		,Officer.OfficerCode AS OfficerCode
		,Officer.EmployeeId AS EmployeeId
		,Officer.SupervisorId AS SupervisorId
		,Officer.OfficerFirstName AS OfficerFirstName
		,Officer.OfficerNickName AS OfficerNickName
		,Officer.OfficerMiddleName AS OfficerMiddleName
		,Officer.OfficerLastName AS OfficerLastName
		,Officer.OfficerNameSuffix AS OfficerNameSuffix
		,Officer.OfficerUserName AS OfficerUserName
		,Officer.OfficerEmail AS OfficerEmail
		,Officer.OfficerFullName AS OfficerFullName
		,Officer.DateHired AS DateHired
		,Officer.DateTerminated AS DateTerminated
		,Officer.JobDescription AS JobDescription
		,Officer.Branch_BK AS Branch_BK
FROM
	consume.Officer AS Officer
WHERE
	Officer.As_Of_Date = @DataDate
	AND (Officer.DateTerminated IS NULL 
		OR Officer.DateTerminated = '')
;

/***************************************************************************************************
	NAME
		Client Journey - Client.sql

	AUTHOR
		Mike.Hubbard@bannerbank.com, Banner Bank

	CREATE DATE
		2024-07-01

	BUSINESS OWNER(S)
		Lee Edwards

	INTENDED USE
		Script purpose
		
	INTENDED AUDIENCE
		digitl marketing

	RELATED PROJECTS / TICKETS
		#3800

	CHANGE LOG
		2024-07-01 MH -	First implementation (or change description)
						More change description

***************************************************************************************************/
/***************************************************************************************************
	DECLARE VARIABLES
***************************************************************************************************/
DECLARE @DataDate AS date =
			(
				SELECT
					DimTime.ActualDate
				FROM
					consume.DimTime
				WHERE
					DimTime.CurrDay = 'Y'
			)
;

/***************************************************************************************************
	HOUSEKEEPING
***************************************************************************************************/


/***************************************************************************************************
	BEGIN SCRIPT
***************************************************************************************************/
SELECT
	ClientAccount.Client_BK
	,HubAccount.account_h AS Account_HK
	,Account.Product_BK
	,ClientAccount.RelationshipCode
	,ClientAccount.RelationshipDescription
	,ClientAccount.QualBeneficiary
	,ClientAccount.PercentOwned
	,ClientAccount.RelationshipOwner
FROM
	consume.ClientAccount AS ClientAccount
	LEFT JOIN datavault.h_account AS HubAccount
		ON HubAccount.account_bk = ClientAccount.Account_BK
	LEFT JOIN consume.Account AS Account
		ON Account.Account_BK = ClientAccount.Account_BK
		AND Account.As_Of_Date = ClientAccount.As_Of_Date
WHERE
	ClientAccount.As_Of_Date = @DataDate
	AND Account.IsShadow <> 1
	AND Account.AccountIsActive <> 0
	AND
	(
			Account.ClosedDate IS NULL
			OR	Account.ClosedDate = ''
		)
	AND Account.IsTestAccount <> 1
;

	,ClientAddress.ClientAddressField1
	,ClientAddress.ClientAddressField2

	,ClientAddress.ClientCity
	,ClientAddress.ClientState
	,ClientAddress.ClientZip

	,Account.AccountType AS AccountType
	,Account.StatusCode AS StatusCode
	,Account.StatusDescription AS StatusDescription
	,Account.AccountIsActive AS AccountIsActive
	,Account.IsShadow AS IsShadow
	,Account.ShadowStatusCode AS ShadowStatusCode

	,Account.ClosedDate AS ClosedDate
	,Account.LastChargedOffDate AS LastChargedOffDate
	,Account.LastChargedOffAmt AS LastChargedOffAmt

	,Account.IsTestAccount AS IsTestAccount
	,Account.IsBannerInternalBankUse AS IsBannerInternalBankUse
	,Account.IsBannerInternalCustUse AS IsBannerInternalCustUse
	,Account.DeptCode AS DeptCode
	,Account.AccountClassCategory AS AccountClassCategory
	,Account.AccountServicingDepartment AS AccountServicingDepartment
	,Account.AccountClassCode AS AccountClassCode
	,Account.AccountClassDescription AS AccountClassDescription

	,Account.QueryBalance AS QueryBalance

	,Account.Trailing90DayAvgBal AS Trailing90DayAvgBal
	,Account.MTDAverageBal AS MTDAverageBal
	,Account.Client_BK AS Client_BK
	,Account.Branch_BK AS Branch_BK
	,Account.Officer_BK AS Officer_BK

	,Account.GLProductCode_BK AS GLProductCode_BK
	,Account.Product_BK AS Product_BK
FROM
	consume.Account
	LEFT JOIN datavault.h_account AS HubAccount
		ON HubAccount.account_bk = Account.Account_BK
WHERE
	Account.As_Of_Date = @DataDate
	AND Account.IsShadow <> 1
	AND Account.AccountIsActive <> 0
	AND
	(
			Account.ClosedDate IS NULL
			OR	Account.ClosedDate = ''
		)

		,Branch.BranchDivision AS BranchDivision
		,Branch.BranchRegion AS BranchRegion
		,Branch.BranchLineOfBusiness AS BranchLineOfBusiness
		,Branch.BankNumber AS BankNumber
		,Branch.BankName AS BankName
		,Branch.BranchCity AS BranchCity
		,Branch.BranchState AS BranchState
		,Branch.BranchZip AS BranchZip
		,Branch.BranchAddress2 AS BranchAddress2
		,Branch.BranchCity2 AS BranchCity2
		,Branch.BranchState2 AS BranchState2
		,Branch.BranchZip2 AS BranchZip2
		,Branch.BranchPhoneNumber2 AS BranchPhoneNumber2
		,Branch.BranchAfterHrsPhone AS BranchAfterHrsPhone
		,Branch.BranchFaxNumber AS BranchFaxNumber
		,Branch.BranchSpeedDial AS BranchSpeedDial
		,Branch.DivManager AS DivManager
		,Branch.DivOpCoordinator AS DivOpCoordinator
		,Branch.BranchManager AS BranchManager
		,Branch.BranchLobbyHours AS BranchLobbyHours
		,Branch.BranchDriveUpHours AS BranchDriveUpHours
		,Branch.BranchMiscNotes AS BranchMiscNotes
		,Branch.BranchIsActive AS BranchIsActive
FROM
	consume.Branch AS Branch
WHERE
	Branch.As_Of_Date = @DataDate
	AND Branch.BranchIsActive <> 0
;

properties.description: Execute Start Hub Loads.

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat('select  ',string(variables('HubLoadCount')),' - ISNULL(SUM(   CASE
WHEN last_load.load_end_time
BETWEEN DATEADD(dd, 0, DATEDIFF(dd, 0, GETDATE()))
AND DATEADD(dd, 0, DATEDIFF(dd, -1, GETDATE()))
AND load_state = ''Succeeded''
THEN 1
ELSE 0
END
),0) UnfinishedCount ,
ISNULL(SUM(CASE  
WHEN last_load.load_end_time
BETWEEN DATEADD(dd, 0, DATEDIFF(dd, 0, GETDATE()))
AND DATEADD(dd, 0, DATEDIFF(dd, -1, GETDATE())) 
AND last_load.load_state = ''Failed''
THEN 1 
ELSE 0 
END ),0) FailedCount from 
dvb_core.latest_datavault_load_info last_load
where last_load.object_id+','''-''','+last_load.staging_table_id in (',variables('HubLoadList_String'),')')

properties.description: Main method to check and load PIT tables

sqlReaderQuery.value: @variables('queryBuilder')

ifFalseActivities.name: Set query builder for all PIT tables

value.value:
SELECT tables.name object_id,
       'datavault.h_' + RIGHT(tables.name, LEN(tables.name) - 2) staging_table_id
FROM sys.tables tables
JOIN sys.schemas schemas ON schemas.schema_id = tables.schema_id
WHERE schemas.name = 'businessobjects_pits';

SELECT tables.name object_id,
       'datavault.h_' + RIGHT(tables.name, LEN(tables.name) - 2) staging_table_id
FROM sys.tables tables
JOIN sys.schemas schemas ON schemas.schema_id = tables.schema_id
WHERE schemas.name = 'businessobjects_pits' AND tables.name IN ('p_account','p_client_cif');

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT COUNT(*)
       - SUM(   CASE
                    WHEN last_load.load_end_time
                         BETWEEN DATEADD(dd, 0, DATEDIFF(dd, 0, GETDATE())) 
							AND DATEADD(dd, 0, DATEDIFF(dd, -1, GETDATE())) 
					THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END
            ) UnfinishedCount
FROM sys.tables tables
    JOIN sys.schemas schemas
        ON schemas.schema_id = tables.schema_id
    LEFT JOIN
     dvb_core.latest_datavault_load_info last_load
        ON last_load.object_id = tables.name
WHERE schemas.name = 'businessobjects_pits';

properties.description: Main method to check and load PIT tables

sqlReaderQuery.value: @variables('queryBuilder')

ifFalseActivities.name: Set query builder for all PIT tables

value.value:
SELECT DISTINCT TOP 100 
[object_id],
staging_table_id
FROM [dvb_log].[datavault_load_log]
WHERE [object_id] LIKE 'p%'

SELECT DISTINCT TOP 100 
[object_id],
staging_table_id
FROM [dvb_log].[datavault_load_log]
WHERE [object_id] = 'p_account' OR [object_id] = 'p_client_cif'

properties.description: staging load for dvb.

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat('SELECT COUNT(*)       - SUM(   CASE
WHEN last_load.succeeded_load_end_time
BETWEEN DATEADD(dd, 0, DATEDIFF(dd, 0, GETDATE()))
AND DATEADD(dd, 0, DATEDIFF(dd, -1, GETDATE()))
THEN 1
ELSE 0
END
) UnfinishedCount , SUM(CASE  
WHEN last_load.latest_load_end_time
BETWEEN DATEADD(dd, 0, DATEDIFF(dd, 0, GETDATE()))
AND DATEADD(dd, 0, DATEDIFF(dd, -1, GETDATE())) 
AND last_load.load_state = ''Failed'' 
THEN 1 
ELSE 0 
END ) FailedCount
FROM dvb_core.staging_tables tables
LEFT JOIN
dvb_core.latest_staging_load_info last_load
ON last_load.staging_table_id = tables.staging_table_id
WHERE system_id = ''',pipeline().parameters.SystemId,''';')

SELECT CASE
           WHEN DimTime.SLHolidayInd = 'Y' THEN
               'Holiday'
           WHEN DimTime.DayOfWeek = 'Friday' THEN
               'Saturday'
           ELSE
               'Default'
       END ProcessSwitch
FROM consume.DimTime DimTime
WHERE DimTime.ActualDate = CAST(GETDATE() - 1 AS DATE);

Main orchestration pipeline, that starts the orchestrate process

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT DISTINCT staging_tables.system_id, source_type_id
FROM
    dvb_core.systems
        INNER JOIN dvb_core.staging_tables
            ON staging_tables.system_id = systems.system_id
        INNER JOIN dvb_core.system_connections
            ON system_connections.system_id = staging_tables.system_id
			WHERE staging_tables.system_id LIKE  'jha%'

SELECT DISTINCT staging_tables.system_id, source_type_id
FROM
    dvb_core.systems
        INNER JOIN dvb_core.staging_tables
            ON staging_tables.system_id = systems.system_id
        INNER JOIN dvb_core.system_connections
            ON system_connections.system_id = staging_tables.system_id
			WHERE source_type_id = 'businessvaultload'

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT CAST( CASE WHEN EXISTS 
    (SELECT * FROM CreditCard_Report.Transactions Transactions
         WHERE Transactions.DataDate = CAST(GETDATE() - 1 AS DATE)) 
            AND
    EXISTS  (SELECT *
    FROM CreditCard_Report.Cards Cards
        WHERE Cards.DataDate = CAST(GETDATE() -1 AS DATE)) 
    THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS BIT) CreditCardLoadComplete

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT *, COMPRESSED_rowgroup_rows_MAX - COMPRESSED_rowgroup_rows_AVG as diff
FROM dbo.vColumnstoreDensity
where COMPRESSED_rowgroup_rows_MAX - COMPRESSED_rowgroup_rows_AVG <> 0
AND schema_name IN ('staging', 'datavault', 'businessobjects_pits')
order by COMPRESSED_rowgroup_rows_MAX - COMPRESSED_rowgroup_rows_AVG desc

source.sqlReaderQuery:
with tab1 as (
  select 
      TABLE_SCHEMA,
      TABLE_NAME,
      value,
      row_number() over (partition by table_name order by (select null)) as row_num,
      LAST_VALUE(value) over (PARTITION by table_name order by (select null)) as best_val
	  ,left(TABLE_NAME,len(TABLE_NAME)-len(RIGHT(TABLE_NAME, (CHARINDEX('_',REVERSE(TABLE_NAME),0))))) as org_table_name
  from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES
      cross apply string_split(TABLE_NAME,'_',1)
  where TABLE_SCHEMA in ('raw','invalid', 'RawPCI')
    and TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE'
),
tabstodrop as (
  select 
    table_schema,
    table_name, 
	org_table_name,
    len(best_val) as len_best_val , 
    try_cast(substring(best_val,1,10) as date) as table_date
	,try_cast(replace(best_val,'T',' ') as datetime) as table_datetime
  from tab1
  where row_num = 1
    and len(best_val) = 19
),
last_load as (
select a.*,last_load_date
from tabstodrop a
join (
   select table_schema,
    org_table_name,
	max(table_datetime) as last_load_date
	from tabstodrop
	group by table_schema,org_table_name)b 
	on a.table_schema = b.table_schema 
	and a.org_table_name = b.org_table_name
	)
select 
  table_schema,
  table_name,
  table_date
  ,last_load_date
from last_load
where 
  ( table_schema = 'raw' 
    and table_date < ( select last_load_date-cast(value as int) as RawTablePurgeAge 
                        from metadata.sysvalsconfig where [Key] = 'RawTablePurgeAge' )
  ) or 
   ( table_schema = 'rawpci' 
    and table_date < ( select last_load_date-cast(value as int) as RawTablePurgeAge 
                        from metadata.sysvalsconfig where [Key] = 'RawTablePurgeAge' )
  ) or
  ( table_schema = 'invalid' 
    and table_date < ( select last_load_date-cast(value as int) as InvalidTablePurgeAge 
                        from metadata.sysvalsconfig where [Key] = 'InvalidTablePurgeAge' )
  );

sqlReaderQuery.value:
Declare @currentDate datetime
Declare @firstDateOfMonth  datetime
set @currentDate = GETDATE()
set @firstDateOfMonth = @currentDate - DAY(@currentDate) + 1
SELECT (DATEDIFF(day, @firstDateOfMonth, @currentDate)) - (DATEDIFF(week,@firstDateOfMonth, @currentDate) * 2) - (CASE WHEN DATENAME(dw, @firstDateOfMonth) = 'Sunday' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) -(CASE WHEN DATENAME(dw, @currentDate) = 'Saturday' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as BusinessDay

properties.description: Pipeline to build report data and security model data for Top Depositors and Attrition Risk PBI reports.

source.sqlReaderQuery:
DECLARE @CurrentDate DATE = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time'
       ,@LastEOMDate DATE;

SELECT @LastEOMDate = MAX(ActualDate)
FROM consume.DimTime
WHERE SLEOMInd = 'Y' -- find end of month dates
AND ActualDate < @CurrentDate -- look for end of month dates prior to today

--SELECT @LastEOMDate, DATEADD(DAY, 1, @LastEOMDate), @CurrentDate

-- if today is the day after the latest EOM, then return 'YES' as we should process the month end data today
SELECT CASE WHEN DATEADD(DAY, 1, @LastEOMDate) = @CurrentDate THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END AS Val

ifTrueActivities.name: Balance Change Alert Depositors Dataset
ifTrueActivities.description: Pull depositors that meet balance change alert criteria and send to Azure SQL db for Power Automate email

source.sqlReaderQuery:
DECLARE @MaxMonthSeq# INT = (SELECT MAX(MonthSeq#) FROM banner_reporting.TopDepositors_ReportData);

DECLARE @CurrentMonth INT = (SELECT MAX(YearMonth) FROM banner_reporting.TopDepositors_ReportData WHERE MonthSeq# = @MaxMonthSeq#)
       ,@PriorMonth INT = (SELECT MAX(YearMonth) FROM banner_reporting.TopDepositors_ReportData WHERE MonthSeq# = (@MaxMonthSeq#-1) );

-- pull depositors with a month-over-month balance change of +/- 100k and associate to the main account branch
WITH CurrentMonthTotals AS (
   SELECT As_Of_Date
         ,YearMonth
         ,[Depositor Type]
         ,[Depositor Number]
         ,[Depositor Name]
         ,RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
         ,RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
         ,Officer
         ,[Account Branch List]
         ,[Number of Account Branches]
         ,SUM([Demand Deposit Balance]) AS [Deposit Balance]
         ,SUM([Demand Deposit # of Accts]) AS [Deposit # of Accts]
     FROM banner_reporting.TopDepositors_ReportData
    WHERE YearMonth = @CurrentMonth
    GROUP BY As_Of_Date
            ,YearMonth
            ,[Depositor Type]
            ,[Depositor Number]
            ,[Depositor Name]
            ,RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
            ,RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
            ,Officer
            ,[Account Branch List]
            ,[Number of Account Branches]
)
, PriorMonthTotals AS (
   SELECT As_Of_Date
         ,YearMonth
         ,[Depositor Type]
         ,[Depositor Number]
         ,[Depositor Name]
         ,RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
         ,RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
         ,Officer
         ,[Account Branch List]
         ,[Number of Account Branches]
         ,SUM([Demand Deposit Balance]) AS [Deposit Balance]
         ,SUM([Demand Deposit # of Accts]) AS [Deposit # of Accts]
     FROM banner_reporting.TopDepositors_ReportData
    WHERE YearMonth = @PriorMonth
    GROUP BY As_Of_Date
            ,YearMonth
            ,[Depositor Type]
            ,[Depositor Number]
            ,[Depositor Name]
            ,RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
            ,RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
            ,Officer
            ,[Account Branch List]
            ,[Number of Account Branches]
)
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CurrentTotals.[Depositor Number] ASC) AS [RowID]
      ,CurrentTotals.As_Of_Date
      ,CurrentTotals.YearMonth
      ,CurrentTotals.[Depositor Type]
      ,CurrentTotals.[Depositor Number]
      ,CurrentTotals.[Depositor Name]
      ,CurrentTotals.RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
      ,CurrentTotals.RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
      ,CurrentTotals.Officer
      ,MainAccountBranch.[Account Branch Number]
      ,MainAccountBranch.[Account Branch Name]
      ,MainAccountBranch.[Account Branch Division]
      ,MainAccountBranch.[Account Branch Region]
      ,CurrentTotals.[Account Branch List]
      ,CurrentTotals.[Number of Account Branches]
      ,CurrentTotals.[Deposit Balance] AS [Deposit Balance - Current]
      ,CurrentTotals.[Deposit # of Accts] AS [Deposit # of Accts - Current]
      ,PriorTotals.[Deposit Balance] AS [Deposit Balance - Prior]
      ,PriorTotals.[Deposit # of Accts] AS [Deposit # of Accts - Prior]
      ,CurrentTotals.[Deposit Balance] - ISNULL(PriorTotals.[Deposit Balance], 0.00) AS [Deposit Balance - Difference]
      ,CurrentTotals.[Deposit # of Accts] - ISNULL(PriorTotals.[Deposit # of Accts], 0.00) AS [Deposit # of Accts - Difference]
      ,NULL AS EmailSentDateTime
  FROM CurrentMonthTotals AS CurrentTotals
  LEFT OUTER JOIN PriorMonthTotals AS PriorTotals
    ON CurrentTotals.[Depositor Number] = PriorTotals.[Depositor Number]
   AND CurrentTotals.[Depositor Type] = PriorTotals.[Depositor Type]
  JOIN banner_reporting.TopDepositors_ReportData AS MainAccountBranch
    ON CurrentTotals.[Depositor Number] = MainAccountBranch.[Depositor Number]
   AND CurrentTotals.[Depositor Type] = MainAccountBranch.[Depositor Type]
   AND CurrentTotals.YearMonth = MainAccountBranch.YearMonth
   AND MainAccountBranch.[Demand Deposit - Main Account Branch Flag] = 1 -- pull the Main Account Branch row only
 WHERE ABS(CurrentTotals.[Deposit Balance] - ISNULL(PriorTotals.[Deposit Balance], 0.00)) >= 100000 -- find any depositors with a balance change of +/- 100k, if not present in prior month it is a new client
 ORDER BY [RowID]

ifTrueActivities.name: Balance Change Alert Managers Dataset
ifTrueActivities.description: Pull branch and division managers and send to Azure SQL db for Power Automate email

sqlReaderQuery.value:
DECLARE @CurrDay DATE = (SELECT currday FROM BannerInternal.[BI].[vwTimeParameters])

DECLARE @Env VARCHAR(10) = '@{variables('ENV')}'

----------------------------------------------------------
-- Branch -> Division -> Region
----------------------------------------------------------
-- build flattened table of active branches, to be used later
IF OBJECT_ID('Tempdb..#Branches') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #Branches

SELECT Branch.OrgUnitId AS BranchID
      ,Branch.OrgUnitCode AS BranchNumber
      ,BranchNames.OrgUnitName AS BranchName
      -- parent division details
      ,Division.OrgUnitId AS DivisionID
      ,Division.OrgUnitCode AS DivisionCode
      ,DivisionNames.OrgUnitName AS DivisionName
      -- parent region details
      ,Region.OrgUnitId AS RegionID
      ,Region.OrgUnitCode AS RegionCode
      ,RegionNames.OrgUnitName AS RegionName
  INTO #Branches
  FROM Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnits        AS Branch
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitNames    AS BranchNames
    ON Branch.JhaPostingDate = BranchNames.JhaPostingDate
   AND Branch.OrgUnitId = BranchNames.OrgUnitId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].Branches        AS B_Details
    ON Branch.JhaPostingDate = B_Details.JhaPostingDate
   AND Branch.OrgUnitId = B_Details.BranchId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnits        AS Division
    ON Branch.ParentUnitId = Division.OrgUnitId
   AND Branch.JhaPostingDate = Division.JhaPostingDate
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitNames    AS DivisionNames
    ON Division.JhaPostingDate = DivisionNames.JhaPostingDate
   AND Division.OrgUnitId = DivisionNames.OrgUnitId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnits        AS Region
    ON Division.ParentUnitId = Region.OrgUnitId
   AND Division.JhaPostingDate = Region.JhaPostingDate
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitNames    AS RegionNames
    ON Region.JhaPostingDate = RegionNames.JhaPostingDate
   AND Region.OrgUnitId = RegionNames.OrgUnitId
 WHERE Branch.JhaPostingDate = @CurrDay
   AND Branch.OrgUnitTypeId = 7 -- Branch
   --AND Region.OrgUnitId IN (24,34) -- Community Banking / Retail
   AND B_Details.ActiveBranch = 1 -- active branches only
ORDER BY Branch.OrgUnitId

----------------------------------------------------------
-- Employees + Titles + Assigned Branches
----------------------------------------------------------
-- query will bring back multiple rows per employee if they have multiple staffing assignments
-- HRAssignedBranch = OU.OrgUnitCode in all cases except the 4 employees with multiple branches assigned in StaffingAssigments table
IF OBJECT_ID('Tempdb..#Employees') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #Employees

SELECT E.EmployeeId
      ,E.SupervisorId
      ,E.OfficerCode
      ,E.FirstName
      ,E.LastName
      ,E.HRAssignedBranch
      ,E.UserName
      ,CASE WHEN @Env = 'PROD' THEN E.Email ELSE 'Kenny.Quach@bannerbank.com' END AS Email -- hard-code default email in Dev/Test so we don't spam people during testing
      ,HR.HRJobTitleId
      ,HR.HRJobTitleFormal
      ,HR.HRJobCode
      ,SA.StaffingAssignmentId
      ,AI.AddressImplementationId
      ,OU.OrgUnitId
      ,OU.OrgUnitTypeId
      ,OU.ParentUnitId
      ,OU.OrgUnitCode
      ,OUN.OrgUnitName
  INTO #Employees
  FROM Archive.[other.fi].Employees E
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].HRJobTitles HR
    ON E.JhaPostingDate = HR.JhaPostingDate
   AND E.HRJobTitleId = HR.HRJobTitleId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].StaffingAssignments SA
    ON E.JhaPostingDate = SA.JhaPostingDate
   AND E.EmployeeId = SA.EmployeeId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].AddressImplementations AI
    ON SA.JhaPostingDate = AI.JhaPostingDate
   AND SA.AddressImplementationId = AI.AddressImplementationId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnits OU
    ON AI.JhaPostingDate = OU.JhaPostingDate
   AND AI.OrgUnitId = OU.OrgUnitId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitNames OUN
    ON OU.JhaPostingDate = OUN.JhaPostingDate
   AND OU.OrgUnitId = OUN.OrgUnitId
 WHERE 1=1
   AND E.JhaPostingDate = @CurrDay
   AND E.DateTerminated IS NULL -- current employee
   AND HR.HRJobCode IN ('30029', '20015', '30068', '30065', '30067', '30066', '30069') -- restrict to branch and division manager job titles
ORDER BY E.EmployeeId


----------------------------------------------------------
-- Branch and Division Managers
----------------------------------------------------------

-- branch managers - Retail (Community Banking) and Commercial
SELECT DISTINCT E.OfficerCode AS OfficerCode
      ,E.FirstName + ' ' + E.LastName AS OfficerName
      ,E.Email
      ,Branch.OrgUnitCode AS BranchNumber
      ,B.BranchName
      ,B.DivisionName
      ,B.RegionName
      ,CASE WHEN B.RegionCode IN ('CN','CE') THEN 'Commercial' ELSE 'Community Banking' END AS BranchType
      ,'Branch Manager' AS ManagerType
      ,E.HRJobTitleFormal
      ,E.HRJobCode
  FROM Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitManagers OUM
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnits AS Branch
    ON OUM.JhaPostingDate = Branch.JhaPostingDate
   AND OUM.OrgUnitId = Branch.OrgUnitId
   AND Branch.OrgUnitTypeId = 7 -- Branch
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitNames AS BranchNames
    ON Branch.JhaPostingDate = BranchNames.JhaPostingDate
   AND Branch.OrgUnitId = BranchNames.OrgUnitId
  JOIN #Employees E
    ON OUM.EmployeeId = E.EmployeeId
  JOIN #Branches B
    ON Branch.OrgUnitId = B.BranchID
 WHERE 1=1
   AND OUM.JhaPostingDate = @CurrDay
   AND B.RegionCode IN ('CN','CE','IB','R2') -- Commercial Banking, Business Client Management, Community Banking Region I, Community Banking Region II
   --AND OUM.ManagerTypeId IN (12,13,14,15)
UNION
-- division managers and the branches in their division - Retail (Community Banking) and Commercial
SELECT DISTINCT E.OfficerCode AS OfficerCode
      ,E.FirstName + ' ' + E.LastName AS OfficerName
      ,E.Email
      ,B.BranchNumber AS BranchNumber
      ,B.BranchName
      ,B.DivisionName
      ,B.RegionName
      ,CASE WHEN B.RegionCode IN ('CN','CE') THEN 'Commercial' ELSE 'Community Banking' END AS BranchType
      ,'Division Manager' AS ManagerType
      ,E.HRJobTitleFormal
      ,E.HRJobCode
  FROM Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitManagers OUM
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnits AS Division
    ON OUM.JhaPostingDate = Division.JhaPostingDate
   AND OUM.OrgUnitId = Division.OrgUnitId
   AND Division.OrgUnitTypeId = 5 -- Division
  JOIN #Employees E
    ON OUM.EmployeeId = E.EmployeeId
  JOIN #Branches B
    ON Division.OrgUnitId = B.DivisionID
 WHERE 1=1
   AND OUM.JhaPostingDate = @CurrDay
   AND B.RegionCode IN ('CN','CE','IB','R2') -- Commercial Banking, Business Client Management, Community Banking Region I, Community Banking Region II
   --AND OUM.ManagerTypeId IN (7,9,11)

source.sqlReaderQuery:
DECLARE @CurrDay DATE = (SELECT currday FROM BannerInternal.[BI].[vwTimeParameters])

----------------------------------------------------------
-- Branch -> Division -> Region
----------------------------------------------------------
-- build flattened table of active branches, to be used later
IF OBJECT_ID('Tempdb..#Branches') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #Branches

SELECT Branch.OrgUnitId AS BranchID
      ,Branch.OrgUnitCode AS BranchNumber
      ,BranchNames.OrgUnitName AS BranchName
      -- parent division details
      ,Division.OrgUnitId AS DivisionID
      ,Division.OrgUnitCode AS DivisionCode
      ,DivisionNames.OrgUnitName AS DivisionName
      -- parent region details
      ,Region.OrgUnitId AS RegionID
      ,Region.OrgUnitCode AS RegionCode
      ,RegionNames.OrgUnitName AS RegionName
  INTO #Branches
  FROM Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnits        AS Branch
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitNames    AS BranchNames
    ON Branch.JhaPostingDate = BranchNames.JhaPostingDate
   AND Branch.OrgUnitId = BranchNames.OrgUnitId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].Branches        AS B_Details
    ON Branch.JhaPostingDate = B_Details.JhaPostingDate
   AND Branch.OrgUnitId = B_Details.BranchId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnits        AS Division
    ON Branch.ParentUnitId = Division.OrgUnitId
   AND Branch.JhaPostingDate = Division.JhaPostingDate
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitNames    AS DivisionNames
    ON Division.JhaPostingDate = DivisionNames.JhaPostingDate
   AND Division.OrgUnitId = DivisionNames.OrgUnitId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnits        AS Region
    ON Division.ParentUnitId = Region.OrgUnitId
   AND Division.JhaPostingDate = Region.JhaPostingDate
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitNames    AS RegionNames
    ON Region.JhaPostingDate = RegionNames.JhaPostingDate
   AND Region.OrgUnitId = RegionNames.OrgUnitId
 WHERE Branch.JhaPostingDate = @CurrDay
   AND Branch.OrgUnitTypeId = 7 -- Branch
   --AND Region.OrgUnitId IN (24,34) -- Community Banking / Retail
   AND B_Details.ActiveBranch = 1 -- active branches only
ORDER BY Branch.OrgUnitId

/*
SELECT *
FROM #Branches
ORDER BY BranchNumber
*/

----------------------------------------------------------
-- Employees + Titles + Assigned Branches
----------------------------------------------------------
-- query will bring back multiple rows per employee if they have multiple staffing assignments
-- HRAssignedBranch = OU.OrgUnitCode in all cases except the 4 employees with multiple branches assigned in StaffingAssigments table
IF OBJECT_ID('Tempdb..#Employees') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #Employees

SELECT E.EmployeeId
      ,E.SupervisorId
      ,E.OfficerCode
      ,E.FirstName
      ,E.LastName
      ,E.HRAssignedBranch
      ,E.UserName
      ,E.Email
      ,HR.HRJobTitleId
      ,HR.HRJobTitleFormal
      ,HR.HRJobCode
      ,SA.StaffingAssignmentId
      ,AI.AddressImplementationId
      ,OU.OrgUnitId
      ,OU.OrgUnitTypeId
      ,OU.ParentUnitId
      ,OU.OrgUnitCode
      ,OUN.OrgUnitName
  INTO #Employees
  FROM Archive.[other.fi].Employees E
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].HRJobTitles HR
    ON E.JhaPostingDate = HR.JhaPostingDate
   AND E.HRJobTitleId = HR.HRJobTitleId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].StaffingAssignments SA -- verified that all active employees are present in StaffingAssignments table
    ON E.JhaPostingDate = SA.JhaPostingDate
   AND E.EmployeeId = SA.EmployeeId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].AddressImplementations AI
    ON SA.JhaPostingDate = AI.JhaPostingDate
   AND SA.AddressImplementationId = AI.AddressImplementationId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnits OU
    ON AI.JhaPostingDate = OU.JhaPostingDate
   AND AI.OrgUnitId = OU.OrgUnitId
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitNames OUN
    ON OU.JhaPostingDate = OUN.JhaPostingDate
   AND OU.OrgUnitId = OUN.OrgUnitId
 WHERE 1=1
   AND E.JhaPostingDate = @CurrDay
   AND E.DateTerminated IS NULL -- current employee
ORDER BY E.EmployeeId

/*
SELECT *
FROM #Employees
--WHERE HRJobCode IN ('40046','40040','40041','40042','40237')
--WHERE HRAssignedBranch <> OrgUnitCode
WHERE OfficerCode = '21982'
ORDER BY EmployeeId
*/

----------------------------------------------------------
-- Branch and Division Managers
----------------------------------------------------------
--  Security rules:
--  all branch managers should be mapped to the branches they manage
--  all division managers should be mapped to all branches in their division(s)
--  multiple branches per manager & multiple managers per branch scenarios are handled in the OrgUnitManagers table structure
IF OBJECT_ID('Tempdb..#BranchSecurity') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #BranchSecurity

-- branch managers - Retail (Community Banking) and Commercial
SELECT DISTINCT E.Email
      ,E.EmployeeId
      ,'60*&#' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,E.EmployeeId) AS Employee_BK
      ,'60*&#' + E.OfficerCode AS Officer_BK
      ,'60*&#' + Branch.OrgUnitCode AS Branch_BK
      ,CASE WHEN B.RegionCode IN ('CN','CE') THEN 'Commercial' ELSE 'Community Banking' END AS BranchType
      ,'Branch/Division Managers' AS SecurityType
  INTO #BranchSecurity
  FROM Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitManagers OUM
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnits AS Branch
    ON OUM.JhaPostingDate = Branch.JhaPostingDate
   AND OUM.OrgUnitId = Branch.OrgUnitId
   AND Branch.OrgUnitTypeId = 7 -- Branch
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitNames AS BranchNames
    ON Branch.JhaPostingDate = BranchNames.JhaPostingDate
   AND Branch.OrgUnitId = BranchNames.OrgUnitId
  JOIN #Employees E
    ON OUM.EmployeeId = E.EmployeeId
  JOIN #Branches B
    ON Branch.OrgUnitId = B.BranchID
 WHERE 1=1
   AND OUM.JhaPostingDate = @CurrDay
   AND B.RegionCode IN ('CN','CE','IB','R2') -- Commercial Banking, Business Client Management, Community Banking Region I, Community Banking Region II
UNION
-- division managers (push security perms down to each active branch within a division) - Retail (Community Banking) and Commercial
SELECT DISTINCT E.Email
      ,E.EmployeeId
      ,'60*&#' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,E.EmployeeId) AS Employee_BK
      ,'60*&#' + E.OfficerCode AS Officer_BK
      ,'60*&#' + B.BranchNumber AS Branch_BK
      ,CASE WHEN B.RegionCode IN ('CN','CE') THEN 'Commercial' ELSE 'Community Banking' END AS BranchType
      ,'Branch/Division Managers' AS SecurityType
  FROM Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnitManagers OUM
  JOIN Archive.[other.fi].OrgUnits AS Division
    ON OUM.JhaPostingDate = Division.JhaPostingDate
   AND OUM.OrgUnitId = Division.OrgUnitId
   AND Division.OrgUnitTypeId = 5 -- Division
  JOIN #Employees E
    ON OUM.EmployeeId = E.EmployeeId
  JOIN #Branches B
    ON Division.OrgUnitId = B.DivisionID
 WHERE 1=1
   AND OUM.JhaPostingDate = @CurrDay
   AND B.RegionCode IN ('CN','CE','IB','R2') -- Commercial Banking, Business Client Management, Community Banking Region I, Community Banking Region II


----------------------------------------------------------
-- Branch Employees (non managers)
----------------------------------------------------------
--  Security rules:
--  all branch employees with designated job titles should be mapped to their assigned branch(es), if an employee is mapped to multiple branches in the StaffingAssignments table, that will be reflected here as desired

IF OBJECT_ID('Tempdb..#BranchEmployees') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #BranchEmployees

-- relationship managers
SELECT DISTINCT E.Email
      ,E.EmployeeId
      ,'60*&#' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,E.EmployeeId) AS Employee_BK
      ,'60*&#' + E.OrgUnitCode AS Branch_BK
      ,'Community Banking' AS BranchType
      ,'Branch Employees' AS SecurityType
  INTO #BranchEmployees
  FROM #Employees E
 WHERE 1=1
   -- per Jim Craft, should use HRJobCode for job title filtering instead of title name to protect against name changes
   -- Banker I/II/III, Banker Supervisor, Client Relationship Consultant I/II, Community Banker, Community Lending Officer, Small Business Consultant
   AND E.HRJobCode IN ('50088','50089','50090','50093','50044','50092','40081','40258','40253')


----------------------------------------------------------
-- Commercial Relationship Managers
----------------------------------------------------------
--  Security rules:
--  all commercial relationship managers should only be mapped to themselves and therefore can only view clients where they are the designated officer
--  all commercial branch and division managers who have a relationship manager that reports to them should also be mapped to that RM officer to view any clients that aren't in their branch but that their RM owms
--  all commercial branch and division managers should be mapped to themselves to view clients where they are the designated officer

IF OBJECT_ID('Tempdb..#RelationshipManagers') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #RelationshipManagers

-- relationship managers
SELECT DISTINCT E.Email
      ,E.EmployeeId
      ,E.OfficerCode
  INTO #RelationshipManagers
  FROM #Employees E
 WHERE 1=1
   -- per Jim Craft, should use HRJobCode for job title filtering instead of title name to protect against name changes
   -- Commercial Porfolio Manager, Commercial Relationship Manager I, Commercial Relationship Manager II, Mid Market Commercial Relationship Manager, Senior Commercial Relationship Manager
   AND E.HRJobCode IN ('40046','40040','40041','40042','40237') 

-- find all commercial branch and division managers who have a relationship manager that reports to them
IF OBJECT_ID('Tempdb..#BranchDivMgrsWithSubordinateRelationshipMgrs') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #BranchDivMgrsWithSubordinateRelationshipMgrs;

WITH ManagementHierarchyCTE AS (
   SELECT E.EmployeeId
         ,E.FirstName + ' ' + E.LastName AS EmployeeName
         ,E.OfficerCode
         ,E.SupervisorId
         ,0 AS [Level]
         ,E.EmployeeId AS [Branch/Division Manager EmployeeId]
         ,E.OfficerCode AS [Branch/Division Manager OfficerCode]
         ,CAST(E.FirstName + ' ' + E.LastName AS VARCHAR(MAX)) AS Lineage
     FROM #Employees E
     JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT EmployeeId FROM #BranchSecurity WHERE BranchType = 'Commercial') B -- commercial branch/division managers
       ON E.EmployeeId = B.EmployeeId

   UNION ALL

   SELECT E.EmployeeId
         ,E.FirstName + ' ' + E.LastName AS EmployeeName
         ,E.OfficerCode
         ,E.SupervisorId
         ,MH.[Level] + 1
         ,MH.[Branch/Division Manager EmployeeId]
         ,MH.[Branch/Division Manager OfficerCode]
         ,MH.Lineage + ' > ' + CAST(E.FirstName + ' ' + E.LastName AS VARCHAR(MAX))
     FROM #Employees E
     JOIN ManagementHierarchyCTE MH -- subordinates of branch/division managers
       ON E.SupervisorId = MH.EmployeeId
)
SELECT MH.EmployeeId
      ,MH.EmployeeName
      ,MH.OfficerCode
      ,MH.SupervisorId
      ,MH.[Level]
      ,MH.[Branch/Division Manager EmployeeId]
      ,MH.[Branch/Division Manager OfficerCode]
      ,MH.Lineage
  INTO #BranchDivMgrsWithSubordinateRelationshipMgrs
  FROM ManagementHierarchyCTE MH
  JOIN #RelationshipManagers RM -- only pull employees who are relationship managers
    ON MH.EmployeeId = RM.EmployeeId;


-- combine all officer security
IF OBJECT_ID('Tempdb..#OfficerSecurity') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #OfficerSecurity

-- relationship managers mapped to themselves
SELECT DISTINCT RM.Email
      ,'60*&#' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,RM.EmployeeId) AS Employee_BK
      ,'60*&#' + RM.OfficerCode AS Officer_BK -- RMs are mapped to themselves
      ,'Relationship Managers' AS SecurityType
  INTO #OfficerSecurity
  FROM #RelationshipManagers RM
 WHERE 1=1


-- branch/division managers mapped to relationship manager subordinates
INSERT INTO #OfficerSecurity
SELECT DISTINCT E.Email
      ,'60*&#' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,BDM.[Branch/Division Manager EmployeeId]) AS Employee_BK
      ,'60*&#' + BDM.OfficerCode AS Officer_BK -- Branch/Division Mgrs are mapped to the RMs they manage
      ,'Relationship Managers' AS SecurityType
  FROM #BranchDivMgrsWithSubordinateRelationshipMgrs BDM
  JOIN #Employees E
    ON BDM.[Branch/Division Manager EmployeeId] = E.EmployeeId
 WHERE 1=1
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM #OfficerSecurity OS WHERE OS.Employee_BK = '60*&#' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,BDM.[Branch/Division Manager EmployeeId]) AND OS.Officer_BK = '60*&#' + BDM.OfficerCode)


-- branch/division managers mapped to themselves
INSERT INTO #OfficerSecurity
SELECT DISTINCT B.Email
      ,B.Employee_BK AS Employee_BK
      ,B.Officer_BK AS Officer_BK -- Branch/Division Mgrs are mapped to themselves
      ,'Relationship Managers' AS SecurityType
  FROM #BranchSecurity B
 WHERE BranchType = 'Commercial'  -- commercial branch/division managers
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM #OfficerSecurity OS WHERE OS.Employee_BK = B.Employee_BK AND OS.Officer_BK = B.Officer_BK)

----------------------------------------------------------
-- Combine security types to return to DVB
----------------------------------------------------------

SELECT Email AS User_Email
      ,Employee_BK
      ,Branch_BK
      ,BranchType
      ,NULL AS Officer_BK
      ,SecurityType
  FROM #BranchSecurity
UNION
SELECT Email AS User_Email
      ,Employee_BK
      ,Branch_BK
      ,BranchType
      ,NULL AS Officer_BK
      ,SecurityType
  FROM #BranchEmployees
UNION 
SELECT Email AS User_Email
      ,Employee_BK
      ,NULL AS Branch_BK
      ,NULL AS BranchType
      ,Officer_BK
      ,SecurityType
  FROM #OfficerSecurity

sink.preCopyScript:
IF OBJECT_ID('[banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_SecurityData]') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_SecurityData];

CREATE TABLE [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_SecurityData]
(
   [User_Email] [VARCHAR] (500),
   [Employee_BK] [VARCHAR] (50),
   [Branch_BK] [VARCHAR] (50) NULL,
   [BranchType] [VARCHAR] (50) NULL,
   [Officer_BK] [VARCHAR] (50) NULL,
   [SecurityType] [VARCHAR] (50)
)
WITH
(
   DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
   CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)

scripts.text:
----------------------------------------------------------
-- Refresh branch security data
----------------------------------------------------------
   
-- SecurityRoles table - insert all new Branch_BK values
INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityRoles
(
    SecurityGrain
   ,SecurityName
   ,SecurityKey
   ,Active
)
SELECT DISTINCT 'Branch'
      ,'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports'
      ,Branch_BK
      ,1
  FROM [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_SecurityData] SD
 WHERE SecurityType IN ('Branch/Division Managers','Branch Employees')
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM banner_security.SecurityRoles SR WHERE SD.Branch_BK = SR.SecurityKey AND SR.SecurityName = 'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports' AND SR.SecurityGrain = 'Branch');

-- SecurityAssignment table - delete all existing values
DELETE 
  FROM banner_security.SecurityAssignment
 WHERE SecurityName = 'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports'
   AND SecurityGrain = 'Branch';

-- SecurityAssignment table - insert all values
INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityAssignment
(
    [User]
   ,Employee_BK
   ,SecurityGrain
   ,SecurityName
   ,SecurityName_SubType
   ,SecurityKey
   ,Active       
   ,SecurityRoleKey
)
SELECT DISTINCT   
       SD.User_Email
      ,SD.Employee_BK
      ,SR.SecurityGrain
      ,SR.SecurityName
      ,CASE WHEN SD.BranchType = 'Commercial' THEN 'ClientBranch' ELSE 'AccountBranch' END
      ,SR.SecurityKey
      ,1
      ,SR.SecurityRoleKey
  FROM banner_security.SecurityRoles SR
  JOIN [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_SecurityData] SD
    ON SR.SecurityKey = SD.Branch_BK
 WHERE SR.SecurityName = 'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports'
   AND SR.SecurityGrain = 'Branch'
   AND SD.SecurityType IN ('Branch/Division Managers','Branch Employees')
;

----------------------------------------------------------
-- Refresh officer security data
----------------------------------------------------------

-- SecurityRoles table - insert all new Officer_BK values
INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityRoles
(
    SecurityGrain
   ,SecurityName
   ,SecurityKey
   ,Active
)
SELECT DISTINCT 'Officer'
      ,'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports'
      ,Officer_BK
      ,1
  FROM [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_SecurityData] SD
 WHERE SecurityType = 'Relationship Managers'
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM banner_security.SecurityRoles SR WHERE SD.Officer_BK = SR.SecurityKey AND SR.SecurityName = 'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports' AND SR.SecurityGrain = 'Officer');

-- SecurityAssignment table - delete all existing values
DELETE 
  FROM banner_security.SecurityAssignment
 WHERE SecurityName = 'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports'
   AND SecurityGrain = 'Officer';

-- SecurityAssignment table - insert all values
INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityAssignment
(
    [User]
   ,Employee_BK
   ,SecurityGrain
   ,SecurityName
   ,SecurityName_SubType
   ,SecurityKey
   ,Active       
   ,SecurityRoleKey
)
SELECT DISTINCT   
       SD.User_Email
      ,SD.Employee_BK
      ,SR.SecurityGrain
      ,SR.SecurityName
      ,NULL
      ,SR.SecurityKey
      ,1
      ,SR.SecurityRoleKey
  FROM banner_security.SecurityRoles SR
  JOIN [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_SecurityData] SD
    ON SR.SecurityKey = SD.Officer_BK
 WHERE SR.SecurityName = 'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports'
   AND SR.SecurityGrain = 'Officer'
   AND SD.SecurityType = 'Relationship Managers'
;

----------------------------------------------------------
-- Add exceptions not based upon roles/rules - manually maintained in banner_security.SecurityExceptions table
----------------------------------------------------------

-- consume.Officer - get the latest officer details for every officer
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeOfficer') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeOfficer;

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.Officer_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.Officer con
    WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY con.Officer_BK
)
SELECT DISTINCT con.Employee_BK
      ,con.OfficerEmail
  INTO #consumeOfficer
  FROM consume.Officer con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.Officer_BK = le.Officer_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1;

-- SecurityAssignment table - insert all values
INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityAssignment
(
    [User]
   ,Employee_BK
   ,SecurityGrain
   ,SecurityName
   ,SecurityName_SubType
   ,SecurityKey
   ,Active       
   ,SecurityRoleKey
)
SELECT DISTINCT   
       O.OfficerEmail
      ,SE.Employee_BK
      ,SR.SecurityGrain
      ,SE.SecurityName
      ,SE.SecurityName_SubType
      ,SR.SecurityKey
      ,1
      ,SE.SecurityRoleKey
  FROM banner_security.SecurityExceptions SE
  JOIN banner_security.SecurityRoles SR
    ON SE.SecurityRoleKey = SR.SecurityRoleKey
   AND SE.SecurityName = SR.SecurityName
  JOIN #consumeOfficer O
    ON SE.Employee_BK = O.Employee_BK
 WHERE SE.SecurityName = 'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports'
   AND SE.Active = 1
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM banner_security.SecurityAssignment SA 
                    WHERE SA.SecurityName = 'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports' 
                      AND SA.Employee_BK = SE.Employee_BK 
                      AND SA.SecurityGrain = SR.SecurityGrain
                      AND SA.SecurityKey = SR.SecurityKey
                      AND SA.SecurityRoleKey = SE.SecurityRoleKey
                      AND ISNULL(SA.SecurityName_SubType, 'XYZ') = ISNULL(SE.SecurityName_SubType, 'XYZ')
                  )
;

----------------------------------------------------------
-- Designate branch employees in Comments field - for use in Power BI logic
----------------------------------------------------------

UPDATE SA
   SET SA.Comments = 'Branch Employee'
  FROM banner_security.SecurityAssignment AS SA
  JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SD.Employee_BK
          FROM [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_SecurityData] SD
         WHERE SD.SecurityType = 'Branch Employees') AS BE
    ON SA.Employee_BK = BE.Employee_BK
 WHERE SA.SecurityName = 'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports' 
;

scripts.text:
DECLARE @array VARCHAR(MAX);

-- create table to hold user email addresses from JSON
IF OBJECT_ID('[banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_WorkspaceViewerUsers]') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_WorkspaceViewerUsers];

CREATE TABLE [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_WorkspaceViewerUsers]
(
   [emailAddress] [VARCHAR] (8000)
)
WITH
(
   DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
   CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);

-- get array of users
SELECT @array = [value]
  FROM OPENJSON(@APIOutput_JSON)
 WHERE [key] = 'value';

-- get email address of all workspace users with Viewer permissions
INSERT INTO [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_WorkspaceViewerUsers]
SELECT DISTINCT emailAddress
  FROM OPENJSON(@array)
         WITH ( identifier VARCHAR(100) 
               ,displayName VARCHAR(100)
               ,groupUserAccessRight VARCHAR(100)
               ,principalType VARCHAR(100)
               ,emailAddress VARCHAR(100) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS
               )
 WHERE groupUserAccessRight = 'Viewer'
   AND principalType = 'User';

source.sqlReaderQuery:
DECLARE @Env VARCHAR(100) = UPPER(REPLACE(REPLACE(CAST( SERVERPROPERTY( 'ServerName' ) AS VARCHAR(100) ),'ldw-',''),'-synapse',''));

-- find new report users who are not yet granted workspace permissions
IF @Env = 'PROD'
BEGIN
   SELECT DISTINCT SA.[User] AS Val
     FROM banner_security.SecurityAssignment SA
     LEFT JOIN [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_WorkspaceViewerUsers] EW
       ON UPPER(SA.[User]) = UPPER(EW.emailAddress)
    WHERE SA.SecurityName = 'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports'
      AND EW.emailAddress IS NULL;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
   -- restrict just to some internal users as we do not want to add/remove hundreds of users in our dev/test workspaces
   SELECT DISTINCT SA.[User] AS Val
     FROM banner_security.SecurityAssignment SA
     LEFT JOIN [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_WorkspaceViewerUsers] EW
       ON UPPER(SA.[User]) = UPPER(EW.emailAddress)
    WHERE SA.SecurityName = 'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports'
      AND EW.emailAddress IS NULL
      AND UPPER(SA.[User]) IN ('JEN.COUGHLAN@BANNERBANK.COM','STUART.SCHAEFER@BANNERBANK.COM','BRIAN.MITCHELL@BANNERBANK.COM');
END

source.sqlReaderQuery:
DECLARE @Env VARCHAR(100) = UPPER(REPLACE(REPLACE(CAST( SERVERPROPERTY( 'ServerName' ) AS VARCHAR(100) ),'ldw-',''),'-synapse',''));

-- find old workspace users who are no longer in the list of report security users, these users are to be removed
IF @Env = 'PROD'
BEGIN
   WITH ReportSecurityUsers AS (
      SELECT DISTINCT [User]
        FROM banner_security.SecurityAssignment
       WHERE SecurityName = 'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports'
   )
   SELECT DISTINCT EW.emailAddress AS Val
     FROM [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_WorkspaceViewerUsers] EW
     LEFT JOIN ReportSecurityUsers SA
       ON UPPER(EW.emailAddress) = UPPER(SA.[User])
    WHERE SA.[User] IS NULL;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
   -- restrict just to some internal users as we do not want to add/remove hundreds of users in our dev/test workspaces
   WITH ReportSecurityUsers AS (
      SELECT DISTINCT [User]
        FROM banner_security.SecurityAssignment
       WHERE SecurityName = 'ClientIndicatorsPBIReports'
   )
   SELECT DISTINCT EW.emailAddress AS Val
     FROM [banner_reporting].[ClientIndicators_WorkspaceViewerUsers] EW
     LEFT JOIN ReportSecurityUsers SA
       ON UPPER(EW.emailAddress) = UPPER(SA.[User])
    WHERE SA.[User] IS NULL
      AND UPPER(EW.emailAddress) IN ('JEN.COUGHLAN@BANNERBANK.COM','STUART.SCHAEFER@BANNERBANK.COM','BRIAN.MITCHELL@BANNERBANK.COM');
END

source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH
/*
	Description:Return data on outdated and missing statistics. Use this for Index Maintenance
	Source:		https://github.com/ProdataSQL/SynapseTools
				Concept copied from https://github.com/abrahams1/Azure_Synapse_Toolbox/tree/master/SQL_Queries/Statistics 
	History:	12/08/2021 Bob, Created

				7/14/23 DSP updated results to include additional tables, but still prioritize by recommended stats
*/
cmp_summary AS
(
	SELECT tm.object_id, SUM(ps.row_count) cmp_row_count
	, CASE WHEN SUM(ps.row_count) =0 THEN  100 ELSE SQRT(SUM(ps.row_count)) *1000/ SUM(ps.row_count)*100 END AS stats_sample_rate
	, CONVERT(bigint,SQRT(1000 * SUM(ps.row_count)))  AS dynamic_threshold_rows
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_nodes_db_partition_stats ps
		INNER JOIN sys.pdw_nodes_tables nt ON nt.object_id=ps.object_id AND ps.distribution_id=nt.distribution_id 
		INNER JOIN sys.pdw_table_mappings tm ON tm.physical_name=nt.name
	WHERE ps.index_id<2
	GROUP BY tm.object_id

)
, ctl_summary AS
(
	SELECT  t.object_id, s.name [schema_name], t.name table_name,  i.type_desc table_type, dp.distribution_policy_desc distribution_type, SUM(p.rows) ctl_row_count
	FROM sys.schemas s
		INNER JOIN sys.tables t ON t.schema_id=s.schema_id
		INNER JOIN sys.pdw_table_distribution_properties dp ON dp.object_id=t.object_id
		INNER JOIN sys.indexes i ON i.object_id=t.object_id AND i.index_id<2
		INNER JOIN sys.partitions p ON p.object_id=t.object_id AND p.index_id=i.index_id
	GROUP BY t.object_id, s.name, t.name, i.type_desc, dp.distribution_policy_desc
)
, [all_results] AS
(
	SELECT ctl.object_id, ctl.[schema_name], ctl.table_name, ctl.table_type, ctl.distribution_type
		, ctl.ctl_row_count AS stats_row_count, cmp.cmp_row_count AS actual_row_count, CONVERT(decimal(10,2),(ABS(ctl.ctl_row_count - cmp.cmp_row_count)*100.0 / NULLIF(cmp.cmp_row_count,0))) stats_difference_percent
		, CONVERT(int,CASE WHEN cmp.stats_sample_rate < 1 THEN 1 WHEN cmp.stats_sample_rate > 100 THEN 100 ELSE cmp.stats_sample_rate  END ) AS stats_sample_rate
		, cmp.dynamic_threshold_rows
	FROM ctl_summary ctl
		INNER JOIN cmp_summary cmp ON ctl.object_id=cmp.object_id
)

/***************************************************************************************************
	Added by MH - 04/24/2023 for DVB use. 
	We do not want to utilize the SQL command that is provided through this template. - Reason: unkown
	We only want to update tables that are in the datavault/businessobjects_pits schema - Reason: staging/log tables do not need to have stats updated
	We only want to update stats when the recomendation = 1 - Reason: unkown
***************************************************************************************************/

,[refined_results] AS 
(
SELECT [object_id], [schema_name], [table_name], [table_type], [distribution_type], [stats_row_count], [actual_row_count], [stats_difference_percent]
, dynamic_threshold_rows
, [stats_sample_rate]
, CASE WHEN stats_difference_percent >=20  OR ABS([actual_row_count] - [stats_row_count]) > dynamic_threshold_rows THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS recommend_update
,  'UPDATE STATISTICS ' + QUOTENAME([schema_name]) + '.' + QUOTENAME([table_name]) 
	+ COALESCE(CASE WHEN stats_sample_rate  >=100 THEN ' WITH FULLSCAN' ELSE  ' WITH SAMPLE ' + CONVERT(varchar,stats_sample_rate)  + ' PERCENT' END,'') AS sqlCommand
FROM [all_results]
WHERE [schema_name] IN ('datavault', 'businessobjects_pits')
)


SELECT 'UPDATE STATISTICS ['+[schema_name]+'].['+table_name+']' as UpdateStatement
FROM refined_results
--WHERE refined_results.recommend_update = 1
WHERE refined_results.stats_difference_percent > 0
AND refined_results.actual_row_count > 1000
ORDER BY refined_results.recommend_update DESC, refined_results.stats_difference_percent DESC, refined_results.actual_row_count DESC
; -- 7/14/23 DSP include more tables, but still prioritize by recommended update
