content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('[banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData]') IS NOT NULL
   DROP PROCEDURE [banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData];

GO

CREATE PROCEDURE [banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData]
AS
BEGIN

/***************************************************************************************************
   NAME
      [banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData].sql

   AUTHOR
      BANNERBANK\b60JCoughl, Banner Bank

   CREATE DATE
      2023-11-07

   BUSINESS OWNER(S)
      Karen Harrison

   INTENDED USE
      Calculate an Attrition Risk Score for every deposit client based upon defined rules (risk indicators),
      a Power BI report will display this information for the Community/Commercial Banking groups

   INTENDED AUDIENCE
      Community & Commercial Banking

   RELATED ITEC PROJECT
      #3800

   CHANGE LOG
      2023-11-07 Jen Coughlan - First implementation
      2023-12-28 Jen Coughlan - Fix to only include current day account branches in banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData table
      2024-01-16 Jen Coughlan - Remove spaces from column names in consume.Product view

***************************************************************************************************/

-----------------------------
-----------------------------
BEGIN TRY
-----------------------------
-----------------------------

/***************************************************************************************************
****************************************************************************************************
-- Declare variables
****************************************************************************************************
***************************************************************************************************/

DECLARE @TodayDate DATE = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time' -- get current date in PST
       ,@ReportRefreshDateTime DATETIME = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time' -- get current date time in PST
       ,@msg VARCHAR(8000) = ''
       ,@ErrorDescr VARCHAR(8000) = ''

SELECT @msg = 'Execution start time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- determine applicable relative time dates
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OneYear') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OneYear;

SELECT [ActualDate]
  INTO #OneYear      
  FROM consume.DimTime
  WHERE SLProcDayInd = 'Y'
  AND [ActualDate] >= DATEADD(MONTH,-13,@TodayDate) AND [ActualDate] < CAST(@TodayDate AS DATE)

DECLARE @CurrentDate DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear);
DECLARE @PreviousDate DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] < @CurrentDate);
--DECLARE @PreviousWeek DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(WEEK,-1,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @PreviousMonth DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-1,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @TwoMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-2,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @ThreeMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-3,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @FourMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-4,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @SixMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-6,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @SevenMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-7,@CurrentDate));
--DECLARE @PreviousYear DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(YEAR,-1,@CurrentDate));

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- calculate six month average balance per client for different account types
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DepositAverage') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #DepositAverage;

WITH ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths AS (
   SELECT Account.Client_BK
         ,Account.As_Of_Date
         ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) IN ('D','S','T') THEN Account.CurrentBalance
               ELSE 0.00
          END) AS [TotalDepositsDailyBalance]
     FROM consume.Account AS Account
    WHERE Account.As_Of_Date BETWEEN @SevenMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate -- get daily balance for last seven months
      AND UPPER(Account.AccountType)  IN ('D','S','T','L')
      AND ISNULL(Account.StatusCode,'1') NOT IN ('2','8') -- exclude Closed and Chargeoff accounts
 GROUP BY Account.Client_BK
         ,Account.As_Of_Date
)
, Current6MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @SixMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate -- average the last six months from today
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Prior6MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @SevenMonthsAgo AND @PreviousMonth -- average the six months from seven months ago to one month ago (i.e. 6 mo average as of one month ago)
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Current3MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @ThreeMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate -- average the last three months from today
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Prior3MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @FourMonthsAgo AND @PreviousMonth -- average the three months from four months ago to one month ago (i.e. 3 mo average as of one month ago)
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Current2MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @TwoMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate -- average the last two months from today
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Prior2MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @ThreeMonthsAgo AND @PreviousMonth -- average the two months from three months ago to one month ago (i.e. 3 mo average as of one month ago)
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
SELECT C6.Client_BK
      ,C6.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current]
      ,P6.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]
      ,C3.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current]
      ,P3.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]
      ,C2.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current]
      ,P2.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]
  INTO #DepositAverage
  FROM Current6MonthAverage C6
  LEFT JOIN Prior6MonthAverage P6
    ON C6.Client_BK = P6.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN Current3MonthAverage C3
    ON C6.Client_BK = C3.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN Prior3MonthAverage P3
    ON C6.Client_BK = P3.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN Current2MonthAverage C2
    ON C6.Client_BK = C2.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN Prior2MonthAverage P2
    ON C6.Client_BK = P2.Client_BK;


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- get list of clients with Primary Bank Indicator and Tri Score changes
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#IFMProfileScores') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #IFMProfileScores;

WITH ProfileLastTwoMonths AS (
   SELECT TOP 2 As_Of_Date
     FROM marketing.IFM_ClientHouseholdProfile
    GROUP BY As_Of_Date
    ORDER BY As_Of_Date DESC
)
, CurrentData AS (
   SELECT IFM.Client_BK
         ,IFM.As_Of_Date
         ,IFM.PrimaryBankIndicator
         ,IFM.TriScore
     FROM marketing.IFM_ClientHouseholdProfile IFM
     JOIN ProfileLastTwoMonths TM
       ON IFM.As_Of_Date = TM.As_Of_Date
      AND IFM.As_Of_Date = (SELECT MAX(As_Of_Date) FROM ProfileLastTwoMonths)
)
, PriorData AS (
   SELECT IFM.Client_BK
         ,IFM.As_Of_Date
         ,IFM.PrimaryBankIndicator
         ,IFM.TriScore
     FROM marketing.IFM_ClientHouseholdProfile IFM
     JOIN ProfileLastTwoMonths TM
       ON IFM.As_Of_Date = TM.As_Of_Date
      AND IFM.As_Of_Date = (SELECT MIN(As_Of_Date) FROM ProfileLastTwoMonths)
)
SELECT CD.Client_BK
      ,CD.PrimaryBankIndicator AS PrimaryBankIndicator_Current
      ,PD.PrimaryBankIndicator AS PrimaryBankIndicator_Prior
      ,CD.TriScore AS TriScore_Current
      ,PD.TriScore AS TriScore_Prior
  INTO #IFMProfileScores
  FROM CurrentData CD
  JOIN PriorData PD
    ON TRIM(UPPER(CD.Client_BK)) = TRIM(UPPER(PD.Client_BK))


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- get list of clients that have an Earned Income Stop trigger in the last 6 months
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ClientEarnedIncomeStopTriggers') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ClientEarnedIncomeStopTriggers;

SELECT IFM_Triggers.Client_BK
      ,IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate
      ,IFM_Triggers.TriggerType
      ,IFM_Triggers.Establishment
      ,IFM_Triggers.Amount
      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY IFM_Triggers.Client_BK ORDER BY IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate DESC) AS RecordNumber
  INTO #ClientEarnedIncomeStopTriggers
  FROM [marketing].[IFM_ClientEvent] AS IFM_Triggers
 WHERE UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) = 'EARNED INCOME STOP'
   AND IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate BETWEEN @SixMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- get list of clients that have NEW outbound ACH Competitive Transfer triggers in the last 6 months
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ClientACHCompetitiveTransferTriggers') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ClientACHCompetitiveTransferTriggers;
SELECT IFM_Triggers.Client_BK
      ,MAX(IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate) AS LatestTransferDate
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) LIKE '%INVESTMENT%' THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [6MonthACHTransferAmount_Investment]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) LIKE '%BANK%' THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [6MonthACHTransferAmount_Bank]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) LIKE '%NEW%' THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [6MonthACHTransferAmount_New]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) LIKE '%EXISTING%' THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [6MonthACHTransferAmount_Existing]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN TriggerDate BETWEEN @PreviousMonth AND @CurrentDate THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [LastMonthACHTransferAmountTotal]
      ,(SUM(CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount)) / 6) AS [6MonthMonthlyAverage]
  INTO #ClientACHCompetitiveTransferTriggers
  FROM [marketing].[IFM_ClientEvent] AS IFM_Triggers
 WHERE UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) IN ( 'NEW COMPETITIVE BANK TRANSFER'
                                    ,'BUSINESS - NEW COMPETITIVE BANK TRANSFER'
                                    ,'BUSINESS - NEW COMPETITIVE INVESTMENT TRANSFER'
                                    ,'NEW COMPETITIVE INVESTMENT TRANSFER'
                                    ,'EXISTING BANK TRANSFER'
                                    ,'BUSINESS - EXISTING BANK TRANSFER'
                                    ,'BUSINESS - EXISTING INVESTMENT'
                                    ,'EXISTING INVESTMENT'
                                   )
   AND UPPER(IFM_Triggers.CreditDebit) = 'D' -- debits only
   AND IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate BETWEEN @SixMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate
 GROUP BY IFM_Triggers.Client_BK


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build temp tables to hold needed rows from each consume object
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- consume.Account
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeAccount') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeAccount;

SELECT con.Account_Key
      ,con.Account_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.AccountType
      ,con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.Product_Key
      ,con.Product_BK
      ,con.CurrentBalance
  INTO #consumeAccount
  FROM consume.Account con
 WHERE 1=1
   AND con.As_Of_Date IN (@CurrentDate, @PreviousDate, @PreviousMonth, @SixMonthsAgo)
   AND con.AccountType IN ('D','S','T','L')
   AND ISNULL(con.IsTestAccount,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.IsBannerInternalBankUse,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.StatusCode,'1') NOT IN ('2','8')

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Product
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeProduct') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeProduct;

SELECT con.Product_Key
      ,con.Product_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.[Product_Line_Desc]
      ,con.[Product_Desc]
      ,con.ProductTypeCode
  INTO #consumeProduct
  FROM consume.Product con
 WHERE 1=1
   AND con.As_Of_Date IN (@CurrentDate, @PreviousDate, @PreviousMonth, @SixMonthsAgo)

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Client
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeClient') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeClient;

SELECT con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.CIFNumber
      ,con.ClientName
      ,con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.Officer_Key
      ,con.Officer_BK
  INTO #consumeClient
  FROM consume.Client con
 WHERE 1=1
   AND con.As_Of_Date IN (@CurrentDate) -- only need client's current details
   AND ISNULL(con.IsTestClient,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.IsBankInternal,0) <> 1
   AND ISNULL(con.IsDeceased,0) <> 1
   AND ISNULL(UPPER(con.InsiderCode),'') NOT IN ('E','O','D','X') -- exclude employees, officers, directors and executive directors

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Branch - get the latest branch details for every branch
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeBranch') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeBranch;

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.Branch_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.Branch con
    WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY con.Branch_BK
)
SELECT con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.BranchNumber
      ,con.BranchName
      ,con.BranchDivision
  INTO #consumeBranch
  FROM consume.Branch con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.Branch_BK = le.Branch_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Officer - get the latest officer details for every officer
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeOfficer') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeOfficer;

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.Officer_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.Officer con
    WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY con.Officer_BK
)
SELECT con.Officer_Key
      ,con.Officer_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.OfficerFullName
      ,con.OfficerCode
      ,con.DateTerminated
  INTO #consumeOfficer
  FROM consume.Officer con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.Officer_BK = le.Officer_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- get balance and number of accounts totals per client broken out by account category and for different dates
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ClientAccountCategoryTotals') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ClientAccountCategoryTotals;

WITH AccountBalances AS (
SELECT CONVERT(DATE, Account.As_Of_Date) AS As_Of_Date
      ,CASE 
	      WHEN @CurrentDate = Account.As_Of_Date THEN 'CurrentDay'
	      WHEN @PreviousDate = Account.As_Of_Date THEN 'PriorDay'
	      WHEN @PreviousMonth = Account.As_Of_Date THEN 'PriorMonth'
	      WHEN @SixMonthsAgo = Account.As_Of_Date THEN 'SixMonthsAgo'
         ELSE 'Other'
       END AS DateDescription
      ,@TodayDate AS TodayDate
      ,@ReportRefreshDateTime AS ReportRefreshDateTime
      ,@CurrentDate AS MaxDataDate
      ,CASE WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'T' THEN 'CDs'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'L' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'QUICKSTEP LOANS' THEN 'QuickStep Loans'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'L' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'COMMERCIAL LOANS' THEN 'Commercial Loans'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'L' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'CONSUMER LOANS' THEN 'Consumer Loans'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'S' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'COMMERCIAL DEPOSITS' THEN 'Commercial Savings'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'S' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'CONSUMER DEPOSITS' THEN 'Consumer Savings'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'D' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'COMMERCIAL DEPOSITS' AND (TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) LIKE '%CHECKING%' OR TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) LIKE '%CKG%') THEN 'Commercial Checking'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'D' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'COMMERCIAL DEPOSITS' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) NOT LIKE '%CHECKING%' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) NOT LIKE '%CKG%' THEN 'Commercial Other Deposits'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'D' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'CONSUMER DEPOSITS' AND (TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) LIKE '%CHECKING%' OR TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) LIKE '%CKG%') THEN 'Consumer Checking'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'D' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'CONSUMER DEPOSITS' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) NOT LIKE '%CHECKING%' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) NOT LIKE '%CKG%' THEN 'Consumer Other Deposits'
            ELSE 'Other'
       END AS AccountCategory
      ,Account.CurrentBalance AS Balance
      ,1 AS NumberOfAccounts
      ,Account.Client_BK
      ,Product.ProductTypeCode
  FROM #consumeAccount AS Account
  JOIN #consumeProduct AS Product
    ON Account.Product_Key = Product.Product_Key
 WHERE 1=1
)
SELECT As_Of_Date
      ,DateDescription
      ,TodayDate
      ,ReportRefreshDateTime
      ,MaxDataDate
      ,Client_BK
      ,COUNT(DISTINCT ProductTypeCode) AS [#ofProducts]
      -- balances
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN AccountCategory IN ('Commercial Checking','Consumer Checking','CDs','Commercial Savings','Consumer Savings','Commercial Other Deposits','Consumer Other Deposits') THEN Balance ELSE 0.00 END) AS [Balance_DepositsTotal]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN AccountCategory IN ('QuickStep Loans','Commercial Loans','Consumer Loans') THEN Balance ELSE 0.00 END) AS [Balance_LoanTotal]
      -- number of accounts
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN AccountCategory IN ('Commercial Checking','Consumer Checking','CDs','Commercial Savings','Consumer Savings','Commercial Other Deposits','Consumer Other Deposits') THEN NumberOfAccounts ELSE 0 END) AS [#ofAccts_DepositsTotal]
  INTO #ClientAccountCategoryTotals
  FROM AccountBalances
 GROUP BY As_Of_Date
         ,DateDescription
         ,TodayDate
         ,ReportRefreshDateTime
         ,MaxDataDate
         ,Client_BK
;

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build concatenated list of account branch names for every client
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AccountBranchesByClient') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #AccountBranchesByClient;

SELECT A.Client_BK
      ,CASE WHEN UPPER(RIGHT(B.BranchName, 6)) = 'BRANCH' THEN SUBSTRING(B.BranchName, 1, LEN(B.BranchName) - 6) ELSE B.BranchName END + ' (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.BranchNumber) + ')' AS BranchName
  INTO #AccountBranchesByClient
  FROM #consumeAccount A
  JOIN #consumeBranch B
    ON A.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
 WHERE A.As_Of_Date = @CurrentDate
 GROUP BY A.Client_BK
      ,CASE WHEN UPPER(RIGHT(B.BranchName, 6)) = 'BRANCH' THEN SUBSTRING(B.BranchName, 1, LEN(B.BranchName) - 6) ELSE B.BranchName END + ' (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.BranchNumber) + ')'


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ConcatenatedAccountBranchesByClient') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ConcatenatedAccountBranchesByClient;

SELECT A.Client_BK
      ,STRING_AGG(A.BranchName, '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A.BranchName ASC) AS [Account Branch List]
  INTO #ConcatenatedAccountBranchesByClient
  FROM #AccountBranchesByClient A
 GROUP BY A.Client_BK


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- pull final client list
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ClientList') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ClientList;

WITH PriorMonthClientDepositAccountTotal AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,SUM(#ofAccts_DepositsTotal) AS #ofAccts_DepositsTotal
     FROM #ClientAccountCategoryTotals
    WHERE DateDescription = 'PriorMonth' -- account totals as of one month ago
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, ActiveClientListSixMonthsAgo AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
     FROM #ClientAccountCategoryTotals
    WHERE DateDescription = 'SixMonthsAgo'
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
SELECT CT.As_Of_Date
      ,CT.TodayDate
      ,CT.ReportRefreshDateTime
      ,CT.MaxDataDate
      ,CT.Client_BK
      ,TRIM(UPPER(Client.CIFNumber)) AS CIF
      ,Client.ClientName
      ,COALESCE(O.Officer_BK, 'Unknown') AS Officer_BK
      ,COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'No Current Officer Assigned (XXX)') AS [Officer]
      ,Client.Branch_BK AS [Client Branch_BK]
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown') AS [Client Branch Number]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown') AS [Client Branch Name]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') AS [Client Branch Division]
      ,ABC.[Account Branch List]
      ,CT.Balance_DepositsTotal
      ,CT.Balance_LoanTotal
      ,CT.#ofAccts_DepositsTotal
      ,CT.#ofProducts
      ,CASE WHEN CT.[#ofProducts] = 1 THEN 'Yes'
            ELSE NULL
       END AS [Indicator_SingleProductOnlyClient]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior],0.00) <> 0.00 AND ((ISNULL(DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current],0.00) - DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) / DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) <= -0.20 THEN 'Yes' 
            ELSE NULL 
       END AS [Indicator_ReductionFrom6MoAvgBalance]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(DA.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior],0.00) <> 0.00 AND ((ISNULL(DA.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current],0.00) - DA.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) / DA.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) <= -0.20 THEN 'Yes' 
            ELSE NULL 
       END AS [Indicator_ReductionFrom3MoAvgBalance]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(DA.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior],0.00) <> 0.00 AND ((ISNULL(DA.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current],0.00) - DA.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) / DA.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) <= -0.20 THEN 'Yes' 
            ELSE NULL 
       END AS [Indicator_ReductionFrom2MoAvgBalance]
      ,CASE WHEN CT.[#ofAccts_DepositsTotal] - ISNULL(PM.[#ofAccts_DepositsTotal],0) < 0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE NULL END AS [Indicator_DepositAccountClosures]
      ,AccountCountChange_DepositsTotal_PriorMonth = CT.[#ofAccts_DepositsTotal] - ISNULL(PM.[#ofAccts_DepositsTotal],0)
      ,ISNULL(DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current],0.00) AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
      ,CASE WHEN EIS.Client_BK IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE NULL END AS [Indicator_EarnedIncomeStop]
      ,EIS.TriggerDate AS [EarnedIncomeStop_Date]
      ,EIS.Establishment AS [EarnedIncomeStop_Establishment]
      ,EIS.Amount AS [EarnedIncomeStop_Amount]
      ,CASE WHEN ACH.Client_BK IS NOT NULL AND ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_New] <> 0.00 THEN 'Yes' ELSE NULL END AS [Indicator_ACHCompetitiveTransfer_New]
      ,CASE WHEN ACH.Client_BK IS NOT NULL AND ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_Existing] <> 0.00 THEN 'Yes' ELSE NULL END AS [Indicator_ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Existing]
      ,ACH.LatestTransferDate AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Date]
      ,ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_New] AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_New_Amount]
      ,ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_Existing] AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Existing_Amount]
      ,ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_Bank] AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Bank_Amount]
      ,ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_Investment] AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Investment_Amount]
      ,CASE WHEN ACH.Client_BK IS NOT NULL AND ACH.[6MonthMonthlyAverage] <> 0.00 AND (ACH.LastMonthACHTransferAmountTotal / ACH.[6MonthMonthlyAverage]) >= 1.25 THEN 'Yes' 
            ELSE NULL 
       END AS [Indicator_IncreasedACHTransfers]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(IFMP.PrimaryBankIndicator_Current,0) < ISNULL(IFMP.PrimaryBankIndicator_Prior,0) THEN 'Yes'
            ELSE NULL
       END AS [Indicator_PrimaryBankIndicatorDecrease]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(IFMP.TriScore_Current,0) > ISNULL(IFMP.TriScore_Prior,0) THEN 'Yes'
            ELSE NULL
       END AS [Indicator_TransferRiskIndexIncrease]
      ,CASE WHEN CL6.Client_BK IS NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS IsNewClient
  INTO #ClientList
  FROM #ClientAccountCategoryTotals CT
  JOIN #consumeClient Client -- pull current client details
    ON CT.Client_BK = Client.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeOfficer O
    ON Client.Officer_BK = O.Officer_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeBranch B -- pull in client branch details
    ON Client.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
  LEFT JOIN PriorMonthClientDepositAccountTotal PM
    ON CT.Client_BK = PM.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #DepositAverage DA
    ON CT.Client_BK = DA.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #IFMProfileScores IFMP
    ON CT.Client_BK = IFMP.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #ClientEarnedIncomeStopTriggers EIS
    ON CT.Client_BK = EIS.Client_BK
   AND EIS.RecordNumber = 1 -- only pull latest Earned Income Stop trigger details
  LEFT JOIN #ClientACHCompetitiveTransferTriggers ACH
    ON CT.Client_BK = ACH.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN ActiveClientListSixMonthsAgo CL6
    ON CT.Client_BK = CL6.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #ConcatenatedAccountBranchesByClient ABC
    ON CT.Client_BK = ABC.Client_BK
 WHERE CT.DateDescription = 'CurrentDay' -- pull current client balances, etc.

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- put clients and calculate their attrition risk score into final table for PBI report to connect to
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData;

SELECT CL.*
      ,AttritionRiskScore = 
           CASE WHEN [Indicator_SingleProductOnlyClient] = 'Yes' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END -- high alert
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ReductionFrom6MoAvgBalance] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ReductionFrom3MoAvgBalance] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ReductionFrom2MoAvgBalance] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_DepositAccountClosures] = 'Yes' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END -- high alert
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_EarnedIncomeStop] = 'Yes' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END -- high alert
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ACHCompetitiveTransfer_New] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Existing] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_IncreasedACHTransfers] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_PrimaryBankIndicatorDecrease] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_TransferRiskIndexIncrease] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
  INTO banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData
  FROM #ClientList CL

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build table of all account branches per Client + add concatenated list of account branch names to the clients, PBI report will use for account branch filtering
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData;

SELECT A.Client_BK
      ,A.Branch_BK AS [Account Branch_BK]
      ,B.BranchNumber AS [Account Branch Number]
      ,B.BranchName AS [Account Branch Name]
      ,B.BranchDivision AS [Account Branch Division]
      ,ABC.[Account Branch List]
  INTO banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData
  FROM #consumeAccount A
  JOIN #consumeBranch B
    ON A.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
  JOIN banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData ABC
    ON A.Client_BK = ABC.Client_BK
 WHERE A.As_Of_Date = @CurrentDate
 GROUP BY A.Client_BK
      ,A.Branch_BK
      ,B.BranchNumber
      ,B.BranchName
      ,B.BranchDivision
      ,ABC.[Account Branch List]

/******************************************************************
SELECT TOP 1000 *
FROM banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData

SELECT TOP 1000 *
FROM banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData
*******************************************************************/

-------------------------------
-------------------------------
END TRY
-------------------------------
-------------------------------


-------------------------------
-------------------------------
BEGIN CATCH
-------------------------------
-------------------------------
   IF @@trancount > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION

   SELECT @ErrorDescr = 'Error: '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(500),ISNULL(ERROR_NUMBER(),'NULL'))
                      +', Severity = '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(500),ISNULL(ERROR_SEVERITY(),'NULL'))

                      +', Procedure = '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(500),ISNULL(ERROR_PROCEDURE(),'NULL'))

                      +', SP Defined Error Text = '+@ErrorDescr

   RAISERROR(@ErrorDescr,18,127) WITH NOWAIT

;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('[banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData]') IS NOT NULL
   DROP PROCEDURE [banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData];

GO

-- EXECUTE [banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData]

CREATE PROCEDURE [banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData]
AS
BEGIN

/***************************************************************************************************
   NAME
      [banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData].sql

   AUTHOR
      BANNERBANK\b60JCoughl, Banner Bank

   CREATE DATE
      2023-11-07

   BUSINESS OWNER(S)
      Karen Harrison

   INTENDED USE
      Calculate an Attrition Risk Score for every deposit client based upon defined rules (risk indicators),
      a Power BI report will display this information for the Community/Commercial Banking groups

   INTENDED AUDIENCE
      Community & Commercial Banking

   RELATED ITEC PROJECT
      #3800

   CHANGE LOG
      2023-11-07 Jen Coughlan - First implementation
      2023-12-28 Jen Coughlan - Fix to only include current day account branches in banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData table
      2024-01-16 Jen Coughlan - Remove spaces from column names in consume.Product view
      2024-02-02 Jen Coughlan - Add Commercial Relationship Group to dataset
      2024-04-04 Jen Coughlan - Added AccountType to ProductTypeCode when counting distinct products per client

***************************************************************************************************/

-----------------------------
-----------------------------
BEGIN TRY
-----------------------------
-----------------------------

/***************************************************************************************************
****************************************************************************************************
-- Declare variables
****************************************************************************************************
***************************************************************************************************/

DECLARE @TodayDate DATE = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time' -- get current date in PST
       ,@ReportRefreshDateTime DATETIME = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time' -- get current date time in PST
       ,@msg VARCHAR(8000) = ''
       ,@ErrorDescr VARCHAR(8000) = ''

SELECT @msg = 'Execution start time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- determine applicable relative time dates
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OneYear') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OneYear;

SELECT [ActualDate]
  INTO #OneYear      
  FROM consume.DimTime
  WHERE SLProcDayInd = 'Y'
  AND [ActualDate] >= DATEADD(MONTH,-13,@TodayDate) AND [ActualDate] < CAST(@TodayDate AS DATE)

DECLARE @CurrentDate DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear);
DECLARE @PreviousDate DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] < @CurrentDate);
--DECLARE @PreviousWeek DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(WEEK,-1,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @PreviousMonth DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-1,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @TwoMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-2,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @ThreeMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-3,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @FourMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-4,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @SixMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-6,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @SevenMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-7,@CurrentDate));
--DECLARE @PreviousYear DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(YEAR,-1,@CurrentDate));

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- calculate six month average balance per client for different account types
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DepositAverage') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #DepositAverage;

WITH ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths AS (
   SELECT Account.Client_BK
         ,Account.As_Of_Date
         ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) IN ('D','S','T') THEN Account.CurrentBalance
               ELSE 0.00
          END) AS [TotalDepositsDailyBalance]
     FROM consume.Account AS Account
    WHERE Account.As_Of_Date BETWEEN @SevenMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate -- get daily balance for last seven months
      AND UPPER(Account.AccountType)  IN ('D','S','T','L')
      AND ISNULL(Account.StatusCode,'1') NOT IN ('2','8') -- exclude Closed and Chargeoff accounts
 GROUP BY Account.Client_BK
         ,Account.As_Of_Date
)
, Current6MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @SixMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate -- average the last six months from today
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Prior6MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @SevenMonthsAgo AND @PreviousMonth -- average the six months from seven months ago to one month ago (i.e. 6 mo average as of one month ago)
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Current3MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @ThreeMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate -- average the last three months from today
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Prior3MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @FourMonthsAgo AND @PreviousMonth -- average the three months from four months ago to one month ago (i.e. 3 mo average as of one month ago)
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Current2MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @TwoMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate -- average the last two months from today
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Prior2MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @ThreeMonthsAgo AND @PreviousMonth -- average the two months from three months ago to one month ago (i.e. 3 mo average as of one month ago)
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
SELECT C6.Client_BK
      ,C6.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current]
      ,P6.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]
      ,C3.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current]
      ,P3.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]
      ,C2.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current]
      ,P2.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]
  INTO #DepositAverage
  FROM Current6MonthAverage C6
  LEFT JOIN Prior6MonthAverage P6
    ON C6.Client_BK = P6.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN Current3MonthAverage C3
    ON C6.Client_BK = C3.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN Prior3MonthAverage P3
    ON C6.Client_BK = P3.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN Current2MonthAverage C2
    ON C6.Client_BK = C2.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN Prior2MonthAverage P2
    ON C6.Client_BK = P2.Client_BK;


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- get list of clients with Primary Bank Indicator and Tri Score changes
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#IFMProfileScores') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #IFMProfileScores;

WITH ProfileLastTwoMonths AS (
   SELECT TOP 2 As_Of_Date
     FROM marketing.IFM_ClientHouseholdProfile
    GROUP BY As_Of_Date
    ORDER BY As_Of_Date DESC
)
, CurrentData AS (
   SELECT IFM.Client_BK
         ,IFM.As_Of_Date
         ,IFM.PrimaryBankIndicator
         ,IFM.TriScore
     FROM marketing.IFM_ClientHouseholdProfile IFM
     JOIN ProfileLastTwoMonths TM
       ON IFM.As_Of_Date = TM.As_Of_Date
      AND IFM.As_Of_Date = (SELECT MAX(As_Of_Date) FROM ProfileLastTwoMonths)
)
, PriorData AS (
   SELECT IFM.Client_BK
         ,IFM.As_Of_Date
         ,IFM.PrimaryBankIndicator
         ,IFM.TriScore
     FROM marketing.IFM_ClientHouseholdProfile IFM
     JOIN ProfileLastTwoMonths TM
       ON IFM.As_Of_Date = TM.As_Of_Date
      AND IFM.As_Of_Date = (SELECT MIN(As_Of_Date) FROM ProfileLastTwoMonths)
)
SELECT CD.Client_BK
      ,CD.PrimaryBankIndicator AS PrimaryBankIndicator_Current
      ,PD.PrimaryBankIndicator AS PrimaryBankIndicator_Prior
      ,CD.TriScore AS TriScore_Current
      ,PD.TriScore AS TriScore_Prior
  INTO #IFMProfileScores
  FROM CurrentData CD
  JOIN PriorData PD
    ON TRIM(UPPER(CD.Client_BK)) = TRIM(UPPER(PD.Client_BK))


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- get list of clients that have an Earned Income Stop trigger in the last 6 months
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ClientEarnedIncomeStopTriggers') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ClientEarnedIncomeStopTriggers;

SELECT IFM_Triggers.Client_BK
      ,IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate
      ,IFM_Triggers.TriggerType
      ,IFM_Triggers.Establishment
      ,IFM_Triggers.Amount
      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY IFM_Triggers.Client_BK ORDER BY IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate DESC) AS RecordNumber
  INTO #ClientEarnedIncomeStopTriggers
  FROM [marketing].[IFM_ClientEvent] AS IFM_Triggers
 WHERE UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) = 'EARNED INCOME STOP'
   AND IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate BETWEEN @SixMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- get list of clients that have NEW outbound ACH Competitive Transfer triggers in the last 6 months
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ClientACHCompetitiveTransferTriggers') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ClientACHCompetitiveTransferTriggers;
SELECT IFM_Triggers.Client_BK
      ,MAX(IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate) AS LatestTransferDate
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) LIKE '%INVESTMENT%' THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [6MonthACHTransferAmount_Investment]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) LIKE '%BANK%' THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [6MonthACHTransferAmount_Bank]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) LIKE '%NEW%' THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [6MonthACHTransferAmount_New]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) LIKE '%EXISTING%' THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [6MonthACHTransferAmount_Existing]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN TriggerDate BETWEEN @PreviousMonth AND @CurrentDate THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [LastMonthACHTransferAmountTotal]
      ,(SUM(CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount)) / 6) AS [6MonthMonthlyAverage]
  INTO #ClientACHCompetitiveTransferTriggers
  FROM [marketing].[IFM_ClientEvent] AS IFM_Triggers
 WHERE UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) IN ( 'NEW COMPETITIVE BANK TRANSFER'
                                    ,'BUSINESS - NEW COMPETITIVE BANK TRANSFER'
                                    ,'BUSINESS - NEW COMPETITIVE INVESTMENT TRANSFER'
                                    ,'NEW COMPETITIVE INVESTMENT TRANSFER'
                                    ,'EXISTING BANK TRANSFER'
                                    ,'BUSINESS - EXISTING BANK TRANSFER'
                                    ,'BUSINESS - EXISTING INVESTMENT'
                                    ,'EXISTING INVESTMENT'
                                   )
   AND UPPER(IFM_Triggers.CreditDebit) = 'D' -- debits only
   AND IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate BETWEEN @SixMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate
 GROUP BY IFM_Triggers.Client_BK


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build temp tables to hold needed rows from each consume object

-- consume.Account
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeAccount') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeAccount;

SELECT con.Account_Key
      ,con.Account_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.AccountType
      ,con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.Product_Key
      ,con.Product_BK
      ,con.CurrentBalance
  INTO #consumeAccount
  FROM consume.Account con
 WHERE 1=1
   AND con.As_Of_Date IN (@CurrentDate, @PreviousDate, @PreviousMonth, @SixMonthsAgo)
   AND con.AccountType IN ('D','S','T','L')
   AND ISNULL(con.IsTestAccount,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.IsBannerInternalBankUse,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.StatusCode,'1') NOT IN ('2','8')

-- consume.Client
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeClient') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeClient;

SELECT con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.CIFNumber
      ,con.ClientName
      ,con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.Officer_Key

 WHERE 1=1

   AND ISNULL(UPPER(con.InsiderCode),'') NOT IN ('E','O','D','X') -- exclude employees, officers, directors and executive directors

-- consume.Branch - get the latest branch details for every branch
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeBranch') IS NOT NULL

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.Branch_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.Branch con

 GROUP BY con.Branch_BK
)

  FROM consume.Branch con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.Branch_BK = le.Branch_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- get balance and number of accounts totals per client broken out by account category and for different dates
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ClientAccountCategoryTotals') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ClientAccountCategoryTotals;

WITH AccountBalances AS (
SELECT CONVERT(DATE, Account.As_Of_Date) AS As_Of_Date
      ,CASE 
	      WHEN @CurrentDate = Account.As_Of_Date THEN 'CurrentDay'
	      WHEN @PreviousDate = Account.As_Of_Date THEN 'PriorDay'
	      WHEN @PreviousMonth = Account.As_Of_Date THEN 'PriorMonth'
	      WHEN @SixMonthsAgo = Account.As_Of_Date THEN 'SixMonthsAgo'
         ELSE 'Other'
       END AS DateDescription
      ,@TodayDate AS TodayDate
      ,@ReportRefreshDateTime AS ReportRefreshDateTime
      ,@CurrentDate AS MaxDataDate
      ,CASE WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'T' THEN 'CDs'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'L' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'QUICKSTEP LOANS' THEN 'QuickStep Loans'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'L' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'COMMERCIAL LOANS' THEN 'Commercial Loans'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'L' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'CONSUMER LOANS' THEN 'Consumer Loans'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'S' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'COMMERCIAL DEPOSITS' THEN 'Commercial Savings'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'S' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'CONSUMER DEPOSITS' THEN 'Consumer Savings'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'D' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'COMMERCIAL DEPOSITS' AND (TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) LIKE '%CHECKING%' OR TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) LIKE '%CKG%') THEN 'Commercial Checking'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'D' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'COMMERCIAL DEPOSITS' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) NOT LIKE '%CHECKING%' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) NOT LIKE '%CKG%' THEN 'Commercial Other Deposits'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'D' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'CONSUMER DEPOSITS' AND (TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) LIKE '%CHECKING%' OR TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) LIKE '%CKG%') THEN 'Consumer Checking'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'D' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'CONSUMER DEPOSITS' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) NOT LIKE '%CHECKING%' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) NOT LIKE '%CKG%' THEN 'Consumer Other Deposits'
            ELSE 'Other'
       END AS AccountCategory
      ,Account.CurrentBalance AS Balance
      ,1 AS NumberOfAccounts
      ,Account.Client_BK
      ,CONCAT(UPPER(Product.ProductTypeCode),'|',UPPER(Account.AccountType)) AS ProductTypeCode -- some ProductTypeCodes (AB) are re-used across AccountTypes for deposits and loans, need to concatenate to accurately distinguish
  FROM #consumeAccount AS Account
  JOIN #consumeProduct AS Product
    ON Account.Product_Key = Product.Product_Key
 WHERE 1=1
)
SELECT As_Of_Date
      ,DateDescription
      ,TodayDate
      ,ReportRefreshDateTime
      ,MaxDataDate
      ,Client_BK
      ,COUNT(DISTINCT ProductTypeCode) AS [#ofProducts]
      -- balances
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN AccountCategory IN ('Commercial Checking','Consumer Checking','CDs','Commercial Savings','Consumer Savings','Commercial Other Deposits','Consumer Other Deposits') THEN Balance ELSE 0.00 END) AS [Balance_DepositsTotal]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN AccountCategory IN ('QuickStep Loans','Commercial Loans','Consumer Loans') THEN Balance ELSE 0.00 END) AS [Balance_LoanTotal]
      -- number of accounts
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN AccountCategory IN ('Commercial Checking','Consumer Checking','CDs','Commercial Savings','Consumer Savings','Commercial Other Deposits','Consumer Other Deposits') THEN NumberOfAccounts ELSE 0 END) AS [#ofAccts_DepositsTotal]
  INTO #ClientAccountCategoryTotals
  FROM AccountBalances
 GROUP BY As_Of_Date
         ,DateDescription
         ,TodayDate
         ,ReportRefreshDateTime
         ,MaxDataDate
         ,Client_BK
;

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build concatenated list of account branch names for every client
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AccountBranchesByClient') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #AccountBranchesByClient;

SELECT A.Client_BK
      ,CASE WHEN UPPER(RIGHT(B.BranchName, 6)) = 'BRANCH' THEN SUBSTRING(B.BranchName, 1, LEN(B.BranchName) - 6) ELSE B.BranchName END + ' (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.BranchNumber) + ')' AS BranchName
  INTO #AccountBranchesByClient
  FROM #consumeAccount A
  JOIN #consumeBranch B
    ON A.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
 WHERE A.As_Of_Date = @CurrentDate
 GROUP BY A.Client_BK
      ,CASE WHEN UPPER(RIGHT(B.BranchName, 6)) = 'BRANCH' THEN SUBSTRING(B.BranchName, 1, LEN(B.BranchName) - 6) ELSE B.BranchName END + ' (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.BranchNumber) + ')'


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ConcatenatedAccountBranchesByClient') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ConcatenatedAccountBranchesByClient;

SELECT A.Client_BK
      ,STRING_AGG(A.BranchName, '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A.BranchName ASC) AS [Account Branch List]
  INTO #ConcatenatedAccountBranchesByClient
  FROM #AccountBranchesByClient A
 GROUP BY A.Client_BK


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- pull final client list
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ClientList') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ClientList;

WITH PriorMonthClientDepositAccountTotal AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,SUM(#ofAccts_DepositsTotal) AS #ofAccts_DepositsTotal
     FROM #ClientAccountCategoryTotals
    WHERE DateDescription = 'PriorMonth' -- account totals as of one month ago
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, ActiveClientListSixMonthsAgo AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
     FROM #ClientAccountCategoryTotals
    WHERE DateDescription = 'SixMonthsAgo'
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
SELECT CT.As_Of_Date
      ,CT.TodayDate
      ,CT.ReportRefreshDateTime
      ,CT.MaxDataDate
      ,CT.Client_BK
      ,TRIM(UPPER(Client.CIFNumber)) AS CIF
      ,Client.ClientName
      ,COALESCE(O.Officer_BK, 'Unknown') AS Officer_BK
      ,COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'No Current Officer Assigned (XXX)') AS [Officer]
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(15),RG.RelatedGroupNumber), '') AS RelationshipGroupNumber
      ,COALESCE(RG.RelatedGroupDesc, '') AS RelationshipGroupName
      ,Client.Branch_BK AS [Client Branch_BK]
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown') AS [Client Branch Number]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown') AS [Client Branch Name]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') AS [Client Branch Division]
      ,ABC.[Account Branch List]
      ,CT.Balance_DepositsTotal
      ,CT.Balance_LoanTotal
      ,CT.#ofAccts_DepositsTotal
      ,CT.#ofProducts
      ,CASE WHEN CT.[#ofProducts] = 1 THEN 'Yes'
            ELSE NULL
       END AS [Indicator_SingleProductOnlyClient]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior],0.00) <> 0.00 AND ((ISNULL(DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current],0.00) - DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) / DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) <= -0.20 THEN 'Yes' 
            ELSE NULL 
       END AS [Indicator_ReductionFrom6MoAvgBalance]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(DA.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior],0.00) <> 0.00 AND ((ISNULL(DA.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current],0.00) - DA.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) / DA.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) <= -0.20 THEN 'Yes' 
            ELSE NULL 
       END AS [Indicator_ReductionFrom3MoAvgBalance]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(DA.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior],0.00) <> 0.00 AND ((ISNULL(DA.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current],0.00) - DA.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) / DA.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) <= -0.20 THEN 'Yes' 
            ELSE NULL 
       END AS [Indicator_ReductionFrom2MoAvgBalance]
      ,CASE WHEN CT.[#ofAccts_DepositsTotal] - ISNULL(PM.[#ofAccts_DepositsTotal],0) < 0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE NULL END AS [Indicator_DepositAccountClosures]
      ,AccountCountChange_DepositsTotal_PriorMonth = CT.[#ofAccts_DepositsTotal] - ISNULL(PM.[#ofAccts_DepositsTotal],0)
      ,ISNULL(DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current],0.00) AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
      ,CASE WHEN EIS.Client_BK IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE NULL END AS [Indicator_EarnedIncomeStop]
      ,EIS.TriggerDate AS [EarnedIncomeStop_Date]
      ,EIS.Establishment AS [EarnedIncomeStop_Establishment]
      ,EIS.Amount AS [EarnedIncomeStop_Amount]
      ,CASE WHEN ACH.Client_BK IS NOT NULL AND ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_New] <> 0.00 THEN 'Yes' ELSE NULL END AS [Indicator_ACHCompetitiveTransfer_New]
      ,CASE WHEN ACH.Client_BK IS NOT NULL AND ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_Existing] <> 0.00 THEN 'Yes' ELSE NULL END AS [Indicator_ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Existing]
      ,ACH.LatestTransferDate AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Date]
      ,ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_New] AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_New_Amount]
      ,ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_Existing] AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Existing_Amount]
      ,ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_Bank] AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Bank_Amount]
      ,ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_Investment] AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Investment_Amount]
      ,CASE WHEN ACH.Client_BK IS NOT NULL AND ACH.[6MonthMonthlyAverage] <> 0.00 AND (ACH.LastMonthACHTransferAmountTotal / ACH.[6MonthMonthlyAverage]) >= 1.25 THEN 'Yes' 
            ELSE NULL 
       END AS [Indicator_IncreasedACHTransfers]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(IFMP.PrimaryBankIndicator_Current,0) < ISNULL(IFMP.PrimaryBankIndicator_Prior,0) THEN 'Yes'
            ELSE NULL
       END AS [Indicator_PrimaryBankIndicatorDecrease]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(IFMP.TriScore_Current,0) > ISNULL(IFMP.TriScore_Prior,0) THEN 'Yes'
            ELSE NULL
       END AS [Indicator_TransferRiskIndexIncrease]
      ,CASE WHEN CL6.Client_BK IS NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS IsNewClient
  INTO #ClientList
  FROM #ClientAccountCategoryTotals CT
  JOIN #consumeClient Client -- pull current client details
    ON CT.Client_BK = Client.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeOfficer O
    ON Client.Officer_BK = O.Officer_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeBranch B -- pull in client branch details
    ON Client.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClientRelationshipGroup CRG -- pull current RelationshipGroup mapping per client
    ON Client.Client_BK = CRG.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeRelationshipGroup RG -- pull current RelationshipGroup details per RG
    ON ISNULL(CRG.RelationshipGroup_BK,'ABCXYZ') = RG.RelationshipGroup_BK
  LEFT JOIN PriorMonthClientDepositAccountTotal PM
    ON CT.Client_BK = PM.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #DepositAverage DA
    ON CT.Client_BK = DA.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #IFMProfileScores IFMP
    ON CT.Client_BK = IFMP.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #ClientEarnedIncomeStopTriggers EIS
    ON CT.Client_BK = EIS.Client_BK
   AND EIS.RecordNumber = 1 -- only pull latest Earned Income Stop trigger details
  LEFT JOIN #ClientACHCompetitiveTransferTriggers ACH
    ON CT.Client_BK = ACH.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN ActiveClientListSixMonthsAgo CL6
    ON CT.Client_BK = CL6.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #ConcatenatedAccountBranchesByClient ABC
    ON CT.Client_BK = ABC.Client_BK
 WHERE CT.DateDescription = 'CurrentDay' -- pull current client balances, etc.

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- put clients and calculate their attrition risk score into final table for PBI report to connect to
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData;

SELECT CL.*
      ,AttritionRiskScore = 
           CASE WHEN [Indicator_SingleProductOnlyClient] = 'Yes' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END -- high alert
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ReductionFrom6MoAvgBalance] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ReductionFrom3MoAvgBalance] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ReductionFrom2MoAvgBalance] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_DepositAccountClosures] = 'Yes' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END -- high alert
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_EarnedIncomeStop] = 'Yes' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END -- high alert
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ACHCompetitiveTransfer_New] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Existing] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_IncreasedACHTransfers] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_PrimaryBankIndicatorDecrease] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_TransferRiskIndexIncrease] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
  INTO banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData
  FROM #ClientList CL

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build table of all account branches per Client + add concatenated list of account branch names to the clients, PBI report will use for account branch filtering
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData;

SELECT A.Client_BK
      ,A.Branch_BK AS [Account Branch_BK]
      ,B.BranchNumber AS [Account Branch Number]
      ,B.BranchName AS [Account Branch Name]
      ,B.BranchDivision AS [Account Branch Division]
      ,ABC.[Account Branch List]
  INTO banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData
  FROM #consumeAccount A
  JOIN #consumeBranch B
    ON A.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
  JOIN banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData ABC
    ON A.Client_BK = ABC.Client_BK
 WHERE A.As_Of_Date = @CurrentDate
 GROUP BY A.Client_BK
      ,A.Branch_BK
      ,B.BranchNumber
      ,B.BranchName
      ,B.BranchDivision
      ,ABC.[Account Branch List]

/******************************************************************
SELECT TOP 1000 *
FROM banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData

SELECT TOP 1000 *
FROM banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData
*******************************************************************/

-------------------------------
-------------------------------
END TRY
-------------------------------
-------------------------------


-------------------------------
-------------------------------
BEGIN CATCH
-------------------------------
-------------------------------

   SELECT @ErrorDescr = 'Error: '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(500),ISNULL(ERROR_NUMBER(),'NULL'))
