IF OBJECT_ID('[banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData]') IS NOT NULL
   DROP PROCEDURE [banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData];

GO

-- EXECUTE [banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData]

CREATE PROCEDURE [banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData]
AS
BEGIN

/***************************************************************************************************
   NAME
      [banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData].sql

   AUTHOR
      BANNERBANK\b60JCoughl, Banner Bank

   CREATE DATE
      2023-11-07

   BUSINESS OWNER(S)
      Karen Harrison

   INTENDED USE
      Determine the 1000 depositors at the bank level and per division, client branch and account branch,
      a Power BI report will display this information for the Community/Commercial Banking groups + ALCO reporting

   INTENDED AUDIENCE
      Community & Commercial Banking

   RELATED ITEC PROJECT
      #3800

   CHANGE LOG
      2023-11-07 Jen Coughlan - First implementation
      2024-04-04 Jen Coughlan - Sort account branch list by highest deposit balance and add RG Primary Level1 CIF

***************************************************************************************************/

-----------------------------
-----------------------------
BEGIN TRY
-----------------------------
-----------------------------

/***************************************************************************************************
****************************************************************************************************
-- Declare variables
****************************************************************************************************
***************************************************************************************************/

DECLARE @TodayDate DATE = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time' -- get current date in PST
       ,@ReportRefreshDateTime DATETIME = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time' -- get current date time in PST
       ,@msg VARCHAR(8000) = ''
       ,@ErrorDescr VARCHAR(8000) = ''


SELECT @msg = 'Execution start time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#EOMDates') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #EOMDates;

WITH EOMRange AS (
SELECT CONVERT(DATE, ActualDate) AS ActualDate
      ,CONVERT(DATETIME2, ActualDate) AS ActualDate_DateTime2
      ,YearMonth
      ,DashYearMonthCd
      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY YearMonth DESC) AS [Row#]
  FROM consume.DimTime
 WHERE CONVERT(DATE, ActualDate) BETWEEN '2023-02-01' AND CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE()-1) -- subtract one day so we don't pick up the new EOM day until the day after the month has closed and would have been processed
   AND SLEOMInd = 'Y'
)
SELECT EOMRange.ActualDate
      ,EOMRange.ActualDate_DateTime2
      ,EOMRange.YearMonth
      ,EOMRange.DashYearMonthCd
      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY YearMonth ASC) AS [MonthSeq#]
  INTO #EOMDates
  FROM EOMRange
 WHERE EOMRange.[Row#] BETWEEN 1 AND 6 -- get the latest 6 rolling months from the larger range
;

DECLARE @Env VARCHAR(100) = UPPER(REPLACE(REPLACE(CAST( SERVERPROPERTY( 'ServerName' ) AS VARCHAR(100) ),'ldw-',''),'-synapse',''))

IF @Env = 'TEST'
BEGIN
   -- temp workaround as 6/30/23 EOM data is missing from multiple consume objects in Test
   UPDATE #EOMDates
      SET ActualDate = '2023-06-29'
         ,ActualDate_DateTime2 = CONVERT(DATETIME2, '2023-06-29')
    WHERE ActualDate = '2023-06-30';
END

-- due to data size and Tempdb spilling errors in dev/test environments, restrict the number of months to just the two most recent months.  Leave six months only for Prod.
IF @Env IN ('DEV','TEST')
BEGIN
   -- delete all but the two most recent months
   DELETE FROM #EOMDates
   WHERE MonthSeq# NOT IN (5,6)
END

/*
SELECT *
FROM #EOMDates
ORDER BY [MonthSeq#]
*/

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build temp tables to hold needed rows from each consume object
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- consume.Account
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeAccount') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeAccount;

SELECT con.Account_Key
      ,con.Account_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.AccountType
      ,con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.CurrentBalance
      ,con.InterestRate
  INTO #consumeAccount
  FROM consume.Account con
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON con.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
 WHERE 1=1
   AND con.AccountType IN ('D','S','T')
   AND ISNULL(con.IsTestAccount,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.IsBannerInternalBankUse,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.StatusCode,'1') NOT IN ('2','8')

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Client
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeClient') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeClient;

SELECT con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.CIFNumber
      ,con.ClientName
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.Officer_BK
      ,con.OriginalClientDate
  INTO #consumeClient
  FROM consume.Client con
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON con.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
 WHERE 1=1
   AND ISNULL(con.IsTestClient,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.IsBankInternal,0) <> 1
   AND ISNULL(UPPER(con.InsiderCode),'') NOT IN ('E','O','D','X') -- exclude employees, officers, directors and executive directors

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.ClientRelationshipGroup
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeClientRelationshipGroup') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeClientRelationshipGroup;

SELECT con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.GroupRelationshipTypeDesc
      ,con.RelationshipGroup_BK
      ,con.RelationshipGroup_Key
  INTO #consumeClientRelationshipGroup
  FROM consume.ClientRelationshipGroup con
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON con.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.RelationshipGroup
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeRelationshipGroup') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeRelationshipGroup;

SELECT con.RelationshipGroup_Key
      ,con.RelationshipGroup_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.RelatedGroupNumber
      ,con.RelatedGroupDesc
  INTO #consumeRelationshipGroup
  FROM consume.RelationshipGroup con
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON con.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Branch - get the latest branch details for every branch
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeBranch') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeBranch;

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.Branch_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.Branch con
    WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY con.Branch_BK
)
SELECT con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.BranchNumber
      ,con.BranchName
      ,con.BranchDivision
      ,con.BranchRegion
  INTO #consumeBranch
  FROM consume.Branch con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.Branch_BK = le.Branch_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


-- consume.Officer - get the latest officer details for every officer
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeOfficer') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeOfficer;

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.Officer_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.Officer con
    WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY con.Officer_BK
)
SELECT con.Officer_Key
      ,con.Officer_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.OfficerFullName
      ,con.OfficerCode
      ,con.DateTerminated
  INTO #consumeOfficer
  FROM consume.Officer con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.Officer_BK = le.Officer_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Pull account details per depositor, then summarize and rank per month AT THE ACCOUNT BRANCH LEVEL
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DepositorAccountLevel') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #DepositorAccountLevel;

SELECT CAST(A.As_Of_Date AS DATE) AS [As_Of_Date]
      ,EOMD.YearMonth
      ,EOMD.DashYearMonthCd
      ,EOMD.[MonthSeq#]
      ,A.Branch_Key
      ,A.Branch_BK
      ,CASE WHEN RG.RelationshipGroup_Key IS NULL THEN A.Client_Key ELSE RG.Client_Key END AS Client_Key
      ,CASE WHEN RG.RelationshipGroup_Key IS NULL THEN 'Client' ELSE 'Relationship Group' END AS [Depositor Type]
      ,CASE WHEN RG.RelationshipGroup_Key IS NULL THEN C.CIFNumber ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(8000),RG.RelatedGroupNumber) END AS [Depositor Number]
      ,CASE WHEN RG.RelationshipGroup_Key IS NULL THEN C.ClientName ELSE RG.RelatedGroupDesc END AS [Depositor Name]
      ,RG_Level1CIF.CIFNumber AS RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
      ,RG_Level1CIF.ClientName AS RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S','T') THEN A.CurrentBalance ELSE 0.00 END AS [Total Deposit Balance]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S') THEN A.CurrentBalance ELSE 0.00 END AS [Demand Deposit Balance]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('T') THEN A.CurrentBalance ELSE 0.00 END AS [CD Balance]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S','T') THEN A.CurrentBalance * A.InterestRate ELSE 0.00 END AS [Total Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S') THEN A.CurrentBalance * A.InterestRate ELSE 0.00 END AS [Demand Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S','T') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Total Deposit # of Accts]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Demand Deposit # of Accts]
  INTO #DepositorAccountLevel
  FROM #consumeAccount A
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON A.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
  JOIN #consumeClient C
    ON A.Client_Key = C.Client_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClientRelationshipGroup CRG
    ON C.Client_Key = CRG.Client_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeRelationshipGroup RG
    ON ISNULL(CRG.RelationshipGroup_Key,'ABCXYZ') = RG.RelationshipGroup_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClient RG_Level1CIF
    ON ISNULL(RG.Client_Key,'ABCXYZ') = RG_Level1CIF.Client_Key
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Summarize and rank per month AT THE DEPOSITOR/CLIENT BRANCH LEVEL
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DepositorRank_ClientLevel') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #DepositorRank_ClientLevel;

SELECT AL.[As_Of_Date]
      ,AL.Client_Key
      ,TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) AS [Depositor Number]
      ,C.Branch_BK AS [Depositor Branch_BK]
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown') AS [Depositor Branch Number]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown') AS [Depositor Branch Name]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') AS [Depositor Branch Division]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchRegion, 'Unknown') AS [Depositor Branch Region]
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], C.Branch_BK ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Total Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch] -- rank within each month and depositor branch
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], C.Branch_BK ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch] -- rank within each month and depositor branch
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Total Deposit Balance Rank - Division] -- rank within each month and division
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Division] -- rank within each month and division
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date] ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Total Deposit Balance Rank - Bank] -- rank within each month across entire bank
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date] ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Bank] -- rank within each month across entire bank
  INTO #DepositorRank_ClientLevel
  FROM #DepositorAccountLevel AL
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClient C
    ON AL.Client_Key = C.Client_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeBranch B -- join on the Depositor/Client branch
    ON C.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeOfficer O
    ON C.Officer_BK = O.Officer_BK
 GROUP BY AL.[As_Of_Date]
      ,AL.Client_Key
      ,TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number])
      ,C.Branch_BK
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchRegion, 'Unknown');


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- summarize and rank per month AT THE ACCOUNT BRANCH LEVEL
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel;

SELECT AL.[As_Of_Date]
      ,AL.[YearMonth]
      ,AL.[DashYearMonthCd]
      ,AL.[MonthSeq#]
      ,AL.Client_Key
      ,AL.[Depositor Type]
      ,TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) AS [Depositor Number]
      ,AL.[Depositor Name]
      ,AL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
      ,AL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
      ,COALESCE(O.Officer_BK, 'Unknown') AS Officer_BK
      ,CASE WHEN AL.[Depositor Type] = 'Client' THEN COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'No Current Officer Assigned (XXX)') ELSE COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'Unknown') END AS [Officer]
      ,O.DateTerminated AS [Officer Date Terminated]
      ,AL.Branch_BK AS [Account Branch_BK]
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch Number]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch Name]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch Division]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchRegion, 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch Region]
      ,C.OriginalClientDate AS [Original Client Date]
   -- TBD: need to calc Avg Bal
      ,SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) AS [Total Deposit Balance]
      ,SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) AS [Demand Deposit Balance]
      ,SUM(AL.[CD Balance]) AS [CD Balance]
      ,SUM(AL.[Total Deposit BalancexRate]) AS [Total Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit BalancexRate]) AS [Demand Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,SUM(AL.[Total Deposit # of Accts]) AS [Total Deposit # of Accts]
      ,SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit # of Accts]) AS [Demand Deposit # of Accts]
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], AL.Branch_BK ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Total Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch] -- rank depositors within each month and branch
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], AL.Branch_BK ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch] -- rank depositors within each month and branch
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, AL.Branch_BK ASC) AS [Total Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] -- rank account branches within each month and depositor
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, AL.Branch_BK ASC) AS [Demand Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] -- rank account branches within each month and depositor
  INTO #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel
  FROM #DepositorAccountLevel AL
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClient C
    ON AL.Client_Key = C.Client_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeBranch B -- join on the Account Branch
    ON AL.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeOfficer O
    ON C.Officer_BK = O.Officer_BK
 GROUP BY AL.[As_Of_Date]
      ,AL.[YearMonth]
      ,AL.[DashYearMonthCd]
      ,AL.[MonthSeq#]
      ,AL.Client_Key
      ,AL.[Depositor Type]
      ,TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number])
      ,AL.[Depositor Name]
      ,AL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
      ,AL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
      ,COALESCE(O.Officer_BK, 'Unknown')
      ,CASE WHEN AL.[Depositor Type] = 'Client' THEN COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'No Current Officer Assigned (XXX)') ELSE COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'Unknown') END
      ,O.DateTerminated
      ,AL.Branch_BK
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchRegion, 'Unknown')
      ,C.OriginalClientDate


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- find distinct list of all depositors who were in the top 1000 at any point
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TopDepositors') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #TopDepositors;

SELECT DISTINCT [Depositor Number]
  INTO #TopDepositors
  FROM #DepositorRank_ClientLevel DR
 WHERE DR.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Division] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Division] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Bank] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Bank] <= 1000
UNION 
SELECT DISTINCT [Depositor Number]
  FROM #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel DR
 WHERE DR.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch] <= 1000


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- pull all depositors who were in the top 1000 at some point plus additional details
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TopDepositors_WithDetails') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #TopDepositors_WithDetails;

WITH AccountBranchStrings AS (
   SELECT [Depositor Number]
         ,As_Of_Date
         ,STRING_AGG([Account Branch Name], '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY [Demand Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] ASC) AS [Account Branch List]
         ,COUNT(DISTINCT [Account Branch Number]) AS [Number of Account Branches]
     FROM #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel
    GROUP BY [Depositor Number]
            ,As_Of_Date
)
SELECT DR_ABL.As_Of_Date
      ,DR_ABL.YearMonth
      ,DR_ABL.DashYearMonthCd
      ,DR_ABL.MonthSeq#
      ,DR_ABL.[Depositor Type]
      ,DR_ABL.[Depositor Number]
      ,DR_ABL.[Depositor Name]
      ,DR_ABL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
      ,DR_ABL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
      ,DR_ABL.Officer_BK
      ,DR_ABL.[Officer]
      ,DR_ABL.[Officer Date Terminated]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch_BK]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch Number]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch Name]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch Division]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch Region]
      ,CASE WHEN DR_ABL.[Total Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Total Deposit - Main Account Branch Flag]
      ,CASE WHEN DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Demand Deposit - Main Account Branch Flag]
      ,ISNULL(ABStr.[Account Branch List], 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch List]
      ,ABStr.[Number of Account Branches] 
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch_BK]
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch Number]
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch Name]
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch Division]
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch Region]
      ,DR_ABL.[Original Client Date]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit Balance]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit Balance]
      ,DR_ABL.[CD Balance]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit # of Accts]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit # of Accts]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch]
      ,DR_CL.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch]
      ,DR_CL.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch]
      ,DR_CL.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Division]
      ,DR_CL.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Division]
      ,DR_CL.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Bank]
      ,DR_CL.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Bank]
      --,CONVERT(VARCHAR(50), @ReportRefreshDateTime, 100) + ' PST' AS [Report Refreshed Date]
  INTO #TopDepositors_WithDetails
  FROM #TopDepositors TD
  JOIN #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel DR_ABL
    ON TD.[Depositor Number] = DR_ABL.[Depositor Number]
  -- many-to-one join due to different level of granularity, DR_CL attributes included in the select above will be duplicated, Power BI report will handle this accordingly as required by the various visuals
  JOIN #DepositorRank_ClientLevel DR_CL
    ON DR_ABL.As_Of_Date = DR_CL.As_Of_Date
   AND DR_ABL.Client_Key = DR_CL.Client_Key
   AND DR_ABL.[Depositor Number] = DR_CL.[Depositor Number]
  LEFT JOIN AccountBranchStrings ABStr
    ON DR_ABL.[Depositor Number] = ABStr.[Depositor Number]
   AND DR_ABL.As_Of_Date = ABStr.As_Of_Date;


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- put into final table for PBI report to connect to
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('banner_reporting.TopDepositors_ReportData') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE banner_reporting.TopDepositors_ReportData;

SELECT TD.*
  INTO banner_reporting.TopDepositors_ReportData
  FROM #TopDepositors_WithDetails TD

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

/******************************************************************
SELECT TOP 1000 *
FROM banner_reporting.TopDepositors_ReportData
order by [Depositor Number]
*******************************************************************/

-------------------------------
-------------------------------
END TRY
-------------------------------
-------------------------------

IF OBJECT_ID('[banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData]') IS NOT NULL
   DROP PROCEDURE [banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData];

GO

-- EXECUTE [banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData]

CREATE PROCEDURE [banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData]
AS
BEGIN

/***************************************************************************************************
   NAME
      [banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData].sql

   AUTHOR
      BANNERBANK\b60JCoughl, Banner Bank

   CREATE DATE
      2023-11-07

   BUSINESS OWNER(S)
      Karen Harrison

   INTENDED USE
      Determine the 1000 depositors at the bank level and per division, client branch and account branch,
      a Power BI report will display this information for the Community/Commercial Banking groups + ALCO reporting

   INTENDED AUDIENCE
      Community & Commercial Banking

   RELATED ITEC PROJECT
      #3800

   CHANGE LOG
      2023-11-07 Jen Coughlan - First implementation
      2024-04-04 Jen Coughlan - Sort account branch list by highest deposit balance and add RG Primary Level1 CIF
      2024-04-15 Jen Coughlan - Added MTDAverageBal to the output dataset

***************************************************************************************************/

-----------------------------
-----------------------------
BEGIN TRY
-----------------------------
-----------------------------

/***************************************************************************************************
****************************************************************************************************
-- Declare variables
****************************************************************************************************
***************************************************************************************************/

DECLARE @TodayDate DATE = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time' -- get current date in PST
       ,@ReportRefreshDateTime DATETIME = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time' -- get current date time in PST
       ,@msg VARCHAR(8000) = ''
       ,@ErrorDescr VARCHAR(8000) = ''


SELECT @msg = 'Execution start time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#EOMDates') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #EOMDates;

WITH EOMRange AS (
SELECT CONVERT(DATE, ActualDate) AS ActualDate
      ,CONVERT(DATETIME2, ActualDate) AS ActualDate_DateTime2
      ,YearMonth
      ,DashYearMonthCd
      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY YearMonth DESC) AS [Row#]
  FROM consume.DimTime
 WHERE CONVERT(DATE, ActualDate) BETWEEN '2023-02-01' AND CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE()-1) -- subtract one day so we don't pick up the new EOM day until the day after the month has closed and would have been processed
   AND SLEOMInd = 'Y'
)
SELECT EOMRange.ActualDate
      ,EOMRange.ActualDate_DateTime2
      ,EOMRange.YearMonth
      ,EOMRange.DashYearMonthCd
      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY YearMonth ASC) AS [MonthSeq#]
  INTO #EOMDates
  FROM EOMRange
 WHERE EOMRange.[Row#] BETWEEN 1 AND 6 -- get the latest 6 rolling months from the larger range
;

DECLARE @Env VARCHAR(100) = UPPER(REPLACE(REPLACE(CAST( SERVERPROPERTY( 'ServerName' ) AS VARCHAR(100) ),'ldw-',''),'-synapse',''))

IF @Env = 'TEST'
BEGIN
   -- temp workaround as 6/30/23 EOM data is missing from multiple consume objects in Test
   UPDATE #EOMDates
      SET ActualDate = '2023-06-29'
         ,ActualDate_DateTime2 = CONVERT(DATETIME2, '2023-06-29')
    WHERE ActualDate = '2023-06-30';
END

-- due to data size and Tempdb spilling errors in dev/test environments, restrict the number of months to just the two most recent months.  Leave six months only for Prod.
IF @Env IN ('DEV','TEST')
BEGIN
   -- delete all but the two most recent months
   DELETE FROM #EOMDates
   WHERE MonthSeq# NOT IN (5,6)
END

/*
SELECT *
FROM #EOMDates
ORDER BY [MonthSeq#]
*/

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build temp tables to hold needed rows from each consume object
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- consume.Account
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeAccount') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeAccount;

SELECT con.Account_Key
      ,con.Account_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.AccountType
      ,con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.CurrentBalance
      ,con.MTDAverageBal
      ,con.InterestRate
  INTO #consumeAccount
  FROM consume.Account con
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON con.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
 WHERE 1=1
   AND con.AccountType IN ('D','S','T')
   AND ISNULL(con.IsTestAccount,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.IsBannerInternalBankUse,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.StatusCode,'1') NOT IN ('2','8')

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Client
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeClient') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeClient;

SELECT con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.CIFNumber
      ,con.ClientName
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.Officer_BK
      ,con.OriginalClientDate
  INTO #consumeClient
  FROM consume.Client con
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON con.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
 WHERE 1=1
   AND ISNULL(con.IsTestClient,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.IsBankInternal,0) <> 1
   AND ISNULL(UPPER(con.InsiderCode),'') NOT IN ('E','O','D','X') -- exclude employees, officers, directors and executive directors

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.ClientRelationshipGroup
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeClientRelationshipGroup') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeClientRelationshipGroup;

SELECT con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.GroupRelationshipTypeDesc
      ,con.RelationshipGroup_BK
      ,con.RelationshipGroup_Key
  INTO #consumeClientRelationshipGroup
  FROM consume.ClientRelationshipGroup con
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON con.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.RelationshipGroup
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeRelationshipGroup') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeRelationshipGroup;

SELECT con.RelationshipGroup_Key
      ,con.RelationshipGroup_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.RelatedGroupNumber
      ,con.RelatedGroupDesc
  INTO #consumeRelationshipGroup
  FROM consume.RelationshipGroup con
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON con.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Branch - get the latest branch details for every branch
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeBranch') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeBranch;

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.Branch_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.Branch con
    WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY con.Branch_BK
)
SELECT con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.BranchNumber
      ,con.BranchName
      ,con.BranchDivision
      ,con.BranchRegion
  INTO #consumeBranch
  FROM consume.Branch con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.Branch_BK = le.Branch_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


-- consume.Officer - get the latest officer details for every officer
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeOfficer') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeOfficer;

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.Officer_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.Officer con
    WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY con.Officer_BK
)
SELECT con.Officer_Key
      ,con.Officer_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.OfficerFullName
      ,con.OfficerCode
      ,con.DateTerminated
  INTO #consumeOfficer
  FROM consume.Officer con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.Officer_BK = le.Officer_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Pull account details per depositor, then summarize and rank per month AT THE ACCOUNT BRANCH LEVEL
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DepositorAccountLevel') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #DepositorAccountLevel;

SELECT CAST(A.As_Of_Date AS DATE) AS [As_Of_Date]
      ,EOMD.YearMonth
      ,EOMD.DashYearMonthCd
      ,EOMD.[MonthSeq#]
      ,A.Branch_Key
      ,A.Branch_BK
      ,CASE WHEN RG.RelationshipGroup_Key IS NULL THEN A.Client_Key ELSE RG.Client_Key END AS Client_Key
      ,CASE WHEN RG.RelationshipGroup_Key IS NULL THEN 'Client' ELSE 'Relationship Group' END AS [Depositor Type]
      ,CASE WHEN RG.RelationshipGroup_Key IS NULL THEN C.CIFNumber ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(8000),RG.RelatedGroupNumber) END AS [Depositor Number]
      ,CASE WHEN RG.RelationshipGroup_Key IS NULL THEN C.ClientName ELSE RG.RelatedGroupDesc END AS [Depositor Name]
      ,RG_Level1CIF.CIFNumber AS RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
      ,RG_Level1CIF.ClientName AS RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S','T') THEN A.CurrentBalance ELSE 0.00 END AS [Total Deposit Balance]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S') THEN A.CurrentBalance ELSE 0.00 END AS [Demand Deposit Balance]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('T') THEN A.CurrentBalance ELSE 0.00 END AS [CD Balance]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S','T') THEN A.MTDAverageBal ELSE 0.00 END AS [Total Deposit MTD Average Balance]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S') THEN A.MTDAverageBal ELSE 0.00 END AS [Demand Deposit MTD Average Balance]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S','T') THEN A.CurrentBalance * A.InterestRate ELSE 0.00 END AS [Total Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S') THEN A.CurrentBalance * A.InterestRate ELSE 0.00 END AS [Demand Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S','T') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Total Deposit # of Accts]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Demand Deposit # of Accts]
  INTO #DepositorAccountLevel
  FROM #consumeAccount A
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON A.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
  JOIN #consumeClient C
    ON A.Client_Key = C.Client_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClientRelationshipGroup CRG
    ON C.Client_Key = CRG.Client_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeRelationshipGroup RG
    ON ISNULL(CRG.RelationshipGroup_Key,'ABCXYZ') = RG.RelationshipGroup_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClient RG_Level1CIF
    ON ISNULL(RG.Client_Key,'ABCXYZ') = RG_Level1CIF.Client_Key
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Summarize and rank per month AT THE DEPOSITOR/CLIENT BRANCH LEVEL
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DepositorRank_ClientLevel') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #DepositorRank_ClientLevel;

SELECT AL.[As_Of_Date]
      ,AL.Client_Key
      ,TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) AS [Depositor Number]
      ,C.Branch_BK AS [Depositor Branch_BK]
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown') AS [Depositor Branch Number]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown') AS [Depositor Branch Name]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') AS [Depositor Branch Division]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchRegion, 'Unknown') AS [Depositor Branch Region]
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], C.Branch_BK ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Total Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch] -- rank within each month and depositor branch
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], C.Branch_BK ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch] -- rank within each month and depositor branch
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Total Deposit Balance Rank - Division] -- rank within each month and division
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Division] -- rank within each month and division
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date] ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Total Deposit Balance Rank - Bank] -- rank within each month across entire bank
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date] ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Bank] -- rank within each month across entire bank
  INTO #DepositorRank_ClientLevel
  FROM #DepositorAccountLevel AL
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClient C
    ON AL.Client_Key = C.Client_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeBranch B -- join on the Depositor/Client branch
    ON C.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeOfficer O
    ON C.Officer_BK = O.Officer_BK
 GROUP BY AL.[As_Of_Date]
      ,AL.Client_Key
      ,TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number])
      ,C.Branch_BK
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchRegion, 'Unknown');


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- summarize and rank per month AT THE ACCOUNT BRANCH LEVEL
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel;

SELECT AL.[As_Of_Date]
      ,AL.[YearMonth]
      ,AL.[DashYearMonthCd]
      ,AL.[MonthSeq#]
      ,AL.Client_Key
      ,AL.[Depositor Type]
      ,TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) AS [Depositor Number]
      ,AL.[Depositor Name]
      ,AL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
      ,AL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
      ,COALESCE(O.Officer_BK, 'Unknown') AS Officer_BK
      ,CASE WHEN AL.[Depositor Type] = 'Client' THEN COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'No Current Officer Assigned (XXX)') ELSE COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'Unknown') END AS [Officer]
      ,O.DateTerminated AS [Officer Date Terminated]
      ,AL.Branch_BK AS [Account Branch_BK]
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch Number]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch Name]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch Division]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchRegion, 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch Region]
      ,C.OriginalClientDate AS [Original Client Date]
   -- TBD: need to calc Avg Bal
      ,SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) AS [Total Deposit Balance]
      ,SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) AS [Demand Deposit Balance]
      ,SUM(AL.[CD Balance]) AS [CD Balance]
      ,SUM(AL.[Total Deposit MTD Average Balance]) AS [Total Deposit MTD Average Balance]
      ,SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit MTD Average Balance]) AS [Demand Deposit MTD Average Balance]
      ,SUM(AL.[Total Deposit BalancexRate]) AS [Total Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit BalancexRate]) AS [Demand Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,SUM(AL.[Total Deposit # of Accts]) AS [Total Deposit # of Accts]
      ,SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit # of Accts]) AS [Demand Deposit # of Accts]
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], AL.Branch_BK ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Total Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch] -- rank depositors within each month and branch
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], AL.Branch_BK ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch] -- rank depositors within each month and branch
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, AL.Branch_BK ASC) AS [Total Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] -- rank account branches within each month and depositor
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, AL.Branch_BK ASC) AS [Demand Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] -- rank account branches within each month and depositor
  INTO #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel
  FROM #DepositorAccountLevel AL
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClient C
    ON AL.Client_Key = C.Client_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeBranch B -- join on the Account Branch
    ON AL.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeOfficer O
    ON C.Officer_BK = O.Officer_BK
 GROUP BY AL.[As_Of_Date]
      ,AL.[YearMonth]
      ,AL.[DashYearMonthCd]
      ,AL.[MonthSeq#]
      ,AL.Client_Key
      ,AL.[Depositor Type]
      ,TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number])
      ,AL.[Depositor Name]
      ,AL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
      ,AL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
      ,COALESCE(O.Officer_BK, 'Unknown')
      ,CASE WHEN AL.[Depositor Type] = 'Client' THEN COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'No Current Officer Assigned (XXX)') ELSE COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'Unknown') END
      ,O.DateTerminated
      ,AL.Branch_BK
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchRegion, 'Unknown')
      ,C.OriginalClientDate


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- find distinct list of all depositors who were in the top 1000 at any point
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TopDepositors') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #TopDepositors;

SELECT DISTINCT [Depositor Number]
  INTO #TopDepositors
  FROM #DepositorRank_ClientLevel DR
 WHERE DR.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Division] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Division] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Bank] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Bank] <= 1000
UNION 
SELECT DISTINCT [Depositor Number]
  FROM #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel DR
 WHERE DR.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch] <= 1000


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- pull all depositors who were in the top 1000 at some point plus additional details
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TopDepositors_WithDetails') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #TopDepositors_WithDetails;

WITH AccountBranchStrings AS (
   SELECT [Depositor Number]
         ,As_Of_Date
         ,STRING_AGG([Account Branch Name], '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY [Demand Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] ASC) AS [Account Branch List]
         ,COUNT(DISTINCT [Account Branch Number]) AS [Number of Account Branches]
     FROM #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel
    GROUP BY [Depositor Number]
            ,As_Of_Date
)
SELECT DR_ABL.As_Of_Date
      ,DR_ABL.YearMonth
      ,DR_ABL.DashYearMonthCd
      ,DR_ABL.MonthSeq#
      ,DR_ABL.[Depositor Type]
      ,DR_ABL.[Depositor Number]
      ,DR_ABL.[Depositor Name]
      ,DR_ABL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
      ,DR_ABL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
      ,DR_ABL.Officer_BK
      ,DR_ABL.[Officer]
      ,DR_ABL.[Officer Date Terminated]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch_BK]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch Number]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch Name]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch Division]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch Region]
      ,CASE WHEN DR_ABL.[Total Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Total Deposit - Main Account Branch Flag]
      ,CASE WHEN DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Demand Deposit - Main Account Branch Flag]
      ,ISNULL(ABStr.[Account Branch List], 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch List]
      ,ABStr.[Number of Account Branches] 
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch_BK]
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch Number]
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch Name]
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch Division]
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch Region]
      ,DR_ABL.[Original Client Date]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit Balance]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit Balance]
      ,DR_ABL.[CD Balance]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit MTD Average Balance]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit MTD Average Balance]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit # of Accts]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit # of Accts]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch]
      ,DR_CL.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch]
      ,DR_CL.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch]
      ,DR_CL.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Division]
      ,DR_CL.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Division]
      ,DR_CL.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Bank]
      ,DR_CL.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Bank]
      --,CONVERT(VARCHAR(50), @ReportRefreshDateTime, 100) + ' PST' AS [Report Refreshed Date]
  INTO #TopDepositors_WithDetails
  FROM #TopDepositors TD
  JOIN #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel DR_ABL
    ON TD.[Depositor Number] = DR_ABL.[Depositor Number]
  -- many-to-one join due to different level of granularity, DR_CL attributes included in the select above will be duplicated, Power BI report will handle this accordingly as required by the various visuals
  JOIN #DepositorRank_ClientLevel DR_CL
    ON DR_ABL.As_Of_Date = DR_CL.As_Of_Date
   AND DR_ABL.Client_Key = DR_CL.Client_Key
   AND DR_ABL.[Depositor Number] = DR_CL.[Depositor Number]
  LEFT JOIN AccountBranchStrings ABStr
    ON DR_ABL.[Depositor Number] = ABStr.[Depositor Number]
   AND DR_ABL.As_Of_Date = ABStr.As_Of_Date;


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- put into final table for PBI report to connect to
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('banner_reporting.TopDepositors_ReportData') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE banner_reporting.TopDepositors_ReportData;

SELECT TD.*
  INTO banner_reporting.TopDepositors_ReportData
  FROM #TopDepositors_WithDetails TD

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

/******************************************************************
SELECT TOP 1000 *

IF OBJECT_ID('[banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData]') IS NOT NULL
   DROP PROCEDURE [banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData];

GO

-- EXECUTE [banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData]

CREATE PROCEDURE [banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData]
AS
BEGIN

/***************************************************************************************************
   NAME
      [banner_reporting].[usp_TopDepositors_ReportData].sql

   AUTHOR
      BANNERBANK\b60JCoughl, Banner Bank

   CREATE DATE
      2023-11-07

   BUSINESS OWNER(S)
      Karen Harrison

   INTENDED USE
      Determine the 1000 depositors at the bank level and per division, client branch and account branch,
      a Power BI report will display this information for the Community/Commercial Banking groups + ALCO reporting

   INTENDED AUDIENCE
      Community & Commercial Banking

   RELATED ITEC PROJECT
      #3800

   CHANGE LOG
      2023-11-07 Jen Coughlan - First implementation
      2024-04-04 Jen Coughlan - Sort account branch list by highest deposit balance and add RG Primary Level1 CIF
      2024-04-15 Jen Coughlan - Added MTDAverageBal to the output dataset
      2024-04-17 Jen Coughlan - Choose second highest balance branch as main branch if highest bal branch is 800

***************************************************************************************************/

-----------------------------
-----------------------------
BEGIN TRY
-----------------------------
-----------------------------

/***************************************************************************************************
****************************************************************************************************
-- Declare variables
****************************************************************************************************
***************************************************************************************************/

DECLARE @TodayDate DATE = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time' -- get current date in PST
       ,@ReportRefreshDateTime DATETIME = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time' -- get current date time in PST
       ,@msg VARCHAR(8000) = ''
       ,@ErrorDescr VARCHAR(8000) = ''


SELECT @msg = 'Execution start time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#EOMDates') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #EOMDates;

WITH EOMRange AS (
SELECT CONVERT(DATE, ActualDate) AS ActualDate
      ,CONVERT(DATETIME2, ActualDate) AS ActualDate_DateTime2
      ,YearMonth
      ,DashYearMonthCd
      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY YearMonth DESC) AS [Row#]
  FROM consume.DimTime
 WHERE CONVERT(DATE, ActualDate) BETWEEN '2023-02-01' AND CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE()-1) -- subtract one day so we don't pick up the new EOM day until the day after the month has closed and would have been processed
   AND SLEOMInd = 'Y'
)
SELECT EOMRange.ActualDate
      ,EOMRange.ActualDate_DateTime2
      ,EOMRange.YearMonth
      ,EOMRange.DashYearMonthCd
      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY YearMonth ASC) AS [MonthSeq#]
  INTO #EOMDates
  FROM EOMRange
 WHERE EOMRange.[Row#] BETWEEN 1 AND 6 -- get the latest 6 rolling months from the larger range
;

DECLARE @Env VARCHAR(100) = UPPER(REPLACE(REPLACE(CAST( SERVERPROPERTY( 'ServerName' ) AS VARCHAR(100) ),'ldw-',''),'-synapse',''))

IF @Env = 'TEST'
BEGIN
   -- temp workaround as 6/30/23 EOM data is missing from multiple consume objects in Test
   UPDATE #EOMDates
      SET ActualDate = '2023-06-29'
         ,ActualDate_DateTime2 = CONVERT(DATETIME2, '2023-06-29')
    WHERE ActualDate = '2023-06-30';
END

-- due to data size and Tempdb spilling errors in dev/test environments, restrict the number of months to just the two most recent months.  Leave six months only for Prod.
IF @Env IN ('DEV','TEST')
BEGIN
   -- delete all but the two most recent months
   DELETE FROM #EOMDates
   WHERE MonthSeq# NOT IN (5,6)
END

/*
SELECT *
FROM #EOMDates
ORDER BY [MonthSeq#]
*/

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build temp tables to hold needed rows from each consume object
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- consume.Account
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeAccount') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeAccount;

SELECT con.Account_Key
      ,con.Account_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.AccountType
      ,con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.CurrentBalance
      ,con.MTDAverageBal
      ,con.InterestRate
  INTO #consumeAccount
  FROM consume.Account con
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON con.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
 WHERE 1=1
   AND con.AccountType IN ('D','S','T')
   AND ISNULL(con.IsTestAccount,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.IsBannerInternalBankUse,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.StatusCode,'1') NOT IN ('2','8')

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Client
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeClient') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeClient;

SELECT con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.CIFNumber
      ,con.ClientName
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.Officer_BK
      ,con.OriginalClientDate
  INTO #consumeClient
  FROM consume.Client con
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON con.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
 WHERE 1=1
   AND ISNULL(con.IsTestClient,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.IsBankInternal,0) <> 1
   AND ISNULL(UPPER(con.InsiderCode),'') NOT IN ('E','O','D','X') -- exclude employees, officers, directors and executive directors

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.ClientRelationshipGroup
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeClientRelationshipGroup') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeClientRelationshipGroup;

SELECT con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.GroupRelationshipTypeDesc
      ,con.RelationshipGroup_BK
      ,con.RelationshipGroup_Key
  INTO #consumeClientRelationshipGroup
  FROM consume.ClientRelationshipGroup con
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON con.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.RelationshipGroup
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeRelationshipGroup') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeRelationshipGroup;

SELECT con.RelationshipGroup_Key
      ,con.RelationshipGroup_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.RelatedGroupNumber
      ,con.RelatedGroupDesc
  INTO #consumeRelationshipGroup
  FROM consume.RelationshipGroup con
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON con.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Branch - get the latest branch details for every branch
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeBranch') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeBranch;

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.Branch_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.Branch con
    WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY con.Branch_BK
)
SELECT con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.BranchNumber
      ,con.BranchName
      ,con.BranchDivision
      ,con.BranchRegion
  INTO #consumeBranch
  FROM consume.Branch con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.Branch_BK = le.Branch_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


-- consume.Officer - get the latest officer details for every officer
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeOfficer') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeOfficer;

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.Officer_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.Officer con
    WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY con.Officer_BK
)
SELECT con.Officer_Key
      ,con.Officer_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.OfficerFullName
      ,con.OfficerCode
      ,con.DateTerminated
  INTO #consumeOfficer
  FROM consume.Officer con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.Officer_BK = le.Officer_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Pull account details per depositor, then summarize and rank per month AT THE ACCOUNT BRANCH LEVEL
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DepositorAccountLevel') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #DepositorAccountLevel;

SELECT CAST(A.As_Of_Date AS DATE) AS [As_Of_Date]
      ,EOMD.YearMonth
      ,EOMD.DashYearMonthCd
      ,EOMD.[MonthSeq#]
      ,A.Branch_Key
      ,A.Branch_BK
      ,CASE WHEN RG.RelationshipGroup_Key IS NULL THEN A.Client_Key ELSE RG.Client_Key END AS Client_Key
      ,CASE WHEN RG.RelationshipGroup_Key IS NULL THEN 'Client' ELSE 'Relationship Group' END AS [Depositor Type]
      ,CASE WHEN RG.RelationshipGroup_Key IS NULL THEN C.CIFNumber ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(8000),RG.RelatedGroupNumber) END AS [Depositor Number]
      ,CASE WHEN RG.RelationshipGroup_Key IS NULL THEN C.ClientName ELSE RG.RelatedGroupDesc END AS [Depositor Name]
      ,RG_Level1CIF.CIFNumber AS RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
      ,RG_Level1CIF.ClientName AS RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S','T') THEN A.CurrentBalance ELSE 0.00 END AS [Total Deposit Balance]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S') THEN A.CurrentBalance ELSE 0.00 END AS [Demand Deposit Balance]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('T') THEN A.CurrentBalance ELSE 0.00 END AS [CD Balance]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S','T') THEN A.MTDAverageBal ELSE 0.00 END AS [Total Deposit MTD Average Balance]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S') THEN A.MTDAverageBal ELSE 0.00 END AS [Demand Deposit MTD Average Balance]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S','T') THEN A.CurrentBalance * A.InterestRate ELSE 0.00 END AS [Total Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S') THEN A.CurrentBalance * A.InterestRate ELSE 0.00 END AS [Demand Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S','T') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Total Deposit # of Accts]
      ,CASE WHEN A.AccountType IN ('D','S') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Demand Deposit # of Accts]
  INTO #DepositorAccountLevel
  FROM #consumeAccount A
  JOIN #EOMDates EOMD
    ON A.As_Of_Date = EOMD.ActualDate_DateTime2
  JOIN #consumeClient C
    ON A.Client_Key = C.Client_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClientRelationshipGroup CRG
    ON C.Client_Key = CRG.Client_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeRelationshipGroup RG
    ON ISNULL(CRG.RelationshipGroup_Key,'ABCXYZ') = RG.RelationshipGroup_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClient RG_Level1CIF
    ON ISNULL(RG.Client_Key,'ABCXYZ') = RG_Level1CIF.Client_Key
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Summarize and rank per month AT THE DEPOSITOR/CLIENT BRANCH LEVEL
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DepositorRank_ClientLevel') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #DepositorRank_ClientLevel;

SELECT AL.[As_Of_Date]
      ,AL.Client_Key
      ,TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) AS [Depositor Number]
      ,C.Branch_BK AS [Depositor Branch_BK]
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown') AS [Depositor Branch Number]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown') AS [Depositor Branch Name]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') AS [Depositor Branch Division]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchRegion, 'Unknown') AS [Depositor Branch Region]
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], C.Branch_BK ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Total Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch] -- rank within each month and depositor branch
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], C.Branch_BK ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch] -- rank within each month and depositor branch
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Total Deposit Balance Rank - Division] -- rank within each month and division
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Division] -- rank within each month and division
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date] ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Total Deposit Balance Rank - Bank] -- rank within each month across entire bank
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date] ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Bank] -- rank within each month across entire bank
  INTO #DepositorRank_ClientLevel
  FROM #DepositorAccountLevel AL
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClient C
    ON AL.Client_Key = C.Client_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeBranch B -- join on the Depositor/Client branch
    ON C.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeOfficer O
    ON C.Officer_BK = O.Officer_BK
 GROUP BY AL.[As_Of_Date]
      ,AL.Client_Key
      ,TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number])
      ,C.Branch_BK
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchRegion, 'Unknown');


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- summarize and rank per month AT THE ACCOUNT BRANCH LEVEL
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel;

SELECT AL.[As_Of_Date]
      ,AL.[YearMonth]
      ,AL.[DashYearMonthCd]
      ,AL.[MonthSeq#]
      ,AL.Client_Key
      ,AL.[Depositor Type]
      ,TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) AS [Depositor Number]
      ,AL.[Depositor Name]
      ,AL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
      ,AL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
      ,COALESCE(O.Officer_BK, 'Unknown') AS Officer_BK
      ,CASE WHEN AL.[Depositor Type] = 'Client' THEN COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'No Current Officer Assigned (XXX)') ELSE COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'Unknown') END AS [Officer]
      ,O.DateTerminated AS [Officer Date Terminated]
      ,AL.Branch_BK AS [Account Branch_BK]
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch Number]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch Name]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch Division]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchRegion, 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch Region]
      ,C.OriginalClientDate AS [Original Client Date]
      ,SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) AS [Total Deposit Balance]
      ,SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) AS [Demand Deposit Balance]
      ,SUM(AL.[CD Balance]) AS [CD Balance]
      ,SUM(AL.[Total Deposit MTD Average Balance]) AS [Total Deposit MTD Average Balance]
      ,SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit MTD Average Balance]) AS [Demand Deposit MTD Average Balance]
      ,SUM(AL.[Total Deposit BalancexRate]) AS [Total Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit BalancexRate]) AS [Demand Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,SUM(AL.[Total Deposit # of Accts]) AS [Total Deposit # of Accts]
      ,SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit # of Accts]) AS [Demand Deposit # of Accts]
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], AL.Branch_BK ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Total Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch] -- rank depositors within each month and branch
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], AL.Branch_BK ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ASC) AS [Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch] -- rank depositors within each month and branch
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Total Deposit Balance]) DESC, AL.Branch_BK ASC) AS [Total Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] -- rank account branches within each month and depositor
      ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY AL.[As_Of_Date], TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number]) ORDER BY SUM(AL.[Demand Deposit Balance]) DESC, AL.Branch_BK ASC) AS [Demand Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] -- rank account branches within each month and depositor
  INTO #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel
  FROM #DepositorAccountLevel AL
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClient C
    ON AL.Client_Key = C.Client_Key
  LEFT JOIN #consumeBranch B -- join on the Account Branch
    ON AL.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeOfficer O
    ON C.Officer_BK = O.Officer_BK
 GROUP BY AL.[As_Of_Date]
      ,AL.[YearMonth]
      ,AL.[DashYearMonthCd]
      ,AL.[MonthSeq#]
      ,AL.Client_Key
      ,AL.[Depositor Type]
      ,TRIM(AL.[Depositor Number])
      ,AL.[Depositor Name]
      ,AL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
      ,AL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
      ,COALESCE(O.Officer_BK, 'Unknown')
      ,CASE WHEN AL.[Depositor Type] = 'Client' THEN COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'No Current Officer Assigned (XXX)') ELSE COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'Unknown') END
      ,O.DateTerminated
      ,AL.Branch_BK
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown')
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchRegion, 'Unknown')
      ,C.OriginalClientDate


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- find distinct list of all depositors who were in the top 1000 at any point
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TopDepositors') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #TopDepositors;

SELECT DISTINCT [Depositor Number]
  INTO #TopDepositors
  FROM #DepositorRank_ClientLevel DR
 WHERE DR.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Division] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Division] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Bank] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Bank] <= 1000
UNION 
SELECT DISTINCT [Depositor Number]
  FROM #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel DR
 WHERE DR.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch] <= 1000
    OR DR.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch] <= 1000


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- pull all depositors who were in the top 1000 at some point plus additional details
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TopDepositors_WithDetails') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #TopDepositors_WithDetails;

WITH AccountBranchStrings AS (
   SELECT [Depositor Number]
         ,As_Of_Date
         ,STRING_AGG([Account Branch Name], '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY [Demand Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] ASC) AS [Account Branch List]
         ,COUNT(DISTINCT [Account Branch Number]) AS [Number of Account Branches]
     FROM #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel
    GROUP BY [Depositor Number]
            ,As_Of_Date
)
, CorpAdminMainAccountBranch_TotalDeposit AS (
   SELECT [Depositor Number]
         ,As_Of_Date
     FROM #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel
    WHERE [Total Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] = 1
      AND [Account Branch Number] = '800' -- Corp Admin
    GROUP BY [Depositor Number]
            ,As_Of_Date
)
, CorpAdminMainAccountBranch_DemandDeposit AS (
   SELECT [Depositor Number]
         ,As_Of_Date
     FROM #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel
    WHERE [Demand Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] = 1
      AND [Account Branch Number] = '800' -- Corp Admin
    GROUP BY [Depositor Number]
            ,As_Of_Date
)
SELECT DR_ABL.As_Of_Date
      ,DR_ABL.YearMonth
      ,DR_ABL.DashYearMonthCd
      ,DR_ABL.MonthSeq#
      ,DR_ABL.[Depositor Type]
      ,DR_ABL.[Depositor Number]
      ,DR_ABL.[Depositor Name]
      ,DR_ABL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_CIFNumber
      ,DR_ABL.RelationshipGroup_Level1_ClientName
      ,DR_ABL.Officer_BK
      ,DR_ABL.[Officer]
      ,DR_ABL.[Officer Date Terminated]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch_BK]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch Number]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch Name]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch Division]
      ,DR_ABL.[Account Branch Region]
      ,CASE WHEN CorpAdmin_TotalDeposit.[Depositor Number] IS NOT NULL AND DR_ABL.[Total Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] = 2 THEN 1 -- select second branch rank as main account branch if #1 is Corp Admin
            WHEN CorpAdmin_TotalDeposit.[Depositor Number] IS NULL AND DR_ABL.[Total Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] = 1 THEN 1 -- select first branch rank as main account branch if #1 is NOT Corp Admin
            ELSE 0 
       END AS [Total Deposit - Main Account Branch Flag]
      ,CASE WHEN CorpAdmin_DemandDeposit.[Depositor Number] IS NOT NULL AND DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] = 2 THEN 1  -- select second branch rank as main account branch if #1 is Corp Admin
            WHEN CorpAdmin_DemandDeposit.[Depositor Number] IS NULL AND DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit - Account Branch Rank Per Depositor] = 1 THEN 1  -- select first branch rank as main account branch if #1 is NOT Corp Admin
            ELSE 0 
       END AS [Demand Deposit - Main Account Branch Flag]
      ,ISNULL(ABStr.[Account Branch List], 'Unknown') AS [Account Branch List]
      ,ABStr.[Number of Account Branches] 
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch_BK]
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch Number]
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch Name]
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch Division]
      ,DR_CL.[Depositor Branch Region]
      ,DR_ABL.[Original Client Date]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit Balance]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit Balance]
      ,DR_ABL.[CD Balance]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit MTD Average Balance]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit MTD Average Balance]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit BalancexRate]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit # of Accts]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit # of Accts]
      ,DR_ABL.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch]
      ,DR_ABL.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Account Branch]
      ,DR_CL.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch]
      ,DR_CL.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Depositor Branch]
      ,DR_CL.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Division]
      ,DR_CL.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Division]
      ,DR_CL.[Total Deposit Balance Rank - Bank]
      ,DR_CL.[Demand Deposit Balance Rank - Bank]
  INTO #TopDepositors_WithDetails
  FROM #TopDepositors TD
  JOIN #DepositorRank_AccountBranchLevel DR_ABL
    ON TD.[Depositor Number] = DR_ABL.[Depositor Number]
  -- many-to-one join due to different level of granularity, DR_CL attributes included in the select above will be duplicated, Power BI report will handle this accordingly as required by the various visuals
  JOIN #DepositorRank_ClientLevel DR_CL
    ON DR_ABL.As_Of_Date = DR_CL.As_Of_Date
   AND DR_ABL.Client_Key = DR_CL.Client_Key
   AND DR_ABL.[Depositor Number] = DR_CL.[Depositor Number]
  LEFT JOIN AccountBranchStrings ABStr
    ON DR_ABL.[Depositor Number] = ABStr.[Depositor Number]
   AND DR_ABL.As_Of_Date = ABStr.As_Of_Date
  LEFT JOIN CorpAdminMainAccountBranch_TotalDeposit AS CorpAdmin_TotalDeposit
    ON DR_ABL.[Depositor Number] = CorpAdmin_TotalDeposit.[Depositor Number]
   AND DR_ABL.As_Of_Date = CorpAdmin_TotalDeposit.As_Of_Date
  LEFT JOIN CorpAdminMainAccountBranch_DemandDeposit AS CorpAdmin_DemandDeposit
    ON DR_ABL.[Depositor Number] = CorpAdmin_DemandDeposit.[Depositor Number]
   AND DR_ABL.As_Of_Date = CorpAdmin_DemandDeposit.As_Of_Date
;

RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

DECLARE @Env VARCHAR(10)
       ,@ClientAlertsDatasetID VARCHAR(500)

SELECT @Env = UPPER([Value])
FROM [metadata].[sysvalsconfig]
WHERE [Key] = 'CurrentEnvironment'

SELECT @ClientAlertsDatasetID = 
         CASE @Env
            WHEN 'DEV' THEN 'cee4106d-97cc-4d6c-b3ab-e379ea281d36'
            WHEN 'TEST' THEN 'cee4106d-97cc-4d6c-b3ab-e379ea281d36'
            WHEN 'PROD' THEN '1'
            ELSE 'Unknown'
         END

-- PBI_ClientAlertsDatasetID
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM [metadata].[sysvalsconfig] WHERE [Key] = 'PBI_ClientAlertsDatasetID')
BEGIN

   -- insert row
   INSERT INTO [metadata].[sysvalsconfig] ([Key], [Value], [Create_date], [Update_date])
   SELECT 'PBI_ClientAlertsDatasetID'
         ,@ClientAlertsDatasetID
         ,SYSDATETIME()
         ,SYSDATETIME()

END
ELSE
BEGIN

   --update row
   UPDATE [metadata].[sysvalsconfig]
      SET Value = @ClientAlertsDatasetID
         ,Update_date = SYSDATETIME()
    WHERE [Key] = 'PBI_ClientAlertsDatasetID'

END
