CREATE PROC [banner_security].[Insider_permissions] AS
/*****************************************************************************************
Programmer:   		James Pinkerton

Created Date:	  	06/30/2023

Project:   			3522 - New Data Ecosystem

Intended Audience: 	Data Governance

Intended Use: 		Securit Permissions

Notes:				N/A

!Attention: 	  	N/A

Change Log:   		2022-06-30 - JWP - Initial development
					2024-05-17 - JWP - Updated to add blank Insider codes to all employees
*****************************************************************************************/

/*****************************************************************************************
Variable delcaration
*****************************************************************************************/

DECLARE @DataDate date = (
					SELECT
						MAX(DT.ActualDate)
					FROM
						consume.DimTime AS DT
					WHERE
						DT.CurrDay = 'Y'
					)

/*****************************************************************************************
Generate possible security values
*****************************************************************************************/

--SELECT DISTINCT
--	DC.InsiderCode
--INTO #InsiderCodes
--FROM
--	banner_security.InsiderSecurity AS DC
--WHERE
--	DC.InsiderCode IS NOT NULL
----	DC.As_Of_Date = @DataDate

BEGIN TRANSACTION

	--DELETE FROM banner_security.SecurityRoles
	--	WHERE
	--		(
	--		SecurityGrain			= 'Client'
	--		AND SecurityName		= 'InsiderClients'
	--		AND SecurityKeyGroup	= 'CIF_Insiders'
	--		)
	--		OR
	--		(
	--		SecurityGrain			= 'Client'
	--		AND SecurityName		= 'InsiderClients'
	--		AND SecurityKeyGroup	= 'CIF_NotInsiders'
	--		)

	INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityRoles
		(
		SecurityGrain
		,SecurityName
		,SecurityKey
		,Active
		)
		SELECT DISTINCT
			'Client'
			,'InsiderClients'
			,DC.InsiderCode
			,1
		FROM
			banner_security.InsiderSecurity AS DC
		WHERE
			DC.InsiderCode IS NOT NULL
			AND NOT EXISTS 
				(
				SELECT TOP 1
					SR.SecurityKey
				FROM
					banner_security.SecurityRoles AS SR
				WHERE
					SR.SecurityKey = DC.InsiderCode
					AND SR.Active = 1
				)
		--Insert blank Insider codes
		UNION ALL
		SELECT
			'Client'
			,'InsiderClients'
			,''
			,1
		WHERE
			NOT EXISTS 
				(
				SELECT TOP 1
					SR.SecurityKey
				FROM
					banner_security.SecurityRoles AS SR
				WHERE
					SR.SecurityKey = ''
					AND SecurityGrain = 'Client'
					AND SecurityName = 'InsiderClients'
				)			


COMMIT

/*****************************************************************************************
Generate security assignments
*****************************************************************************************/

--Temporary list of users until official list can be generated
--SELECT '60*&#41259' AS Employee_BK INTO #InsiderViewers
--UNION ALL SELECT '60*&#51150'
--UNION ALL SELECT '60*&#21150'
--UNION ALL SELECT '60*&#7425'

--SELECT '60*&#23895' AS Employee_BK INTO #NonInsiderViewers
--UNION ALL SELECT '60*&#3835'
--UNION ALL SELECT '60*&#41562'
--UNION ALL SELECT '60*&#5203'
	

--SELECT
--	*
--INTO #InsiderAssignments
--FROM
--	#InsiderViewers AS InsiderViewers
--	INNER JOIN banner_security.SecurityRoles AS SecurityRoles
--		ON  SecurityGrain = 'Client'
--		AND SecurityName = 'InsiderClients'

--SELECT
--	NonInsiderViewers.Employee_BK
--INTO #NonInsiderAssignments
--FROM
--	#NonInsiderViewers AS NonInsiderViewers
--	INNER JOIN banner_security.SecurityRoles AS SecurityRoles
--		ON  SecurityGrain = 'Client'
--		AND SecurityName = 'InsiderClients'
--		AND SecurityKeyGroup = 'CIF_NotInsiders'



	
/*****************************************************************************************
Insert security assignments
*****************************************************************************************/


BEGIN TRANSACTION

	DELETE FROM banner_security.SecurityAssignment
		WHERE
			SecurityGrain		= 'Client'
			AND SecurityName	= 'InsiderClients'		

	--Assigned Insider Code Access based on Silverlake permissions
	INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityAssignment
		(
		[User]
		,Employee_BK
		,SecurityGrain
		,SecurityName
		,SecurityKey
		,Active
		,SecurityRoleKey
		)
	SELECT DISTINCT	
		Employee.OfficerEmail
		,Employee.Employee_BK
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityGrain
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityName
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityKey
		,1
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityRoleKey
	FROM
		banner_security.InsiderSecurity AS InsiderViewers
		INNER JOIN banner_security.SecurityRoles AS SecurityRoles
			ON  SecurityRoles.SecurityGrain = 'Client'
			AND SecurityRoles.SecurityName = 'InsiderClients'
			AND SecurityRoles.SecurityKey = InsiderViewers.InsiderCode
		INNER JOIN consume.Officer AS Employee
			ON Employee.UserName_BK = InsiderViewers.UserName_BK
			AND Employee.DateTerminated IS NULL
	WHERE
		InsiderViewers.InsiderSecurity = 'All-Access'

	--Assigned Insider Code Access based on exceptions
	INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityAssignment
		(
		[User]
		,Employee_BK
		,SecurityGrain
		,SecurityName
		,SecurityKey
		,Active 		
		,SecurityRoleKey
		)
	SELECT DISTINCT	
		Employee.OfficerEmail
		,Employee.Employee_BK
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityGrain
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityName
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityKey
		,1
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityRoleKey
	FROM
		banner_security.SecurityExceptions AS ExceptionViewers
		INNER JOIN banner_security.SecurityRoles AS SecurityRoles
			ON  SecurityRoles.SecurityGrain = 'Client'
			AND SecurityRoles.SecurityName = 'InsiderClients'
			AND SecurityRoles.SecurityRoleKey = ExceptionViewers.SecurityRoleKey
		INNER JOIN consume.Officer AS Employee
			ON Employee.Employee_BK = ExceptionViewers.Employee_BK
			AND Employee.DateTerminated IS NULL

	--Assign Insider Code Access for blank values
	INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityAssignment
		(
		[User]
		,Employee_BK
		,SecurityGrain
		,SecurityName
		,SecurityKey
		,Active 		
		,SecurityRoleKey
		)
	SELECT DISTINCT	
		Employee.OfficerEmail
		,Employee.Employee_BK
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityGrain
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityName
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityKey
		,1
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityRoleKey
	FROM
		banner_security.SecurityRoles AS SecurityRoles
		INNER JOIN consume.Officer AS Employee
			ON Employee.DateTerminated IS NULL
	WHERE
			SecurityRoles.SecurityGrain = 'Client'
			AND SecurityRoles.SecurityName = 'InsiderClients'
			AND SecurityRoles.SecurityKey = ''


COMMIT
GO

properties.description: Script used to adjust definitions of screens and thresholds

content.query:
/*
Adjust the following screen definitions:

Thresholds:
Set Deceased with No Date to 10
Set Future-dated deceased date to 10
Set Email 1 #ofRecords > 20
Set Email 2 Percent > 1 %
Names:
Adjust Invalid Phone Numbers to Phone Numbers Invalid
Adjust Zero Value Phone Numbers to Phone Numbers Blank
Adjust Category:
Adjust Invalid Phone Numbers to Accuracy 
Adjust Definition:
Adjust Zip code rule to use CFFORN = 'N' and not CFFORC = '' for filter
*/

--Update Thresholds
UPDATE dqf.dq_threshold SET score_low_value = 10
FROM dqf.dq_threshold
INNER JOIN dqf.dq_screen 
    ON dq_screen.screen_key = dq_threshold.screen_key
WHERE screen_name  = 'Deceased with No Date'

UPDATE dqf.dq_threshold SET score_low_value = 10
FROM dqf.dq_threshold
INNER JOIN dqf.dq_screen 
    ON dq_screen.screen_key = dq_threshold.screen_key
WHERE screen_name  = 'Future-dated deceased date'

UPDATE dqf.dq_threshold SET score_low_value = 20
FROM dqf.dq_threshold
INNER JOIN dqf.dq_screen 
    ON dq_screen.screen_key = dq_threshold.screen_key
WHERE screen_name  = 'Invalid CIF Email 1'

UPDATE dqf.dq_threshold SET score_low_value = 0.01, threshold_type = 'Percentage'
FROM dqf.dq_threshold
INNER JOIN dqf.dq_screen 
    ON dq_screen.screen_key = dq_threshold.screen_key
WHERE screen_name  = 'Invalid CIF Email 2'

--Adjust Names/Category
UPDATE dqf.dq_screen SET screen_name = 'Phone Numbers Invalid', screen_category = 'Accuracy' WHERE screen_name = 'Invalid Phone Numbers'
UPDATE dqf.dq_screen SET screen_name = 'Phone Numbers Not Populated' WHERE screen_name = 'Zero Value Phone Numbers'

--Adjust Definition (Also change from LDQ Raw to JhaKnow)
UPDATE dqf.dq_screen 
SET screen_system_id = 3
   ,compare_to_system_id = 3
   ,screen_type = 'Record Log'
   ,screen_script = 'SELECT JhaKeyCustomer + ''_'' + CAST(CONVERT(DATE, JhaPostingDate) AS VARCHAR(20)) AS Universal_rec_key, ''1'' AS dq_result, CAST(CFCIF# AS VARCHAR(20)) + ''_'' + CAST(CFCITY AS VARCHAR(20)) + ''_'' + CAST(CFSTAT AS VARCHAR(2)) + ''_'' + CAST(CFZIP AS VARCHAR(2)) AS dq_value
FROM
	Archive.[silverlake.jha].CFMAST 
WHERE
	ISNULL(CFZIP, ''0'') = ''0''
	AND CFFORN = ''N''
	AND JhaPostingDate = (SELECT CAST(currday AS date) FROM BannerInternal.BI.vwTimeParameters)
	AND JhaBankId = ''60'''
   ,compare_to_script = 'SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE COUNT(*) END AS TableCount 
FROM
	Archive.[silverlake.jha].CFMAST 
WHERE
	CFFORN = ''N''
	AND JhaPostingDate = (SELECT CAST(currday AS date) FROM BannerInternal.BI.vwTimeParameters)
	AND JhaBankId = ''60'''
WHERE screen_name = 'Missing CFMAST Mail Zip Codes'

UPDATE dqf.dq_threshold 
SET score_low_value = 20 , modified_date = GETDATE()
FROM dqf.dq_screen 
INNER JOIN dqf.dq_threshold
	ON dq_screen.screen_key = dq_threshold.screen_key
WHERE screen_name 
IN (
'Deposit Accounts with Invalid GL Product'
)

UPDATE dqf.dq_threshold 
SET score_low_value = 5 , modified_date = GETDATE() FROM dqf.dq_screen 
INNER JOIN dqf.dq_threshold
	ON dq_screen.screen_key = dq_threshold.screen_key
WHERE screen_name 
IN (
'Future-dated deposits'
)

UPDATE dqf.dq_threshold 
SET score_low_value = 5 , modified_date = GETDATE() FROM dqf.dq_screen 
INNER JOIN dqf.dq_threshold
	ON dq_screen.screen_key = dq_threshold.screen_key
WHERE screen_name 
IN (
'Open deposits with a closed date')

UPDATE	metadata.datapullconfig
	SET datapullconfig.active_flag = 0
WHERE datapullconfig.source_system = 'BannerVision'

EXEC [dqf].[usp_CreateScreen]
@test = 0
,@screen_category = 'Validity'
,@description = 'Open loans assigned to branch 91 where Risk Rating is 6+'
,@data_domain = 'Loans'
,@owner = '41602'--'Oana Norman'--
,@processing_seq = 10
,@screen_script = 'SELECT JhaKeyAccount + ''_'' + CAST(CONVERT(DATE, LNMAST.JhaPostingDate) AS VARCHAR(20)) AS Universal_rec_key, ''1'' AS dq_result, CAST(BR# AS VARCHAR(3)) + ''_'' + CAST(STATUS AS VARCHAR(3)) + ''_'' + CAST(LNMAST.WCHCOD AS VARCHAR(20)) AS dq_value FROM Archive.[silverlake.jha].LNMAST AS LNMAST WHERE LNMAST.JhaPostingDate = (SELECT currday FROM BannerInternal.BI.vwTimeparameters) AND LNMAST.JhaBankId LIKE ''60'' AND BR# = 91 AND STATUS NOT IN (2, 8) AND LNMAST.WCHCOD >= 6 UNION SELECT ''0'' AS Universal_rec_key,''0'' AS dq_result,''0'' AS dq_value'
,@screen_type = 'Record Log'
,@screen_result_type = 'String'
,@is_active = 1
,@compare_to_script = 'SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE COUNT(*) END AS TableCount FROM Archive.[silverlake.jha].LNMAST WHERE JhaPostingDate = (SELECT CAST(currday AS date) FROM BannerInternal.BI.vwTimeParameters) AND JhaBankId = ''60'' AND STATUS NOT IN ( 2, 8 ) AND BR# = 91'
,@screen_name = 'Branch 91 loans with Risk Rating 6+'
,@screen_system_id = 3
,@compare_to_system_id = 3
,@event_class = 'Warning'
,@threshold_method = '#ofRecords'
,@score_low_value = 1
,@score_high_value = 100





EXEC [dqf].[usp_CreateScreen]
@test = 0
,@screen_category = 'Validity'
,@description = 'Open loans assigned to Dept Q where Payment Code is 6'
,@data_domain = 'Loans'
,@owner = '41602'--'Oana Norman'--
,@processing_seq = 10
,@screen_script = 'SELECT JhaKeyAccount + ''_'' + CAST(CONVERT(DATE, LNMAST.JhaPostingDate) AS VARCHAR(20)) AS Universal_rec_key, ''1'' AS dq_result, CAST(LNMAST.DEPTCD AS VARCHAR(3)) + ''_'' + CAST(LNMAST.PMTCOD AS VARCHAR(20)) AS dq_value FROM Archive.[silverlake.jha].LNMAST AS LNMAST WHERE LNMAST.JhaPostingDate = (SELECT currday FROM BannerInternal.BI.vwTimeparameters) AND LNMAST.JhaBankId LIKE ''60'' AND STATUS NOT IN (2, 8) AND LNMAST.DEPTCD LIKE ''Q'' AND LNMAST.PMTCOD = 6 UNION SELECT ''0'' AS Universal_rec_key,''0'' AS dq_result,''0'' AS dq_value'
,@screen_type = 'Record Log'
,@screen_result_type = 'String'
,@is_active = 1
,@compare_to_script = 'SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE COUNT(*) END AS TableCount FROM Archive.[silverlake.jha].LNMAST WHERE JhaPostingDate = (SELECT CAST(currday AS date) FROM BannerInternal.BI.vwTimeParameters) AND JhaBankId = ''60'' AND STATUS NOT IN ( 2, 8 ) AND DEPTCD LIKE ''Q'''
,@screen_name = 'Dept Code Q Loans with Payment Code = 6'
,@screen_system_id = 3
,@compare_to_system_id = 3
,@event_class = 'Warning'
,@threshold_method = '#ofRecords'
,@score_low_value = 1
,@score_high_value = 100

EXEC [dqf].[usp_CreateScreen]
@test = 0
,@screen_category = 'Accuracy'
,@description = 'Terminated officers assigned to CIFs with open accounts'
,@data_domain = 'Client'
,@owner = '4827'
,@processing_seq = 10
,@screen_script = 'SELECT DISTINCT CFMAST.JhaKeyCustomer + ''_'' + CAST(CONVERT(DATE, CFMAST.JhaPostingDate) AS VARCHAR(20)) AS Universal_rec_key, ''1'' AS dq_result, CAST(CFMAST.CFCIF# AS VARCHAR(7)) + ''_'' + CAST(CFOFFR AS VARCHAR(6)) + ''_'' + CAST(CONVERT(DATE, TerminationDate) AS VARCHAR(20)) AS dq_value FROM Archive.[silverlake.jha].CFMAST AS CFMAST INNER JOIN Archive.[silverlake.jha].CFACCT AS CFACCT ON CFMAST.JhaPostingDate = CFACCT.JhaPostingDate AND CFMAST.JhaKeyCustomer = CFACCT.JhaKeyCustomer INNER JOIN	Archive.[silverlake.jha].QAPPMST AS QAPPMST ON CFACCT.JhaPostingDate = QAPPMST.JhaPostingDate AND CFACCT.JhaKeyAccount = QAPPMST.JhaKeyAccount LEFT JOIN BannerInternal.BI.vwOfficerDim AS OfficerDim ON CFMAST.CFOFFR = OfficerDim.OfficerCd WHERE CFMAST.JhaPostingDate = (SELECT currday FROM BannerInternal.BI.vwTimeparameters) AND CFMAST.JhaBankId LIKE ''60'' AND OfficerDim.TerminationDate IS NOT NULL AND QAPPMST.STATUS NOT IN (2, 8) UNION SELECT ''0'' AS Universal_rec_key,''0'' AS dq_result,''0'' AS dq_value'
,@screen_type = 'Record Log'
,@screen_result_type = 'String'
,@is_active = 1

content.query:
UPDATE dqf.dq_screen
SET is_active = 0
WHERE screen_key = 1

DECLARE @ScreenKey AS INT
SET @ScreenKey = (SELECT screen_key FROM dqf.dq_screen WHERE description LIKE '%SIC 65%')
SELECT @ScreenKey

UPDATE dqf.dq_screen
SET is_active = 0
WHERE screen_key = @ScreenKey

/*****************************************************************************************
Programmer:   		James Pinkerton

Created Date:	  	06/30/2023

Project:   			3522 - New Data Ecosystem

Intended Audience: 	Data Governance

Intended Use: 		Securit Permissions

Notes:				N/A

!Attention: 	  	N/A

Change Log:   		2023-06-30 - JWP - Initial development
					2024-04-16 - JWP - Adjusted to source Status_BK from Consume.Account instead of creating it
*****************************************************************************************/

/*****************************************************************************************
Variable delcaration
*****************************************************************************************/

DECLARE @DataDate date = --'11/13/2023'
					(
					SELECT
						MAX(DT.ActualDate)
					FROM
						consume.DimTime AS DT
					WHERE
						DT.CurrDay = 'Y'
					)

/*****************************************************************************************
Generate possible security values
*****************************************************************************************/

SELECT DISTINCT
	Status_BK AS Status_BK
INTO #DormantEscheatCodes
FROM
	consume.Account AS DC
WHERE
	DC.As_Of_Date = @DataDate

BEGIN TRANSACTION

	INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityRoles
		(
		SecurityGrain
		,SecurityName
		,SecurityKey
		,Active
		)
		SELECT DISTINCT
			'Account'
			,'Dormant/Escheat'
			--,'Acct_IsDormantEscheat'  'Acct_IsNotDormantEscheat'
			,DC.Status_BK
			,1
		FROM
			#DormantEscheatCodes AS DC
		WHERE
			--DC.Status_BK IN ('D*&#0','D*&#3','S*&#0','S*&#3','T*&#5')
			NOT EXISTS 
				(
				SELECT TOP 1
					SR.SecurityKey
				FROM
					banner_security.SecurityRoles AS SR
				WHERE
					SR.SecurityKey = DC.Status_BK
					AND SR.Active = 1
				)

	INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityRolesGrouping
		(
		SecurityRoleKey
		,SecurityKeyGroup
		,Active
		)
		SELECT DISTINCT
			SecurityRoles.SecurityRoleKey
			,CASE
				WHEN DC.Status_BK IN ('60*&#0D*&#0','60*&#0D*&#3','60*&#0S*&#0','60*&#0S*&#3','60*&#0T*&#5')
					THEN 'Acct_IsDormantEscheat'
				ELSE
					'Acct_IsNotDormantEscheat'
				END
			,1
		FROM
			#DormantEscheatCodes AS DC
			INNER JOIN banner_security.SecurityRoles AS SecurityRoles
				ON SecurityRoles.SecurityGrain = 'Account'
				AND SecurityRoles.SecurityName = 'Dormant/Escheat'
				AND SecurityRoles.SecurityKey = DC.Status_BK
		WHERE
			NOT EXISTS 
				(
				SELECT TOP 1
					SR.SecurityRoleKey
				FROM
					banner_security.SecurityRolesGrouping AS SR
				WHERE
					SR.SecurityRoleKey = SecurityRoles.SecurityRoleKey
					AND SR.Active = 1
				)


COMMIT

/*****************************************************************************************
Generate security assignments
*****************************************************************************************/

----Temporary list of users until official list can be generated
--SELECT '60*&#41259' AS Employee_BK INTO #DormantEscheatViewers
--UNION ALL SELECT '60*&#51150'
--UNION ALL SELECT '60*&#21150'
--UNION ALL SELECT '60*&#7425'

--SELECT '60*&#23895' AS Employee_BK INTO #NonDormantEscheatViewers
--UNION ALL SELECT '60*&#3835'
--UNION ALL SELECT '60*&#41562'
--UNION ALL SELECT '60*&#5203'
	
	
/*****************************************************************************************
Insert security assignments
*****************************************************************************************/


BEGIN TRANSACTION

	DELETE FROM banner_security.SecurityAssignment
		WHERE
			SecurityGrain		= 'Account'
			AND SecurityName	= 'Dormant/Escheat'		

	INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityAssignment
		(
		[User]
		,Employee_BK
		,SecurityGrain
		,SecurityName
		,SecurityName_SubType
		,SecurityKey
		,SecurityRoleKey
		,Comments
		,Active 		
		)
	SELECT DISTINCT	
		Employee.OfficerEmail
		,Employee.Employee_BK
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityGrain
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityName
		,NULL
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityKey
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityRoleKey
		,NULL
		,1
	FROM
		banner_security.DormantSecurity AS DormantEscheatViewers
		--#DormantEscheatViewers AS DormantEscheatViewers
		INNER JOIN banner_security.SecurityRoles AS SecurityRoles
			ON  SecurityRoles.SecurityGrain = 'Account'
			AND SecurityRoles.SecurityName = 'Dormant/Escheat'
		INNER JOIN consume.Officer AS Employee
			ON Employee.UserName_BK = DormantEscheatViewers.UserName_BK
			AND Employee.As_Of_Date = @DataDate
			AND Employee.DateTerminated IS NULL
	WHERE
		DormantEscheatViewers.DormantSecurity = 'All-Access'

	INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityAssignment
		(
		[User]
		,Employee_BK
		,SecurityGrain
		,SecurityName
		,SecurityName_SubType
		,SecurityKey
		,SecurityRoleKey
		,Comments
		,Active 		
		)
	SELECT DISTINCT	
		Employee.OfficerEmail
		,Employee.Employee_BK
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityGrain
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityName
		,NULL
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityKey
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityRoleKey
		,NULL
		,1
	FROM
		banner_security.DormantSecurity AS NonDormantEscheatViewers
		--#NonDormantEscheatViewers AS NonDormantEscheatViewers
		INNER JOIN banner_security.SecurityRoles AS SecurityRoles
			ON  SecurityRoles.SecurityGrain = 'Account'
			AND SecurityRoles.SecurityName = 'Dormant/Escheat'
		INNER JOIN banner_security.SecurityRolesGrouping AS SecurityRolesGrouping
			ON SecurityRolesGrouping.SecurityRoleKey = SecurityRoles.SecurityRoleKey
			AND SecurityRolesGrouping.SecurityKeyGroup = 'Acct_IsNotDormantEscheat'
		INNER JOIN consume.Officer AS Employee
			ON Employee.UserName_BK = NonDormantEscheatViewers.UserName_BK
			AND Employee.As_Of_Date = @DataDate
			AND Employee.DateTerminated IS NULL
	WHERE
		NOT
			(
			NonDormantEscheatViewers.DormantSecurity = 'All-Access'
			)


	INSERT INTO banner_security.SecurityAssignment
		(
		[User]
		,Employee_BK
		,SecurityGrain
		,SecurityName
		,SecurityName_SubType
		,SecurityKey
		,SecurityRoleKey
		,Comments
		,Active 		
		)
	SELECT DISTINCT	
		Employee.OfficerEmail
		,ExceptionViewers.Employee_BK
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityGrain
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityName
		,NULL
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityKey
		,SecurityRoles.SecurityRoleKey
		,NULL
		,1
	FROM
		banner_security.SecurityExceptions AS ExceptionViewers
		INNER JOIN banner_security.SecurityRoles AS SecurityRoles
			ON  SecurityRoles.SecurityGrain = 'Account'
			AND SecurityRoles.SecurityName = 'Dormant/Escheat'
			AND SecurityRoles.SecurityRoleKey = ExceptionViewers.SecurityRoleKey
		INNER JOIN consume.Officer AS Employee
			ON Employee.Employee_BK = ExceptionViewers.Employee_BK
			AND Employee.As_Of_Date = @DataDate
			AND Employee.DateTerminated IS NULL

COMMIT TRANSACTION

GO

properties.description: This stored procedure will be created on the dvb dedicated pool

content.query:
/****** Object:  StoredProcedure [testing].[usp_HistoryLoad_Lookup]    Script Date: 7/16/2024 4:17:15 PM ******/
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO

SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE PROC [testing].[usp_HistoryLoad_Lookup] @staging_table_id [varchar](8000),@DateDelimiter [varchar](8000) AS BEGIN 
/***************************************************************************************************
	DECLARE VARIABLES
***************************************************************************************************/
--DECLARE @staging_table_id AS varchar(8000) = 'dljhdd_r_ddpar2_u_Combined_JHA'
--DECLARE @DateDelimiter AS varchar(8000) = 'As_Of_Date'
DECLARE @RowNumb AS int
DECLARE @SQL_Stmt AS nvarchar(MAX)
DECLARE @MinLoadDate AS date = 
(SELECT 
	CASE 
		WHEN CONVERT(nvarchar(50),SERVERPROPERTY('ServerName')) = 'ldw-prod-synapse' THEN '01/01/2021'
		WHEN CONVERT(nvarchar(50),SERVERPROPERTY('ServerName')) = 'ldw-test-synapse' THEN '03/10/2023'
		WHEN CONVERT(nvarchar(50),SERVERPROPERTY('ServerName')) = 'ldw-dev-synapse' THEN '03/10/2023'
	END 
)
/***************************************************************************************************
	HOUSEKEEPING
***************************************************************************************************/

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TrackingSatellites') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #TrackingSatellites;
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#HistoryLoad') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #HistoryLoad;
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#GroupedTables') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #GroupedTables;
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Calendar') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Calendar;
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Results') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Results;
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#StagingColumns') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #StagingColumns;


CREATE TABLE #HistoryLoad (
staging_table_id	nvarchar(257)
,complete_staging_table_id nvarchar(257)
,staging_table_name	nvarchar(200)
,DataDate	varchar(12)
)



CREATE TABLE #Calendar
	(
	ActualDate Date
	)


CREATE TABLE #Results (
staging_table_id	nvarchar(257)
,staging_table_name	nvarchar(200)
,deltalake_table_id	nvarchar(257)
,DataDates	nvarchar(MAX)
,complete_staging_table_id nvarchar(257)
)
WITH
	(
		DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
		HEAP
	)

/***************************************************************************************************
	BEGIN SCRIPT
***************************************************************************************************/
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--	Identify Tracking Satellites for each staging table
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

SELECT 
	REPLACE(staging_tables.staging_table_id, 'staging.', '') AS staging_table_id
	,staging_tables.staging_table_id AS complete_staging_table_id
	,CAST(staging_tables.staging_table_name AS nvarchar(200)) AS staging_table_name
	,LEFT(tracking_satellites.table_nq_id, LEN(tracking_satellites.table_nq_id)-1) + REPLACE(RIGHT(tracking_satellites.table_nq_id, 1),'h', 'b') AS tracking_satellite_id
	,LEFT(columns.column_nq_id, LEN(columns.column_nq_id)-1) + REPLACE(RIGHT(columns.column_nq_id, 1),'h', 'b') AS tracking_satellite_cdcit
	,'datavault' AS tracking_satellite_schema
	,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY tracking_satellites.table_nq_id DESC) AS RowNumb
INTO #TrackingSatellites
FROM
	dvb_core.staging_tables
		LEFT JOIN 	dvb_core.tracking_satellites
			ON tracking_satellites.staging_table_id = staging_tables.staging_table_id
		LEFT JOIN dvb_core.columns
			ON columns.table_nq_id = tracking_satellites.table_nq_id
			AND columns.column_nq_id LIKE '%_ith'
WHERE REPLACE(staging_tables.staging_table_id, 'staging.', '') = @staging_table_id


INSERT INTO #Calendar
	(ActualDate)

SELECT TOP 10000000
	ActualDate
FROM consume.DimTime
WHERE
	ActualDate >= @MinLoadDate
	AND DimTime.ActualDate <= (SELECT DimTime.ActualDate FROM consume.DimTime WHERE DimTime.CurrDay = 'Y')
	AND DimTime.SLProcDayInd = 'Y'
ORDER BY
	ActualDate DESC

;
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--	Obtain distinct cdc inscription time for each tracking satellite.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SET @RowNumb = 1
WHILE @RowNumb <= (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM #TrackingSatellites)
	BEGIN 
		SET @SQL_Stmt = 'INSERT INTO #HistoryLoad 
						SELECT 
							'+(SELECT QUOTENAME(#TrackingSatellites.staging_table_id, '''') FROM #TrackingSatellites WHERE #TrackingSatellites.RowNumb = @RowNumb)+' 
							,'+(SELECT QUOTENAME(#TrackingSatellites.complete_staging_table_id, '''') FROM #TrackingSatellites WHERE #TrackingSatellites.RowNumb = @RowNumb)+' 
							,'+(SELECT QUOTENAME(#TrackingSatellites.staging_table_name, '''') FROM #TrackingSatellites WHERE #TrackingSatellites.RowNumb = @RowNumb)+'
							,QUOTENAME(#Calendar.ActualDate, '''''''') AS DataDate 
						FROM #Calendar LEFT JOIN ' +(SELECT #TrackingSatellites.tracking_satellite_schema FROM #TrackingSatellites WHERE #TrackingSatellites.RowNumb = @RowNumb) +'.'+(SELECT #TrackingSatellites.tracking_satellite_id FROM #TrackingSatellites WHERE #TrackingSatellites.RowNumb = @RowNumb)+' 
						ON #Calendar.ActualDate = ' + (SELECT #TrackingSatellites.tracking_satellite_cdcit FROM #TrackingSatellites WHERE #TrackingSatellites.RowNumb = @RowNumb) + ' 
						WHERE ' + (SELECT #TrackingSatellites.tracking_satellite_cdcit FROM #TrackingSatellites WHERE #TrackingSatellites.RowNumb = @RowNumb) + ' IS NULL '
		EXECUTE sp_executesql @SQL_Stmt
		--PRINT @SQL_Stmt
		SET @RowNumb += 1
	END 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--	Create table if it does not exist
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE objects.object_id = OBJECT_ID('testing.HistoryLoad_Lookup'))
BEGIN 
CREATE TABLE [testing].[HistoryLoad_Lookup]
(
	[staging_table_id] [nvarchar](257) NOT NULL,
	[staging_table_name] [nvarchar](200) NOT NULL,
	[deltalake_table_id] [nvarchar](200) NOT NULL,
	[SQL_Stmt] [nvarchar](MAX) NOT NULL,
	[DataDate] [nvarchar](MAX) NULL,
	[DateDelimiter] [varchar](8000) NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	HEAP
)

END


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--	Prepare Results for insert into Destination (1 row for each staging table - dates have been compressed into a single column)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
INSERT INTO #Results
SELECT DISTINCT
	#HistoryLoad.staging_table_id
	,#HistoryLoad.staging_table_name
	,'Combined_JHA.' + UPPER(#HistoryLoad.staging_table_name) AS deltalake_table_id
	,STRING_AGG(CAST(#HistoryLoad.DataDate AS nvarchar(MAX)), ',') AS DataDates
	,#HistoryLoad.complete_staging_table_id

FROM
	#HistoryLoad
WHERE 
	#HistoryLoad.DataDate IS NOT NULL 
	AND #HistoryLoad.staging_table_id NOT IN ('odsban1_r_vwTimeDim_u_BI') --exclude specific staging tables that should not be included. 
GROUP BY staging_table_id, staging_table_name, complete_staging_table_id

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--	Identify all columns in the staging table and make the neccessary adjustments to pull from DeltaLake
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SELECT 
	#Results.staging_table_id
	,columns.name AS DVB_Name
	,REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(columns.name,'_dvb_row_id', 'ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY '+@DateDelimiter+' ASC)'), '_dvb_', ''), 'producttype_glproductcode', 'Product'), '_h', '_HK'), 'cdc_inscription_time',@DateDelimiter) AS Delta_Name
	,ROW_NUMBER()OVER(ORDER BY columns.column_id ASC) AS RowNumber
INTO #StagingColumns
FROM
	#Results
		INNER JOIN sys.columns
		ON columns.object_id = OBJECT_ID(complete_staging_table_id)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--	Truncate the table each time the procedure is run, this way we always ensure the most accurate data is available. 
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DELETE FROM testing.HistoryLoad_Lookup
WHERE HistoryLoad_Lookup.staging_table_name = (SELECT staging_table_name FROM #Results)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--	Identify the SQL stmt that needs to be executed against DeltaLake
--	Group together to provide a single cdc_inscription_time for each staging table. 
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
INSERT INTO testing.HistoryLoad_Lookup
	(staging_table_id
	,staging_table_name
	,deltalake_table_id
	,SQL_Stmt
	,DataDate
	,DateDelimiter)

SELECT 
	R.staging_table_id
	,R.staging_table_name
	,R.deltalake_table_id
	,CAST('SELECT ' + STRING_AGG(CAST(SC.Delta_Name + ' AS ' + SC.DVB_Name AS nvarchar(MAX)),',') + ' FROM Combined_JHA.' + UPPER(R.staging_table_name) AS nvarchar(MAX))  AS SQL_Stmt
	,R.DataDates
	,@DateDelimiter
FROM
	#Results AS R
		INNER JOIN #StagingColumns AS SC
			ON R.staging_table_id = SC.staging_table_id
GROUP BY R.staging_table_id, R.staging_table_name, R.deltalake_table_id, R.DataDates

END;
GO

properties.description: Update screen script and compare to use consume branch rather than deprecated business rule

content.query:
UPDATE dqf.dq_screen 
SET screen_script = 'SELECT -1 as Universal_rec_key   ,cast(count(*) as varchar(25)) as dq_result  ,''0'' as dq_value  FROM consume.Branch  where isnull(BranchPhoneNumber1,''0'') =''0'' AND As_Of_Date = (SELECT MAX(As_Of_Date) FROM consume.Branch)'

WHERE screen_key = 13

IF OBJECT_ID('[banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData]') IS NOT NULL
   DROP PROCEDURE [banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData];

GO

-- EXECUTE [banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData]

CREATE PROCEDURE [banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData]
AS
BEGIN

/***************************************************************************************************
   NAME
      [banner_reporting].[usp_AttritionRiskClients_ReportData].sql

   AUTHOR
      BANNERBANK\b60JCoughl, Banner Bank

   CREATE DATE
      2023-11-07

   BUSINESS OWNER(S)
      Karen Harrison

   INTENDED USE
      Calculate an Attrition Risk Score for every deposit client based upon defined rules (risk indicators),
      a Power BI report will display this information for the Community/Commercial Banking groups

   INTENDED AUDIENCE
      Community & Commercial Banking

   RELATED ITEC PROJECT
      #3800

   CHANGE LOG
      2023-11-07 Jen Coughlan - First implementation
      2023-12-28 Jen Coughlan - Fix to only include current day account branches in banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData table
      2024-01-16 Jen Coughlan - Remove spaces from column names in consume.Product view
      2024-02-02 Jen Coughlan - Add Commercial Relationship Group to dataset

***************************************************************************************************/

-----------------------------
-----------------------------
BEGIN TRY
-----------------------------
-----------------------------

/***************************************************************************************************
****************************************************************************************************
-- Declare variables
****************************************************************************************************
***************************************************************************************************/

DECLARE @TodayDate DATE = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time' -- get current date in PST
       ,@ReportRefreshDateTime DATETIME = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time' -- get current date time in PST
       ,@msg VARCHAR(8000) = ''
       ,@ErrorDescr VARCHAR(8000) = ''

SELECT @msg = 'Execution start time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- determine applicable relative time dates
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OneYear') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OneYear;

SELECT [ActualDate]
  INTO #OneYear      
  FROM consume.DimTime
  WHERE SLProcDayInd = 'Y'
  AND [ActualDate] >= DATEADD(MONTH,-13,@TodayDate) AND [ActualDate] < CAST(@TodayDate AS DATE)

DECLARE @CurrentDate DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear);
DECLARE @PreviousDate DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] < @CurrentDate);
--DECLARE @PreviousWeek DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(WEEK,-1,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @PreviousMonth DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-1,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @TwoMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-2,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @ThreeMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-3,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @FourMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-4,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @SixMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-6,@CurrentDate));
DECLARE @SevenMonthsAgo DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(MONTH,-7,@CurrentDate));
--DECLARE @PreviousYear DATE = (SELECT MAX([ActualDate]) FROM #OneYear WHERE [ActualDate] <= DATEADD(YEAR,-1,@CurrentDate));

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- calculate six month average balance per client for different account types
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DepositAverage') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #DepositAverage;

WITH ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths AS (
   SELECT Account.Client_BK
         ,Account.As_Of_Date
         ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) IN ('D','S','T') THEN Account.CurrentBalance
               ELSE 0.00
          END) AS [TotalDepositsDailyBalance]
     FROM consume.Account AS Account
    WHERE Account.As_Of_Date BETWEEN @SevenMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate -- get daily balance for last seven months
      AND UPPER(Account.AccountType)  IN ('D','S','T','L')
      AND ISNULL(Account.StatusCode,'1') NOT IN ('2','8') -- exclude Closed and Chargeoff accounts
 GROUP BY Account.Client_BK
         ,Account.As_Of_Date
)
, Current6MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @SixMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate -- average the last six months from today
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Prior6MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @SevenMonthsAgo AND @PreviousMonth -- average the six months from seven months ago to one month ago (i.e. 6 mo average as of one month ago)
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Current3MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @ThreeMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate -- average the last three months from today
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Prior3MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @FourMonthsAgo AND @PreviousMonth -- average the three months from four months ago to one month ago (i.e. 3 mo average as of one month ago)
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Current2MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @TwoMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate -- average the last two months from today
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, Prior2MonthAverage AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,AVG([TotalDepositsDailyBalance]) AS [2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
     FROM ClientDailyBalanceLastSevenMonths
    WHERE As_Of_Date BETWEEN @ThreeMonthsAgo AND @PreviousMonth -- average the two months from three months ago to one month ago (i.e. 3 mo average as of one month ago)
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
SELECT C6.Client_BK
      ,C6.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current]
      ,P6.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]
      ,C3.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current]
      ,P3.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]
      ,C2.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current]
      ,P2.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance] AS [2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]
  INTO #DepositAverage
  FROM Current6MonthAverage C6
  LEFT JOIN Prior6MonthAverage P6
    ON C6.Client_BK = P6.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN Current3MonthAverage C3
    ON C6.Client_BK = C3.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN Prior3MonthAverage P3
    ON C6.Client_BK = P3.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN Current2MonthAverage C2
    ON C6.Client_BK = C2.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN Prior2MonthAverage P2
    ON C6.Client_BK = P2.Client_BK;


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- get list of clients with Primary Bank Indicator and Tri Score changes
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#IFMProfileScores') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #IFMProfileScores;

WITH ProfileLastTwoMonths AS (
   SELECT TOP 2 As_Of_Date
     FROM marketing.IFM_ClientHouseholdProfile
    GROUP BY As_Of_Date
    ORDER BY As_Of_Date DESC
)
, CurrentData AS (
   SELECT IFM.Client_BK
         ,IFM.As_Of_Date
         ,IFM.PrimaryBankIndicator
         ,IFM.TriScore
     FROM marketing.IFM_ClientHouseholdProfile IFM
     JOIN ProfileLastTwoMonths TM
       ON IFM.As_Of_Date = TM.As_Of_Date
      AND IFM.As_Of_Date = (SELECT MAX(As_Of_Date) FROM ProfileLastTwoMonths)
)
, PriorData AS (
   SELECT IFM.Client_BK
         ,IFM.As_Of_Date
         ,IFM.PrimaryBankIndicator
         ,IFM.TriScore
     FROM marketing.IFM_ClientHouseholdProfile IFM
     JOIN ProfileLastTwoMonths TM
       ON IFM.As_Of_Date = TM.As_Of_Date
      AND IFM.As_Of_Date = (SELECT MIN(As_Of_Date) FROM ProfileLastTwoMonths)
)
SELECT CD.Client_BK
      ,CD.PrimaryBankIndicator AS PrimaryBankIndicator_Current
      ,PD.PrimaryBankIndicator AS PrimaryBankIndicator_Prior
      ,CD.TriScore AS TriScore_Current
      ,PD.TriScore AS TriScore_Prior
  INTO #IFMProfileScores
  FROM CurrentData CD
  JOIN PriorData PD
    ON TRIM(UPPER(CD.Client_BK)) = TRIM(UPPER(PD.Client_BK))


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- get list of clients that have an Earned Income Stop trigger in the last 6 months
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ClientEarnedIncomeStopTriggers') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ClientEarnedIncomeStopTriggers;

SELECT IFM_Triggers.Client_BK
      ,IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate
      ,IFM_Triggers.TriggerType
      ,IFM_Triggers.Establishment
      ,IFM_Triggers.Amount
      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY IFM_Triggers.Client_BK ORDER BY IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate DESC) AS RecordNumber
  INTO #ClientEarnedIncomeStopTriggers
  FROM [marketing].[IFM_ClientEvent] AS IFM_Triggers
 WHERE UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) = 'EARNED INCOME STOP'
   AND IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate BETWEEN @SixMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- get list of clients that have NEW outbound ACH Competitive Transfer triggers in the last 6 months
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ClientACHCompetitiveTransferTriggers') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ClientACHCompetitiveTransferTriggers;
SELECT IFM_Triggers.Client_BK
      ,MAX(IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate) AS LatestTransferDate
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) LIKE '%INVESTMENT%' THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [6MonthACHTransferAmount_Investment]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) LIKE '%BANK%' THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [6MonthACHTransferAmount_Bank]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) LIKE '%NEW%' THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [6MonthACHTransferAmount_New]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) LIKE '%EXISTING%' THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [6MonthACHTransferAmount_Existing]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN TriggerDate BETWEEN @PreviousMonth AND @CurrentDate THEN CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount) ELSE 0.00 END) AS [LastMonthACHTransferAmountTotal]
      ,(SUM(CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,2), IFM_Triggers.Amount)) / 6) AS [6MonthMonthlyAverage]
  INTO #ClientACHCompetitiveTransferTriggers
  FROM [marketing].[IFM_ClientEvent] AS IFM_Triggers
 WHERE UPPER(IFM_Triggers.TriggerType) IN ( 'NEW COMPETITIVE BANK TRANSFER'
                                    ,'BUSINESS - NEW COMPETITIVE BANK TRANSFER'
                                    ,'BUSINESS - NEW COMPETITIVE INVESTMENT TRANSFER'
                                    ,'NEW COMPETITIVE INVESTMENT TRANSFER'
                                    ,'EXISTING BANK TRANSFER'
                                    ,'BUSINESS - EXISTING BANK TRANSFER'
                                    ,'BUSINESS - EXISTING INVESTMENT'
                                    ,'EXISTING INVESTMENT'
                                   )
   AND UPPER(IFM_Triggers.CreditDebit) = 'D' -- debits only
   AND IFM_Triggers.TriggerDate BETWEEN @SixMonthsAgo AND @CurrentDate
 GROUP BY IFM_Triggers.Client_BK


SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build temp tables to hold needed rows from each consume object
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- consume.Account
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeAccount') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeAccount;

SELECT con.Account_Key
      ,con.Account_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.AccountType
      ,con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.Product_Key
      ,con.Product_BK
      ,con.CurrentBalance
  INTO #consumeAccount
  FROM consume.Account con
 WHERE 1=1
   AND con.As_Of_Date IN (@CurrentDate, @PreviousDate, @PreviousMonth, @SixMonthsAgo)
   AND con.AccountType IN ('D','S','T','L')
   AND ISNULL(con.IsTestAccount,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.IsBannerInternalBankUse,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.StatusCode,'1') NOT IN ('2','8')

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Product
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeProduct') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeProduct;

SELECT con.Product_Key
      ,con.Product_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.[Product_Line_Desc]
      ,con.[Product_Desc]
      ,con.ProductTypeCode
  INTO #consumeProduct
  FROM consume.Product con
 WHERE 1=1
   AND con.As_Of_Date IN (@CurrentDate, @PreviousDate, @PreviousMonth, @SixMonthsAgo)

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Client
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeClient') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeClient;

SELECT con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.CIFNumber
      ,con.ClientName
      ,con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.Officer_Key
      ,con.Officer_BK
  INTO #consumeClient
  FROM consume.Client con
 WHERE 1=1
   AND con.As_Of_Date IN (@CurrentDate) -- only need client's current details
   AND ISNULL(con.IsTestClient,0) <> 1 
   AND ISNULL(con.IsBankInternal,0) <> 1
   AND ISNULL(con.IsDeceased,0) <> 1
   AND ISNULL(UPPER(con.InsiderCode),'') NOT IN ('E','O','D','X') -- exclude employees, officers, directors and executive directors

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Branch - get the latest branch details for every branch
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeBranch') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeBranch;

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.Branch_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.Branch con
    WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY con.Branch_BK
)
SELECT con.Branch_Key
      ,con.Branch_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.BranchNumber
      ,con.BranchName
      ,con.BranchDivision
  INTO #consumeBranch
  FROM consume.Branch con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.Branch_BK = le.Branch_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.Officer - get the latest officer details for every officer
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeOfficer') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeOfficer;

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.Officer_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.Officer con
    WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY con.Officer_BK
)
SELECT con.Officer_Key
      ,con.Officer_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.OfficerFullName
      ,con.OfficerCode
      ,con.DateTerminated
  INTO #consumeOfficer
  FROM consume.Officer con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.Officer_BK = le.Officer_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.ClientRelationshipGroup - get the latest ClientRelationshipGroup details for every client
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeClientRelationshipGroup') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeClientRelationshipGroup;

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.Client_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.ClientRelationshipGroup con
    WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY con.Client_BK
)
SELECT con.Client_Key
      ,con.Client_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.GroupRelationshipTypeDesc
      ,con.RelationshipGroup_BK
      ,con.RelationshipGroup_Key
  INTO #consumeClientRelationshipGroup
  FROM consume.ClientRelationshipGroup con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.Client_BK = le.Client_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-- consume.RelationshipGroup - get the latest RelationshipGroup details for every RG
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#consumeRelationshipGroup') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #consumeRelationshipGroup;

WITH LatestEntry AS (
   SELECT con.RelationshipGroup_BK
         ,MAX(con.As_Of_Date) AS Latest_As_Of_Date
     FROM consume.RelationshipGroup con
    WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY con.RelationshipGroup_BK
)
SELECT con.RelationshipGroup_Key
      ,con.RelationshipGroup_BK
      ,con.As_Of_Date
      ,con.Client_Key
      ,con.RelatedGroupNumber
      ,con.RelatedGroupDesc
  INTO #consumeRelationshipGroup
  FROM consume.RelationshipGroup con
  JOIN LatestEntry le
    ON con.RelationshipGroup_BK = le.RelationshipGroup_BK
   AND con.As_Of_Date = le.Latest_As_Of_Date
 WHERE 1=1

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- get balance and number of accounts totals per client broken out by account category and for different dates
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ClientAccountCategoryTotals') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ClientAccountCategoryTotals;

WITH AccountBalances AS (
SELECT CONVERT(DATE, Account.As_Of_Date) AS As_Of_Date
      ,CASE 
	      WHEN @CurrentDate = Account.As_Of_Date THEN 'CurrentDay'
	      WHEN @PreviousDate = Account.As_Of_Date THEN 'PriorDay'
	      WHEN @PreviousMonth = Account.As_Of_Date THEN 'PriorMonth'
	      WHEN @SixMonthsAgo = Account.As_Of_Date THEN 'SixMonthsAgo'
         ELSE 'Other'
       END AS DateDescription
      ,@TodayDate AS TodayDate
      ,@ReportRefreshDateTime AS ReportRefreshDateTime
      ,@CurrentDate AS MaxDataDate
      ,CASE WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'T' THEN 'CDs'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'L' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'QUICKSTEP LOANS' THEN 'QuickStep Loans'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'L' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'COMMERCIAL LOANS' THEN 'Commercial Loans'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'L' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'CONSUMER LOANS' THEN 'Consumer Loans'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'S' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'COMMERCIAL DEPOSITS' THEN 'Commercial Savings'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'S' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'CONSUMER DEPOSITS' THEN 'Consumer Savings'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'D' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'COMMERCIAL DEPOSITS' AND (TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) LIKE '%CHECKING%' OR TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) LIKE '%CKG%') THEN 'Commercial Checking'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'D' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'COMMERCIAL DEPOSITS' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) NOT LIKE '%CHECKING%' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) NOT LIKE '%CKG%' THEN 'Commercial Other Deposits'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'D' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'CONSUMER DEPOSITS' AND (TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) LIKE '%CHECKING%' OR TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) LIKE '%CKG%') THEN 'Consumer Checking'
            WHEN UPPER(Account.AccountType) = 'D' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Line_Desc])) = 'CONSUMER DEPOSITS' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) NOT LIKE '%CHECKING%' AND TRIM(UPPER(Product.[Product_Desc])) NOT LIKE '%CKG%' THEN 'Consumer Other Deposits'
            ELSE 'Other'
       END AS AccountCategory
      ,Account.CurrentBalance AS Balance
      ,1 AS NumberOfAccounts
      ,Account.Client_BK
      ,Product.ProductTypeCode
  FROM #consumeAccount AS Account
  JOIN #consumeProduct AS Product
    ON Account.Product_Key = Product.Product_Key
 WHERE 1=1
)
SELECT As_Of_Date
      ,DateDescription
      ,TodayDate
      ,ReportRefreshDateTime
      ,MaxDataDate
      ,Client_BK
      ,COUNT(DISTINCT ProductTypeCode) AS [#ofProducts]
      -- balances
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN AccountCategory IN ('Commercial Checking','Consumer Checking','CDs','Commercial Savings','Consumer Savings','Commercial Other Deposits','Consumer Other Deposits') THEN Balance ELSE 0.00 END) AS [Balance_DepositsTotal]
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN AccountCategory IN ('QuickStep Loans','Commercial Loans','Consumer Loans') THEN Balance ELSE 0.00 END) AS [Balance_LoanTotal]
      -- number of accounts
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN AccountCategory IN ('Commercial Checking','Consumer Checking','CDs','Commercial Savings','Consumer Savings','Commercial Other Deposits','Consumer Other Deposits') THEN NumberOfAccounts ELSE 0 END) AS [#ofAccts_DepositsTotal]
  INTO #ClientAccountCategoryTotals
  FROM AccountBalances
 GROUP BY As_Of_Date
         ,DateDescription
         ,TodayDate
         ,ReportRefreshDateTime
         ,MaxDataDate
         ,Client_BK
;

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(varchar, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build concatenated list of account branch names for every client
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AccountBranchesByClient') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #AccountBranchesByClient;

SELECT A.Client_BK
      ,CASE WHEN UPPER(RIGHT(B.BranchName, 6)) = 'BRANCH' THEN SUBSTRING(B.BranchName, 1, LEN(B.BranchName) - 6) ELSE B.BranchName END + ' (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.BranchNumber) + ')' AS BranchName
  INTO #AccountBranchesByClient
  FROM #consumeAccount A
  JOIN #consumeBranch B
    ON A.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
 WHERE A.As_Of_Date = @CurrentDate
 GROUP BY A.Client_BK
      ,CASE WHEN UPPER(RIGHT(B.BranchName, 6)) = 'BRANCH' THEN SUBSTRING(B.BranchName, 1, LEN(B.BranchName) - 6) ELSE B.BranchName END + ' (' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.BranchNumber) + ')'


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ConcatenatedAccountBranchesByClient') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ConcatenatedAccountBranchesByClient;

SELECT A.Client_BK
      ,STRING_AGG(A.BranchName, '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A.BranchName ASC) AS [Account Branch List]
  INTO #ConcatenatedAccountBranchesByClient
  FROM #AccountBranchesByClient A
 GROUP BY A.Client_BK


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- pull final client list
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ClientList') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ClientList;

WITH PriorMonthClientDepositAccountTotal AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
         ,SUM(#ofAccts_DepositsTotal) AS #ofAccts_DepositsTotal
     FROM #ClientAccountCategoryTotals
    WHERE DateDescription = 'PriorMonth' -- account totals as of one month ago
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
, ActiveClientListSixMonthsAgo AS (
   SELECT Client_BK
     FROM #ClientAccountCategoryTotals
    WHERE DateDescription = 'SixMonthsAgo'
    GROUP BY Client_BK
)
SELECT CT.As_Of_Date
      ,CT.TodayDate
      ,CT.ReportRefreshDateTime
      ,CT.MaxDataDate
      ,CT.Client_BK
      ,TRIM(UPPER(Client.CIFNumber)) AS CIF
      ,Client.ClientName
      ,COALESCE(O.Officer_BK, 'Unknown') AS Officer_BK
      ,COALESCE(O.OfficerFullName + ' (' + O.OfficerCode + ')', 'No Current Officer Assigned (XXX)') AS [Officer]
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(15),RG.RelatedGroupNumber), '') AS RelationshipGroupNumber
      ,COALESCE(RG.RelatedGroupDesc, '') AS RelationshipGroupName
      ,Client.Branch_BK AS [Client Branch_BK]
      ,COALESCE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),B.BranchNumber), 'Unknown') AS [Client Branch Number]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchName, 'Unknown') AS [Client Branch Name]
      ,COALESCE(B.BranchDivision, 'Unknown') AS [Client Branch Division]
      ,ABC.[Account Branch List]
      ,CT.Balance_DepositsTotal
      ,CT.Balance_LoanTotal
      ,CT.#ofAccts_DepositsTotal
      ,CT.#ofProducts
      ,CASE WHEN CT.[#ofProducts] = 1 THEN 'Yes'
            ELSE NULL
       END AS [Indicator_SingleProductOnlyClient]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior],0.00) <> 0.00 AND ((ISNULL(DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current],0.00) - DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) / DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) <= -0.20 THEN 'Yes' 
            ELSE NULL 
       END AS [Indicator_ReductionFrom6MoAvgBalance]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(DA.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior],0.00) <> 0.00 AND ((ISNULL(DA.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current],0.00) - DA.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) / DA.[3MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) <= -0.20 THEN 'Yes' 
            ELSE NULL 
       END AS [Indicator_ReductionFrom3MoAvgBalance]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(DA.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior],0.00) <> 0.00 AND ((ISNULL(DA.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current],0.00) - DA.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) / DA.[2MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Prior]) <= -0.20 THEN 'Yes' 
            ELSE NULL 
       END AS [Indicator_ReductionFrom2MoAvgBalance]
      ,CASE WHEN CT.[#ofAccts_DepositsTotal] - ISNULL(PM.[#ofAccts_DepositsTotal],0) < 0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE NULL END AS [Indicator_DepositAccountClosures]
      ,AccountCountChange_DepositsTotal_PriorMonth = CT.[#ofAccts_DepositsTotal] - ISNULL(PM.[#ofAccts_DepositsTotal],0)
      ,ISNULL(DA.[6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance_Current],0.00) AS [6MonthAverage_TotalDepositsBalance]
      ,CASE WHEN EIS.Client_BK IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE NULL END AS [Indicator_EarnedIncomeStop]
      ,EIS.TriggerDate AS [EarnedIncomeStop_Date]
      ,EIS.Establishment AS [EarnedIncomeStop_Establishment]
      ,EIS.Amount AS [EarnedIncomeStop_Amount]
      ,CASE WHEN ACH.Client_BK IS NOT NULL AND ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_New] <> 0.00 THEN 'Yes' ELSE NULL END AS [Indicator_ACHCompetitiveTransfer_New]
      ,CASE WHEN ACH.Client_BK IS NOT NULL AND ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_Existing] <> 0.00 THEN 'Yes' ELSE NULL END AS [Indicator_ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Existing]
      ,ACH.LatestTransferDate AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Date]
      ,ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_New] AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_New_Amount]
      ,ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_Existing] AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Existing_Amount]
      ,ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_Bank] AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Bank_Amount]
      ,ACH.[6MonthACHTransferAmount_Investment] AS [ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Investment_Amount]
      ,CASE WHEN ACH.Client_BK IS NOT NULL AND ACH.[6MonthMonthlyAverage] <> 0.00 AND (ACH.LastMonthACHTransferAmountTotal / ACH.[6MonthMonthlyAverage]) >= 1.25 THEN 'Yes' 
            ELSE NULL 
       END AS [Indicator_IncreasedACHTransfers]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(IFMP.PrimaryBankIndicator_Current,0) < ISNULL(IFMP.PrimaryBankIndicator_Prior,0) THEN 'Yes'
            ELSE NULL
       END AS [Indicator_PrimaryBankIndicatorDecrease]
      ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(IFMP.TriScore_Current,0) > ISNULL(IFMP.TriScore_Prior,0) THEN 'Yes'
            ELSE NULL
       END AS [Indicator_TransferRiskIndexIncrease]
      ,CASE WHEN CL6.Client_BK IS NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS IsNewClient
  INTO #ClientList
  FROM #ClientAccountCategoryTotals CT
  JOIN #consumeClient Client -- pull current client details
    ON CT.Client_BK = Client.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeOfficer O
    ON Client.Officer_BK = O.Officer_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeBranch B -- pull in client branch details
    ON Client.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeClientRelationshipGroup CRG -- pull current RelationshipGroup mapping per client
    ON Client.Client_BK = CRG.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #consumeRelationshipGroup RG -- pull current RelationshipGroup details per RG
    ON ISNULL(CRG.RelationshipGroup_BK,'ABCXYZ') = RG.RelationshipGroup_BK
  LEFT JOIN PriorMonthClientDepositAccountTotal PM
    ON CT.Client_BK = PM.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #DepositAverage DA
    ON CT.Client_BK = DA.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #IFMProfileScores IFMP
    ON CT.Client_BK = IFMP.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #ClientEarnedIncomeStopTriggers EIS
    ON CT.Client_BK = EIS.Client_BK
   AND EIS.RecordNumber = 1 -- only pull latest Earned Income Stop trigger details
  LEFT JOIN #ClientACHCompetitiveTransferTriggers ACH
    ON CT.Client_BK = ACH.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN ActiveClientListSixMonthsAgo CL6
    ON CT.Client_BK = CL6.Client_BK
  LEFT JOIN #ConcatenatedAccountBranchesByClient ABC
    ON CT.Client_BK = ABC.Client_BK
 WHERE CT.DateDescription = 'CurrentDay' -- pull current client balances, etc.

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- put clients and calculate their attrition risk score into final table for PBI report to connect to
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData;

SELECT CL.*
      ,AttritionRiskScore = 
           CASE WHEN [Indicator_SingleProductOnlyClient] = 'Yes' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END -- high alert
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ReductionFrom6MoAvgBalance] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ReductionFrom3MoAvgBalance] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ReductionFrom2MoAvgBalance] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_DepositAccountClosures] = 'Yes' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END -- high alert
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_EarnedIncomeStop] = 'Yes' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END -- high alert
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ACHCompetitiveTransfer_New] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_ACHCompetitiveTransfer_Existing] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_IncreasedACHTransfers] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_PrimaryBankIndicatorDecrease] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
         + CASE WHEN [Indicator_TransferRiskIndexIncrease] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
  INTO banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData
  FROM #ClientList CL

SELECT @msg = 'Execution completion time: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() AT TIME ZONE 'Pacific Standard Time')
RAISERROR(@msg, 0, 1) WITH NOWAIT

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build table of all account branches per Client + add concatenated list of account branch names to the clients, PBI report will use for account branch filtering
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData;

SELECT A.Client_BK
      ,A.Branch_BK AS [Account Branch_BK]
      ,B.BranchNumber AS [Account Branch Number]
      ,B.BranchName AS [Account Branch Name]
      ,B.BranchDivision AS [Account Branch Division]
      ,ABC.[Account Branch List]
  INTO banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData
  FROM #consumeAccount A
  JOIN #consumeBranch B
    ON A.Branch_BK = B.Branch_BK
  JOIN banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData ABC
    ON A.Client_BK = ABC.Client_BK
 WHERE A.As_Of_Date = @CurrentDate
 GROUP BY A.Client_BK
      ,A.Branch_BK
      ,B.BranchNumber
      ,B.BranchName
      ,B.BranchDivision
      ,ABC.[Account Branch List]

/******************************************************************
SELECT TOP 1000 *
FROM banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_ReportData

SELECT TOP 1000 *
FROM banner_reporting.AttritionRiskClients_AccountBranchData
*******************************************************************/

-------------------------------
-------------------------------
END TRY
-------------------------------
-------------------------------


-------------------------------
-------------------------------
BEGIN CATCH
-------------------------------
-------------------------------
   IF @@trancount > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION

   SELECT @ErrorDescr = 'Error: '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(500),ISNULL(ERROR_NUMBER(),'NULL'))
                      +', Severity = '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(500),ISNULL(ERROR_SEVERITY(),'NULL'))
                      +', State = '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(500),ISNULL(ERROR_STATE(),'NULL'))
                      +', Procedure = '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(500),ISNULL(ERROR_PROCEDURE(),'NULL'))
                      +', Server Error Message = '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ISNULL(ERROR_MESSAGE(),'NULL'))
                      +', SP Defined Error Text = '+@ErrorDescr

   RAISERROR(@ErrorDescr,18,127) WITH NOWAIT

-----------------------------
----------------------------- 
END CATCH;
-------------------------------
-------------------------------

END   -- End of procedure definition
;
GO
