import json
from pyspark.sql.functions import col,date_format,to_date,to_str,md5,concat,trim,lit,md5,base64,upper,lit,encode,max,current_date
from pyspark.sql.types import BinaryType
from re import sub
from pyspark.sql import dataframe
from multiprocessing import Pool,cpu_count
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql.utils import AnalysisException
from datetime import datetime



DateFilter = '2024-05-28'
ADLSStorageAccount = '' #'abfss://ldw-synapse-filesystem@ldwdevsynapsesa1.dfs.core.windows.net/'
DeltaLakeRawDirectory = 'Incoming/Jack Henry/Core Banking System/DATB60/' #'Incoming/Jack Henry/Core Banking System/DATB60/'
DeltaLakeCombinedDirectory = 'Incoming/Jack Henry/Core Banking System/DATB60/'  #'Incoming/Jack Henry/Core Banking System/DATB60/'
ADLSLinkedServiceName_Combined = 'ldwdeltalakesa1'
ADLSStorageContainer_Combined = 'ldw-deltalake-combined'
ADLSLinkedServiceName_Raw = 'ldwdeltalakesa1' #'ldwdeltalakesa1'
ADLSStorageContainer_Raw = 'ldw-deltalake-raw' #'ldw-deltalake-raw'
Delimiter = '*&#'


# Testing section
#source_table_cols = "'CDPAR2':['PTYPE','PDESC','P2STMD','P2IQNM','P2COST', 'P2PROD', 'PGROUP','String_Bank', 'JhaPostingDate'],'CFACCT':['CFRELA', 'CFBEN','CFPOWN','String_Bank','CFCIF#','CFATYP','CFACC#', 'JhaPostingDate'],'CFPAR1':['CP1OWN', 'CP1DSC', 'String_Bank', 'CP1REL', 'JhaPostingDate'],'DDPAR2':['SCCODE','PSCDES','P2STMD','P2IQNM', 'PACTYP', 'P2COST', 'P2PROD', 'PGRCOD', 'HISEXP', 'String_Bank', 'JhaPostingDate'],'CFPARG':['CPGRP#', 'CPGTYP', 'CPGRPD', 'CPGOF1', 'CPGBR#', 'String_Bank', 'CPGCIF', 'CPGOF2', 'JhaPostingDate'],'LNPAR2':['PTYPE','PTYDSC','P2STMD','P2IQNM','P2COST','P2PROD','PLNGRP','PCALRE','P2NEGB','P2AVAL','P2DAVL','P2RDUM','P2PREF','P2BLAD','P2CLRQ', 'String_Bank', 'JhaPostingDate']"
#date_conversion_cols = "'DDPAR2': ['HISEXP'],'CDPAR2': [],'CFPAR1': [],'CFPARG':[],'LNPAR2': [],'CFACCT':[]"
#buisness_key_cols = "'CFACCT':{'ClientAccountRela_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','CFRELA'],'Client_BK'	:['String_Bank','Delimiter','CFCIF#'],'Account_BK'	:['String_Bank','Delimiter','CFATYP','Delimiter','CFACC#'],'ClientAccount_BK' :['String_Bank','Delimiter','CFCIF#','Delimiter','CFATYP','Delimiter','CFACC#']},'CDPAR2':{'GLProductCode_BK' :['String_Bank','Delimiter','P2PROD'], 'GLGroupCode_BK'	:['String_Bank','Delimiter','PGROUP'], 'GLCostCenter_BK' :['String_Bank','Delimiter','P2COST'], 'ProductType_BK'	:['String_Bank','Delimiter','Account_Type','Delimiter','PTYPE'], 'Product_BK' :['String_Bank','Delimiter','Account_Type','Delimiter','PTYPE','Delimiter','P2PROD']},'DDPAR2':{'GLCostCenter_BK' :['String_Bank','Delimiter','P2COST'], 'GLGroupCode_BK'	:['String_Bank','Delimiter','PGRCOD'], 'ProductType_BK'	:['String_Bank','Delimiter','PACTYP','Delimiter','SCCODE'], 'GlProductCode_BK'	:['String_Bank','Delimiter','P2PROD'], 'Product_BK' :['String_Bank','Delimiter','PACTYP','Delimiter','SCCODE','Delimiter','P2PROD']},'LNPAR2':{'Product_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','Account_Type','Delimiter','PTYPE','Delimiter','P2PROD'],'GLProductCode_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','P2PROD'],'ProductType_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','Account_Type','Delimiter','PTYPE'],'GLGroupCode_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','PLNGRP'],'CallReport_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','Account_Type','Delimiter','PCALRE'],'GLCostCenter_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','P2COST']},'CFPAR1':{'ClientAccountRela_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','CP1REL']},'CFPARG':{'RelationshipGroup_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','CPGRP#'],'Client_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','CPGCIF'],'Officer_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','CPGOF1'],'OfficerRelated_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','CPGOF2'],'Branch_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','CPGBR#']}"
#hard_business_rules = "'DDPAR2':{},'CDPAR2':{'Account_Type':'T'},'CFPAR1':{},'CFPARG':{},'CFACCT':{},'LNPAR2':{'Account_Type':'L'}"

#Update Variables in-place
source_table_cols = '{'+source_table_cols+'}'
date_conversion_cols = '{'+date_conversion_cols+'}'
buisness_key_cols = '{'+buisness_key_cols+'}'
hard_business_rules = '{'+hard_business_rules+'}'

# Lookup Storage Account connections
# MH Edit
LinkedStorageAccount_Raw = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(ADLSLinkedServiceName_Raw))['Endpoint'][8:]
ADLSStorageAccount_Raw = 'abfss://' + ADLSStorageContainer_Raw + '@' + LinkedStorageAccount_Raw + '/'

LinkedStorageAccount_Combined = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(ADLSLinkedServiceName_Combined))['Endpoint'][8:]
ADLSStorageAccount_Combined = 'abfss://' + ADLSStorageContainer_Combined + '@' + LinkedStorageAccount_Combined + '/'



# Convert String list to array
# MH Edit

tableColumnDict = eval(source_table_cols)
tableColumnDateConversions = eval(date_conversion_cols)
tableColumnHashes = eval(buisness_key_cols)
tableNewFields = eval(hard_business_rules)

# Set required settings
# spark.conf.set("spark.sql.parquet.enableVectorizedReader","false")
# spark.conf.set("spark.sql.optimizer.expression.nestedPruning.enabled", False)
# spark.conf.set("spark.sql.optimizer.nestedSchemaPruning.enabled", False)

spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.parquet.int96RebaseModeInRead", "CORRECTED")
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.parquet.int96RebaseModeInWrite", "CORRECTED")
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.parquet.datetimeRebaseModeInRead", "CORRECTED")
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.parquet.datetimeRebaseModeInWrite", "CORRECTED")
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.timeParserPolicy", "CORRECTED")

# Set up error output
TableErrors = []
TableSuccess = []

# Step 1: Define the source table, target table and desired columns to be moved from Raw -> Combined.
for tableName in tableColumnDict:
    columnList = tableColumnDict[tableName] # Define the columns we want to select 
    delta_table_path_Raw = ADLSStorageAccount_Raw + DeltaLakeRawDirectory + tableName + "/" # Define the Raw table path
    delta_table_path_Combined = ADLSStorageAccount_Combined + DeltaLakeCombinedDirectory + tableName + "/" # Define the Combined table path

    # Step 2: Identify the maximum data date and last load timestamp from the Raw table.
    try:
        source_df = spark.read.format('delta').load(delta_table_path_Raw)
        max_datadate_source = source_df.agg(max("JhaPostingDate")).collect()[0][0]
        delta_history_source = DeltaTable.forPath(spark, delta_table_path_Raw)
        last_modification_source_datetime = delta_history_source.history(1).select("timestamp").collect()[0][0]
        last_modification_source = last_modification_source_datetime.date()

    #Step 3: Check if target table exists and get maximum data date and last load timestamp if it does. 
        try:
            target_df = spark.read.format('delta').load(delta_table_path_Combined)
            max_datadate_target = target_df.agg(max("As_Of_Date")).collect()[0][0]
            
            delta_history_target = DeltaTable.forPath(spark, delta_table_path_Combined)
            last_modification_target_datetime = delta_history_target.history(1).select("timestamp").collect()[0][0]
            last_modification_target = last_modification_target_datetime.date()
            table_exists = True
        except AnalysisException:
            max_datadate_target = None
            last_modification_target = None
            table_exists = False

    # Step 4: Compare DataDate between source and target
        # Step 4a: Compare Data Dates to identify if target table needs to load. 
        if max_datadate_source is not None and max_datadate_source == max_datadate_target:
        # Step 4b: Compare Modificaiton times to identify if the source table loaded on the same day as the target table. 
            if last_modification_target is not None and last_modification_target == last_modification_source: 
                print(f"The maximum DataDate from the source/target ({tableName}) are identical ({max_datadate_target}), source/target table were last modified at ({last_modification_target}). Skipping without failure.")
                continue
            else: 
                raise Exception(f"The maximum DataDate from the source/target ({tableName}) are identical ({max_datadate_target}), but the source table was last modified on ({last_modification_source}) and the target table was last modified on ({last_modification_target}). Skipping with failure.")

    # Step 5: Read Source data/filter and apply transformations 
        # Read the Raw table (filter columns/rows)
        filtered_df = source_df.select(columnList).filter(col('String_Bank') == '60').filter(col("JhaPostingDate") == max_datadate_source) 
   
        # Convert Date Fields to real dates and Apply Hard Business Rules
        filtered_df = filtered_df.transform(trim_all_string_columns) # Trim all string values
        for column in tableColumnDateConversions[tableName]:
            filtered_df = filtered_df.withColumn(column, to_date(col(column).cast('string'),'yyyyDDD'))


        # Add String Fields/Hash Keys to dataframe
        filtered_df = filtered_df.withColumn('Delimiter',lit(Delimiter)) # Add Delimiter field
        for column,columnValue in tableNewFields[tableName].items(): # Add Hard Business Rules
            filtered_df = filtered_df.withColumn(column,lit(columnValue))
        for column,inputs in tableColumnHashes[tableName].items(): # Build Business Keys
            filtered_df = filtered_df.withColumn(column,concat(*inputs))
        for column in tableColumnHashes[tableName]:
            filtered_df = filtered_df.withColumn(sub('_BK','_HK',column),(concat(lit('0x'),upper(md5(encode(column,'utf_16LE')))))) # Build Hash Keys


        # Create As_Of_Date_YearMonth, this will be used to partition the Delta Table
        filtered_df = filtered_df.withColumn('As_Of_Date_YearMonth', date_format('JhaPostingDate','yyyyMM')) 


        # Rename the Field JhaPostingDate to As_Of_Date
        filtered_df = filtered_df.withColumnRenamed("JhaPostingDate", "As_Of_Date")
        for column in tableColumnHashes[tableName]:
            if column.endswith("_BK"):
                    new_col_name = column.replace('_BK','_Key')
                    df = filtered_df.withColumn(new_col_name,concat(col(column),lit("&*#"), date_format(col("As_Of_Date"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSSSSS")))


        # Drop the delimiter column now that the keys have been created
        filtered_df = filtered_df.drop("Delimiter")

    # Step 6: Write or append the filtered data to the target Delta Table
        if not table_exists:
            filtered_df.write.mode("overwrite").format("delta").partitionBy('As_Of_Date_YearMonth').save(delta_table_path_Combined)
            TableSuccess.append(tableName)
        else: 
            filtered_df.write.mode("append").format("delta").partitionBy('As_Of_Date_YearMonth').save(delta_table_path_Combined)
            TableSuccess.append(tableName)
    # Step 7: Record Success/Failure
        print(f"Successfully processed table: ({tableName}).")
    except Exception as e:
        TableErrors.append(tableName)
        print(f"Error processing table: ({tableName}). Error: {str(e)}")

# Exit notebook with both success and error arrays:
exit_message = {
    "TableSuccess": TableSuccess,
    "TableErrors": TableErrors
}
mssparkutils.notebook.exit(exit_message)

import json
from pyspark.sql.functions import col,date_format,to_date,to_str,md5,concat,trim,lit,md5,base64,upper,lit,encode,row_number,to_timestamp
from pyspark.sql.types import BinaryType
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from re import sub
from pyspark.sql import dataframe
from multiprocessing import Pool,cpu_count
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql import functions as F



ADLSLinkedServiceName_Raw = "ldwdeltalakesa1"
ADLSLinkedServiceName_Combined = "ldwdeltalakesa1"
ADLSStorageContainer_Raw = "ldw-deltalake-raw"
ADLSStorageContainer_Combined = "ldw-deltalake-combined"
DeltaLakeRawDirectory = "Incoming/Tumbleweed/IFM"
DeltaLakeCombinedDirectory = "Incoming/Tumbleweed/IFM"
source_table_cols = "'WireData':['SWIFT_FED','PostDate','AccountKey','AccountType','HHKey','CreditDebit','Amount','Category','Subcategory','Establishment','Customer_Name','Ben_Name','Sen_Name','Ben_BankCode','Ben_BankName', 'Sender_BankCode', 'Sen_BankName', 'WirTyp', 'IsDeleted', 'SourceSystem', 'Branch', 'Memo', 'RecID']"
date_conversion_cols = "'WireData': ['PostDate']"
buisness_key_cols = "'WireData':{'FI_Originating_DFI_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','Sender_BankCode'],'Client_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','HHKey'],'FI_Receiving_DFI_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','Ben_BankCode'],'Account_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','AccountType','Delimiter','AccountKey'],'Branch_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','Branch'],'FI_Sender_Point_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','Sender_BankCode'],'FI_Receiver_Point_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','Ben_BankCode'],'Transaction_BK':['String_Bank','Delimiter','RecID']}"
hard_business_rules = "'WireData':{'String_Bank':'60'}"
incremental_field_col = "'WireData':['PostDate']"
Delimiter = '*&#'


# Testing section
#source_table_cols = "'LNPAR2':['PTYPE','PTYDSC','P2STMD','P2IQNM','P2COST','P2PROD','PLNGRP','PCALRE','P2NEGB','P2AVAL','P2DAVL','P2RDUM','P2PREF','P2BLAD','P2CLRQ', 'String_Bank', 'JhaPostingDate'],'DDPAR2':['SCCODE','PSCDES','P2STMD','P2IQNM', 'PACTYP', 'HISEXP', 'String_Bank', 'JhaPostingDate']"
#date_conversion_cols = "'LNPAR2': [],'DDPAR2': ['HISEXP'],'CDPAR2': []"
#buisness_key_cols = "'DDPAR2':{'_dvb_glcostcenter_bk' :['String_Bank','Delimiter','P2COST'], '_dvb_glgroupcode_bk'	:['String_Bank','Delimiter','PGRCOD'], '_dvb_producttype_bk'	:['String_Bank','Delimiter','PACTYP','Delimiter','SCCODE'], '_dvb_glproductcode_bk'	:['String_Bank','Delimiter','P2PROD'], '_dvb_producttype_glproductcode_bk' :['String_Bank','Delimiter','PACTYP','Delimiter','SCCODE','Delimiter','P2PROD']},'CDPAR2':{'_dvb_glproductcode_bk' :['String_Bank','Delimiter','P2PROD'], '_dvb_glgroupcode_bk'	:['String_Bank','Delimiter','PGROUP'], '_dvb_glcostcenter_bk' :['String_Bank','Delimiter','P2COST'], '_dvb_producttype_bk'	:['String_Bank','Delimiter','Account_Type','Delimiter','PTYPE'], '_dvb_producttype_glproductcode_bk' :['String_Bank','Delimiter','Account_Type','Delimiter','PTYPE','Delimiter','P2PROD']},'LNPAR2':{'_dvb_producttype_glproductcode_bk':['String_Bank','Delimiter','Account_Type','Delimiter','PTYPE','Delimiter','P2PROD'],'_dvb_glproductcode_bk':['String_Bank','Delimiter','P2PROD'],'_dvb_producttype_bk':['String_Bank','Delimiter','Account_Type','Delimiter','PTYPE'],'_dvb_glgroupcode_bk':['String_Bank','Delimiter','PLNGRP'],'_dvb_callreport_bk':['String_Bank','Delimiter','Account_Type','Delimiter','PCALRE'],'_dvb_glcostcenter_bk':['String_Bank','Delimiter','P2COST']}"
#hard_business_rules = "'DDPAR2':{},'CDPAR2':{'Account_Type':'T'},'LNPAR2':{'Account_Type':'L'}"

#Update Variables in-place
source_table_cols = '{'+source_table_cols+'}'
date_conversion_cols = '{'+date_conversion_cols+'}'
buisness_key_cols = '{'+buisness_key_cols+'}'
hard_business_rules = '{'+hard_business_rules+'}'
incremental_field_col = '{'+incremental_field_col+'}'

# Lookup Storage Account connections
# MH Edit
LinkedStorageAccount_Raw = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(ADLSLinkedServiceName_Raw))['Endpoint'][8:]
ADLSStorageAccount_Raw = 'abfss://' + ADLSStorageContainer_Raw + '@' + LinkedStorageAccount_Raw + '/'

LinkedStorageAccount_Combined = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(ADLSLinkedServiceName_Combined))['Endpoint'][8:]
ADLSStorageAccount_Combined = 'abfss://' + ADLSStorageContainer_Combined + '@' + LinkedStorageAccount_Combined + '/'



# Convert String list to array
# MH Edit

tableColumnDict = eval(source_table_cols)
tableColumnDateConversions = eval(date_conversion_cols)
tableColumnHashes = eval(buisness_key_cols)
tableNewFields = eval(hard_business_rules)
tableIncremental = eval(incremental_field_col)
# Set required settings
# spark.conf.set("spark.sql.parquet.enableVectorizedReader","false")
# spark.conf.set("spark.sql.optimizer.expression.nestedPruning.enabled", False)
# spark.conf.set("spark.sql.optimizer.nestedSchemaPruning.enabled", False)

spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.parquet.int96RebaseModeInRead", "CORRECTED")
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.parquet.int96RebaseModeInWrite", "CORRECTED")
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.parquet.datetimeRebaseModeInRead", "CORRECTED")
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.parquet.datetimeRebaseModeInWrite", "CORRECTED")
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.timeParserPolicy", "CORRECTED")

#Iterate over the dictionary
for tableName in tableColumnDict:
    columnList = tableColumnDict[tableName]
    delta_table_path_Raw = ADLSStorageAccount_Raw + DeltaLakeRawDirectory + tableName + "/"
    delta_table_path_Combined = ADLSStorageAccount_Combined + DeltaLakeCombinedDirectory + tableName + "/"
    # Read Bronze Table and apply hard business rules
    df = spark.read.format('delta').load(delta_table_path_Raw).select(columnList)
    df = df.transform(trim_all_string_columns)
    df = df.withColumn('Delimiter',lit(Delimiter))
    # Add String Fields to dataframe
    for column,columnValue in tableNewFields[tableName].items():
        df = df.withColumn(column,lit(columnValue))
    for column in tableColumnDateConversions[tableName]:
        df = df.withColumn(column, to_date(col(column).cast('string'),'yyyy-MM-dd'))
    for column,inputs in tableColumnHashes[tableName].items():
        df = df.withColumn(column,concat(*inputs))
    for column in tableColumnHashes[tableName]:
        df = df.withColumn(sub('_BK','_HK',column),(concat(lit('0x'),upper(md5(encode(column,'utf_16LE'))))))
    # All IFM files will have to be listed as Incremental because there is no consitent naming convention for the date dlimiter
    # The else is included to highlight how this could be performed with a source that has consitent naming conventions. 
    if tableName in tableIncremental:
        timestamp_col = tableIncremental[tableName]
        
        # If the variable timestamp_col has the class 'list' take the first value from the list. 
        if isinstance(timestamp_col, list):
            timestamp_col = timestamp_col[0]
        


        partition_cols = [col_name for col_name in tableColumnDict[tableName] if col_name != timestamp_col]
  
        # create windowed function to de-duplicate the data. 
        window_spec = Window.partitionBy(*[F.col(col_name) for col_name in partition_cols]).orderBy(F.col(timestamp_col).desc())
        latest_df = (df.withColumn("row_num",F.row_number().over(window_spec)).filter(F.col("row_num") == 1).drop("row_num"))
        
        filtered_df = latest_df
        filtered_df = filtered_df.withColumn('As_Of_Date_YearMonth', F.date_format(F.col(timestamp_col),'yyyyMM'))
        filtered_df = filtered_df.withColumnRenamed(timestamp_col, "As_Of_Date")
        for column in tableColumnHashes[tableName]:
            if column.endswith("_BK"):
                    new_col_name = column.replace('_BK','_Key')
                    filtered_df = filtered_df.withColumn(new_col_name,concat(col(column),lit("&*#"), date_format(col("As_Of_Date"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSSSSS")))
        # Drop the delimiter column now that the keys have been created
        filtered_df = filtered_df.drop("Delimiter")
        # Write File to Combined destination
        filtered_df.write.mode("overwrite").format("delta").partitionBy('As_Of_Date_YearMonth').save(delta_table_path_Combined)
    else:
        filtered_df = df

# Set up error output

for tableName, NumRowsInput in tablesListArray:

    # Pull schema information from SYSCOLUMNS
    SchemaPath = ADLSStorageAccount_Raw + SchemaDirectory + "/"
    dfSchema = spark.read.format("delta").load(SchemaPath)
    dfSchema = dfSchema.filter(dfSchema.TABLE_NAME == tableName).select(dfSchema.Delta_DATA_TYPE)
    dfSchema = [json.loads(row[0]) for row in dfSchema.collect()]
    newRows = [{"metadata":{},"name":"JhaBankID","nullable":False,"type":"string"},
            {"metadata":{},"name":"JhaPostingDate","nullable":False,"type":"string"}]
    dfSchema = dfSchema + newRows
    dfSchema = {'fields':dfSchema,"type":"struct"}
    dfSchema = StructType.fromJson(dfSchema)

    # Load a file into a dataframe
    df = spark.read.schema(dfSchema).option('header',True).csv(ADLSStorageAccount_Stage + ParquetImportDirectory + tableName + "/",modifiedAfter=cutoff)
    df = df.withColumn("JhaPostingDate",df.JhaPostingDate.cast('date'))

    # Save the dataframe as a delta table
    delta_table_path = ADLSStorageAccount_Raw + DeltaLakeBronzeDirectory + tableName + "/"
    df.write.mode("append").partitionBy("JhaPostingDate").format("delta").option("mergeSchema", "true").save(delta_table_path)

    # Validate inserted rows for validation
    deltaTable = DeltaTable.forPath(spark, delta_table_path)
    lastOperationDF = deltaTable.history(1).select(explode('operationMetrics'))
    NumWrittenRows = lastOperationDF.filter(lastOperationDF.key == 'numOutputRows').select('value').collect()[0][0] #[numOutputRows]
    if to_str(NumRowsInput) != to_str(NumWrittenRows):
        TableErrors.append(tableName)
        print(tableName,' InputRows: ',NumRowsInput,' WrittenRows: ',NumWrittenRows)

# Exit notebook and return the error tables
if len(TableErrors):
    mssparkutils.notebook.exit(TableErrors)

# Create functions to build delta data types
SilverLakeToDeltaTypes = when(col('DATA_TYPE') == 'CHAR','string')\
    .when(col('DATA_TYPE') == 'VARCHAR','string')\
    .when(col('DATA_TYPE') == 'DECIMAL',concat(lit('decimal('),col('NUMERIC_PRECISION'),lit(','),col('NUMERIC_SCALE'),lit(')')))\
    .when(col('DATA_TYPE') == 'NUMERIC',concat(lit('decimal('),col('NUMERIC_PRECISION'),lit(','),col('NUMERIC_SCALE'),lit(')')))\
    .when(col('DATA_TYPE') == 'INTEGER','integer')\
    .when(col('DATA_TYPE') == 'BIGINT','long')\
    .when(col('DATA_TYPE') == 'SMALLINT','short')\
    .when(col('DATA_TYPE') == 'DATE','date')\
    .when(col('DATA_TYPE') == 'TIMESTMP','timestamp')\
    .when(col('DATA_TYPE') == 'CHARACTER VARYING','string')\
    .otherwise('string')
Delta_IS_NULLABLE = when(col('IS_NULLABLE') == 'YES',True).when(col('IS_NULLABLE') == 'NO',False).otherwise(True)

# Get Schema from incoming data
dfSchema = spark.read.option('header',True).csv(ADLSStorageAccount_Stage + ParquetImportDirectory + tableName + \
             "/",modifiedAfter=cutoff).withColumn('Delta_IS_NULLABLE',Delta_IS_NULLABLE)
dfSchema = dfSchema.filter((dfSchema.TABLE_SCHEMA == 'QSYS2') & (dfSchema.TABLE_NAME == 'SYSCOLUMNS')).withColumn('Delta_DATA_TYPE',\
            SilverLakeToDeltaTypes)
dfSchema = [{'metadata':{},'name':row['COLUMN_NAME'],'nullable':row['Delta_IS_NULLABLE'],'type':row['Delta_DATA_TYPE']} for row in dfSchema.collect()]
dfSchema = dfSchema + [{'metadata':{},'name':'JhaPostingDate','nullable':False,'type':'string'}]
dfSchema = {'fields':dfSchema,"type":"struct"}
dfSchema = StructType.fromJson(dfSchema)
# print(dfSchema)

# # Load a file into a dataframe
df = spark.read.schema(dfSchema).option('header',True).csv(ADLSStorageAccount_Stage + ParquetImportDirectory + tableName + "/",modifiedAfter=cutoff)
df = df.withColumn('Delta_IS_NULLABLE',Delta_IS_NULLABLE).withColumn('Delta_DATA_TYPE',SilverLakeToDeltaTypes)
df = df.withColumn('Delta_DATA_TYPE',concat(
    lit('''{"metadata":{},"name":"''')
    ,col('COLUMN_NAME')
    ,lit('''","nullable":''')
    ,col('Delta_IS_NULLABLE')
    ,lit(''',"type":"''')
    ,col('Delta_DATA_TYPE')
    ,lit('''"}''')
))

df = df.withColumn("JhaPostingDate",df.JhaPostingDate.cast('date'))

# Save the dataframe as a delta table
df.write.mode("overwrite").format("delta").option("mergeSchema", "true").save(delta_table_path)

# Validate inserted rows for validation
TableErrors = []
deltaTable = DeltaTable.forPath(spark, delta_table_path)
lastOperationDF = deltaTable.history(1).select(explode('operationMetrics'))
NumWrittenRows = lastOperationDF.filter(lastOperationDF.key == 'numOutputRows').select('value').collect()[0][0] #[numOutputRows]
if to_str(NumRowsInput) != to_str(NumWrittenRows):
    TableErrors.append(tableName)
    print(tableName,' InputRows: ',NumRowsInput,' WrittenRows: ',NumWrittenRows)

tableList_Type2 = ["consume.Client","consume.Account","consume.ClientAccount","consume.ClientRelationshipGroup", "consume.fact_EnterpriseDataModel", "consume.Account_CertificateOfDepositDetail", "consume.Account_CreditLineDetail", "consume.Account_DemandDepositDetail", "consume.Account_LoanDetail"]
tableList_Type2OnlyCurrent = ["consume.ProductGL","consume.ProductType","certified.ProductType","consume.Branch","consume.Officer","consume.RelationshipGroup","consume.ClientAddress","consume.Product"]
tableList_Type1 = ["consume.Household","consume.ClientHousehold"]
tableList_Dates = ["consume.DimTime"]
# Dictionary of the EDM table taht will be created, and the corresponding SecurityName in Banner_security.SecurityAssignment
tableList_RLS = {"DormantEscheatSecurity":"Dormant/Escheat","InsiderClientSecurity":"InsiderClients"}

deltaLakePath = "EDM/"
consumeDatabase = 'ldw_synapse_dsqlpool_dvb'

# Introduce error specifically to test incident creation in orchestration pipeline
# Required variable setup prior to data movement
## Import & Settings

# Add required imports
import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants
from pyspark.sql.functions import col,date_format,to_date,to_str, regexp_replace
import delta
import json

# Set config to avoid date errors with Calendar changes in spark 3.0
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.parquet.int96RebaseModeInWrite", "CORRECTED")

# Set autoMerge.enabled = true to allow schema evolution. This will update the schema with new columns as needed
spark.conf.set("spark.databricks.delta.schema.autoMerge.enabled", "true")

#Get connection string from KeyVault for DVB connection
consumeServer = mssparkutils.credentials.getFullConnectionString('DVB')[4:]

# Get linked storage account
LinkedStorageAccount = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll('ldwdeltalakesa1'))['Endpoint'][8:] # There is no evident way to directly get the connection, so we have to parse the connection synapse_sa1
deltaLakeFileSystem = 'abfss://ldw-deltalake-presentation@' + LinkedStorageAccount + '/'
## Get List of dates to load

# Identify Current Day
currDay = (spark.read
                     .option(Constants.DATABASE, consumeDatabase)
                     .option(Constants.SERVER, consumeServer)
                     .option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, deltaLakeFileSystem + deltaLakePath + "SQLAnalyticsConnectorStaging/")
                     .option(Constants.QUERY, "SELECT DT.ActualDate FROM consume.DimTime AS DT WHERE DT.CurrentProcessingDayInd = 'Y'")
                     .synapsesql()
                     ).select(date_format('ActualDate','yyyy-MM-dd')).collect()[0]

currDay = "'" + currDay[0] + "'"


# create query to identify dates needed
# dateQuery = ("SELECT DT.ActualDate FROM consume.DimTime AS DT WHERE DT.CurrDay = 'Y' ")
dateQuery = (" " +
    "SELECT TOP 16 " +
	"DT.ActualDate " +
    "FROM consume.DimTime AS DT " +
    "WHERE (DT.ActualDate <= " + currDay +
	"AND DT.SLEOMInd = 'Y') " +
	"OR DT.ActualDate = " + currDay +
    "ORDER BY DT.ActualDate DESC")


# Name of the SQL Dedicated Pool or database where to run the query
# # Database can be specified as a Spark Config or as a Constant - Constants.DATABASE
# spark.conf.set("spark.sqlanalyticsconnector.dw.database", "ldw_synapse_dsqlpool_dvb")

# Read from existing internal table
dateList = (spark.read
                     .option(Constants.DATABASE, consumeDatabase)
                     .option(Constants.SERVER, consumeServer)
                     .option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, deltaLakeFileSystem + deltaLakePath + "SQLAnalyticsConnectorStaging/")
                     .option(Constants.QUERY, dateQuery)
                     .synapsesql()
                     ).select(date_format('ActualDate','yyyy-MM-dd')).rdd.flatMap(lambda x: x).collect()
# Main Data Movement
## Load Type 2 history tables

# Get data for the relevant dates in Type 2 tables
for table in tableList_Type2:
    # Get table data
    delta_table_path = deltaLakeFileSystem + deltaLakePath + table + "/"
    if delta.DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark,delta_table_path):
        existingDates = spark.read.format("delta").load(delta_table_path).select(date_format('As_Of_Date','yyyy-MM-dd')).distinct().rdd.flatMap(lambda x: x).collect()
    else:
        existingDates = []
    # Check what new dates need to be loaded
    newDatesToLoad = (set(dateList)-set(existingDates))
    # Check what dates need to be truncated
    datesToTruncate = (set(existingDates)-set(dateList))
    # Delete records no longer needed

    if delta.DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark,delta_table_path):
        dt = delta.DeltaTable.forPath(spark, delta_table_path)
        dt.delete(date_format('As_Of_Date','yyyy-MM-dd').isin(datesToTruncate))
        dt.vacuum()
        print('Deleted',datesToTruncate,'dates from Client & Vacuumed')

    print(table + ' loading dates: ' + str(newDatesToLoad))
    for date in newDatesToLoad:
        print('Loading ' + table + ' data for ' + str(date))
        # # Build query
        query = ("SELECT " +
        "*" +
        " FROM " + table + " WHERE As_Of_Date = '" + str(date) + "'")
        # Load a file into a dataframe
        df = (spark.read
                     .option(Constants.DATABASE, consumeDatabase)
                     .option(Constants.SERVER, consumeServer)
                     .option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, deltaLakeFileSystem + deltaLakePath + "SQLAnalyticsConnectorStaging/")
                     .option(Constants.QUERY, query)
                     .synapsesql()
                     )
        # Save the dataframe as a delta table
        df.write.mode("append").partitionBy('As_Of_Date').format("delta").save(delta_table_path)
    print(table + ' is fully loaded')
print('EDM Type 2 data is fully loaded to Delta Lake')

## Load RLS tables

# For Security tables
for table in tableList_RLS:
    print(table + ' loading')
    delta_table_path = deltaLakeFileSystem + deltaLakePath + table + "/"
    # # Build query
    query = "SELECT * FROM banner_security.SecurityAssignment WHERE SecurityName = '" + tableList_RLS[table] + "'" # + WhereClause
    # Load a file into a dataframe
    df = (spark.read
                    .option(Constants.DATABASE, consumeDatabase)
                    .option(Constants.SERVER, consumeServer)
                    .option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, deltaLakeFileSystem + deltaLakePath + "SQLAnalyticsConnectorStaging/")
                    .option(Constants.QUERY, query)
                    .synapsesql()
                    )
    # Add global viewing record for blank Insider
    if table == 'InsiderClientSecurity':
        df.schema['SecurityKey'].nullable = True
        newRow = spark.createDataFrame([(None,None,'Client','InsiderCients',None,True,None,None,True)],df.schema)
        df = df.union(newRow)
    # Save the dataframe as a delta table
    df.write.mode("overwrite").format("delta").save(delta_table_path)
    print(table + ' is fully loaded')
